damagetype.desc5: \fs[23]- \c[11]Per X Turns\c[0]: The affected unit takes damage once every X turns. This can occur either at the start or end of the turn.
damagetype.desc6: \fs[23]- \c[11]Per X Actions\c[0]: The affected unit takes damage once every X actions. This can also occur at the start or end of the action.

elements.desc1: <WordWrap>\fs[23]In the world of Valkadia, various elements interact differently in battle. Using an effective element increases your damage, while using an ineffective one reduces it. Some elements can even absorb others, converting damage into healing. Hitting enemies with their elemental weaknesses, or analyzing them using the \c[4]Analyze\c[0] ability, can reveal these advantages.
elements.desc5: \fs[23]\i[67]\c[9]#{termwords.water}\c[0]: Strong against \c[18]#{termwords.fire}\c[0]. Weak against \c[23]#{termwords.ice}\c[0], \c[9]#{termwords.water}\c[0], \c[17]#{termwords.thunder}\c[0], \c[11]#{termwords.plant}\c[0], \c[7]#{termwords.undead}\c[0]. Absorbed by \c[20]#{termwords.earth}\c[0].
elements.desc6: \fs[23]\i[68]\c[20]#{termwords.earth}\c[0]: Strong against \c[9]#{termwords.water}\c[0]. Weak against \c[20]#{termwords.earth}\c[0]. Absorbed by \c[11]#{termwords.plant}\c[0].
elements.desc7: \fs[23]\i[69]\c[3]#{termwords.wind}\c[0]: Strong against \c[20]#{termwords.earth}\c[0]. Weak against \c[3]#{termwords.wind}\c[0]. Absorbed by \c[18]#{termwords.fire}\c[0].
elements.desc11: \fs[23]\i[2026]\c[27]#{termwords.puremagic}\c[0]: Neutral element — neither strong nor weak against any others.

armortype.desc1: <WordWrap>\fs[23]Different \c[4]Weapon Types\c[0] interact uniquely with various \c[4]Armor Types\c[0]. Some weapons deal bonus damage to specific armors, while others may be less effective. There are three primary weapon and armor types:
armortype.desc2: \fs[23]\c[4]\i[97]#{termwords.slash}\c[0]: Deals 15% more damage to \c[4]#{termwords.clotharmor}\c[0], but 15% less to \c[4]#{termwords.heavyarmor}\c[0].
armortype.desc3: \fs[23]\c[4]\i[107]#{termwords.pierce}\c[0]: Deals 15% more damage to \c[4]#{termwords.lightarmor}\c[0], but 15% less to \c[4]#{termwords.clotharmor}\c[0].
armortype.desc4: \fs[23]\c[4]\i[98]#{termwords.blunt}\c[0]: Deals 15% more damage to \c[4]#{termwords.heavyarmor}\c[0], but 15% less to \c[4]#{termwords.lightarmor}\c[0].
armortype.desc5: \fs[23]There is also a special \c[4]Armor Type\c[0] known as \c[4]#{termwords.ghostarmor}\c[0]. It takes 50% less damage from all physical attacks, but 50% more from magic.

subbattlecommands.desc1: <WordWrap>\fs[23]During battle, you can access several sub battle commands to better manage your party. Press \c[4]ESC\c[0], \c[4]X\c[0], or \c[4]Right Click\c[0] before selecting an action to open the sub battle command menu. Each command is explained below:
subbattlecommands.desc2: \fs[23]\c[4]#{battletext.fight}\c[0]: Continue the current battle as usual.
subbattlecommands.desc3: \fs[23]\c[4]#{termwords.autobattle}\c[0]: Let the AI take control of your party and fight automatically.
subbattlecommands.desc4: \fs[23]\c[4]#{yepinbattlestatus.commandtext}\c[0]: View detailed information about your characters, including any active \c[5]Status Effects\c[0].
subbattlecommands.desc5: \fs[23]\c[4]#{yepinbattlestatus.enemycommandtext}\c[0]: View detailed information about enemies, including any active \c[5]Status Effects\c[0].
subbattlecommands.desc6: \fs[23]\c[4]#{battletext.escape}\c[0]: Attempt to flee from the current battle. The success rate depends on the difference between your party’s total \c[11]#{termwords.agi} (AGI)\c[0] and that of the enemies.

basicparameters.desc1: <WordWrap>\fs[21]As the name suggests, \c[4]Basic Parameters\c[0] are the key stats that directly affect characters and enemies during battle. There are three types of \c[4]Basic Parameters\c[0]: Main Parameters, Ex-Parameters, and Sp-Parameters.
basicparameters.desc2: \fs[21]\c[6]Main Parameters\c[0]: These parameters affect the attacking and defensive capabilities of characters directly. Examples include \c[4]#{termwords.mhp} (MHP)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.mmp} (MMP)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.atk} (ATK)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.def} (DEF)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.mat} (MAT)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.mdf} (MDF)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.agi} (AGI)\c[0], and \c[4]#{termwords.luk} (LUK)\c[0].
basicparameters.desc3: \fs[21]\c[2]Ex-Parameters\c[0]: These are additional parameters that mostly impact a character’s attacking and defensive effectiveness, such as \c[4]#{termwords.hit} (HIT)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.eva} (EVA)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.cri} (CRI)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.critdmg} (CRIT DMG)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.cev} (CEV)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.mev} (MEV)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.mrf} (MRF)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.cnt} (CNT)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.hrg} (HRG)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.mrg} (MRG)\c[0], and \c[4]#{termwords.trg} (TRG)\c[0].
basicparameters.desc4: \fs[21]\c[3]Sp-Parameters\c[0]: These special parameters mostly influence defensive and survival capabilities, including \c[4]#{termwords.aggro} (AGG)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.grd} (GRD)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.rec} (REC)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.pha} (PHA)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.mcr} (MCR)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.tcr} (TCR)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.pdr} (PDR)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.mdr} (MDR)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.exr} (EXR)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.blkc} (BLKC)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.blkcm} (MBLKC)\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.blkr} (BLKR)\c[0], and \c[4]#{termwords.blkv} (BLKV)\c[0].
basicparameters.desc5: \fs[21]Different characters require a focus on different parameters to maximize their potential. Be sure to read carefully about their abilities, magic, and other characteristics to know which parameters they should prioritize.

statsallocation.desc1: <WordWrap>\fs[23]Each time a character levels up, they gain \c[4]06 JPs\c[0] (Job Points). These points are used to enhance your \c[4]Main Stats\c[0], which directly influence all your \c[4]Basic Parameters\c[0]. This is one of the primary ways to strengthen your characters.
statsallocation.desc2: \fs[23]There are five \c[4]Main Stats\c[0]: \c[17]Vitality\c[0], \c[2]Strength\c[0], \c[3]Dexterity\c[0], \c[9]Intelligence\c[0], and \c[27]Spirit\c[0]. To invest your JP into these \c[4]Main Stats\c[0], open your \c[4]Menu\c[0], then select \c[4]#{menu.statinvestment}\c[0]. In this menu, you can view your \c[3]Available JPs\c[0], \c[2]Spent JPs\c[0], the values and details of all \c[4]Main Stats\c[0], and the corresponding \c[4]Basic Parameters\c[0].
statsallocation.desc3: \fs[23]You can track changes in \c[4]Basic Parameters\c[0] in real-time as you assign JPs to the \c[4]Main Stats\c[0]. This allows you to determine which stats need investment for different characters.
statsallocation.desc4: \fs[23]Once you've invested JPs, the changes cannot be undone. However, you can reset the invested stats and reclaim your JPs to reassign them from the beginning. To do this, visit the \c[4]#{npcnames.statmaster}\c[0] in the \c[4]#{placenames.magicshop}s\c[0] or \c[4]#{placenames.church}es\c[0] located in major cities. Each reset costs \c[3]50\c[0] per \c[2]Spent JP\c[0] (\c[6]#{termwords.gold}\c[0]).
statsallocation.desc5: \fs[23]Occasionally, you can earn extra JPs through rewards from world activities or side quests, so be sure to use them wisely.

saviorcrystals.desc1: <WordWrap>\fs[23]Your progress can only be \c[4]Saved\c[0] by interacting with these crystals or during specific key moments. When needed, you can \c[4]Load\c[0] your saves to resume from that point. Additionally, they can activate the \c[4]Waypoint System\c[0], allowing you to travel between towns and cities in the blink of an eye. There are two types of \c[4]Savior Crystals\c[0]: \c[1]Blue Crystals\c[0] and \c[6]Yellow Crystals\c[0].
saviorcrystals.desc2: \c[1]Blue Crystals\c[0]: Used to \c[4]Save\c[0] your game or activate the \c[4]Waypoint System\c[0]. These can commonly be found in towns, cities, or sometimes in the wild.
saviorcrystals.desc3: \c[6]Yellow Crystals\c[0]: These not only allow you to \c[4]Save\c[0] but also come with a \c[4]Healing System\c[0], which fully restores your entire party. They are typically located in specific fields or dungeons.
saviorcrystals.desc4: For the \c[4]Waypoint System\c[0], it is only available through \c[1]Blue Crystals\c[0] in towns or cities. You must first interact with these crystals to register the locations. At certain key moments, the \c[4]Waypoint System\c[0] may be disabled.

tools.desc1: <WordWrap>\fs[23]\c[4]#{msxinventory.tools}\c[0] are special items that help you interact with certain objects in the environment. Sometimes, during your journey, you will need their assistance to continue, like when a boulder blocks your path, you might need a \c[4]\ii[28]\c[0] to break it. All \c[4]interactable objects\c[0] will display a \c[6]Yellow Exclamation Mark\c[0] (\c[6]!\c[0]) above them when you're nearby, indicating which objects can be interacted with.
tools.desc2: \fs[23]To use \c[4]#{msxinventory.tools}\c[0], you need to face or step on the \c[4]interactable objects\c[0], then look at the top-left corner of your screen. Your selected \c[4]#{msxinventory.tools}\c[0] will appear inside the \c[4]#{msxinventory.tools} button\c[0]. You can cycle through your \c[4]#{msxinventory.tools}\c[0] by pressing \c[4]Q\c[0] or \c[4]W\c[0], or simply use your \c[4]Mouse\c[0] to click the two arrows button. After selecting the correct \c[4]#{msxinventory.tools}\c[0], hit the \c[4]Alt\c[0] button, or click on the \c[4]#{msxinventory.tools}\c[0] itself with your \c[4]Mouse\c[0].
tools.desc3: \fs[23]Some objects do not require \c[4]#{msxinventory.tools}\c[0] to interact with, and you can interact with them directly. However, for objects that require \c[4]#{msxinventory.tools}\c[0], using the wrong tool will either do nothing or cause a penalty.

breakable.desc1: <WordWrap>\fs[23]Sometimes, you will obtain items that require disassembling to transform them into something more useful, especially when the disassembled items are \c[4]#{msxinventory.tools}\c[0]. These are called \c[4]#{msxinventory.breakable}\c[0]. Once acquired, they will be placed in the \c[4]#{msxinventory.tools}\c[0] category within your \c[4]#{menu.inventory}\c[0].
breakable.desc2: \fs[23]To disassemble the \c[4]#{msxinventory.breakable}\c[0], simply open your \c[4]Menu\c[0] and go to your \c[4]#{menu.inventory}\c[0], then \c[4]#{battletext.item}. Inside, you will find the \c[4]#{msxinventory.breakable}\c[0] category. All items in this category can be disassembled. Select the one you need and press \c[4]Z\c[0], \c[4]Space\c[0], or \c[4]Left Click\c[0] on it, then choose \c[4]#{yepitemdisassemble.disassemblecommand}\c[0]. Remember to use the \c[4]\ii[294]\c[0] to successfully disassemble it. Once completed, you will receive a new, useful item, ready for use.
breakable.desc3: \fs[23]Sometimes, other items not categorized as \c[4]#{msxinventory.breakable}\c[0] can still be disassembled, including some \c[4]#{msxinventory.keyitems}\c[0]. They may provide hidden rewards, so be sure to check and carefully read the descriptions of all items.

mold.desc1: <WordWrap>\fs[23]Crafted equipment with rarity from #{itemrarity.rare} or higher always requires a certain amount of special materials called \c[4]#{termwords.mold}\c[0]. These are obtained by disassembling equipment with #{itemrarity.advanced} rarity or higher.
mold.desc2: \fs[23]To obtain \c[4]#{termwords.mold}\c[0] from your equipment, head over to \c[4]#{menu.inventory}\c[0]. There, you will see categories of equipment such as \c[4]#{msxinventory.weapon}\c[0] and \c[4]#{msxinventory.armor}\c[0]. Disassembling either of these will produce the respective \c[4]#{termwords.mold}\c[0] types, such as weapons for weapon \c[4]#{termwords.mold}\c[0] and so on. Select an equipment, press \c[4]Z\c[0], \c[4]Space\c[0], or \c[4]Left Click\c[0] on it, then choose \c[4]#{yepitemdisassemble.disassemblecommand}\c[0]. Be sure to use \c[4]\ii[294]\c[0] for a successful disassembly. After the process, you will receive \c[4]#{termwords.mold}\c[0], ready to be used for crafting higher-rarity equipment.
mold.desc3: \fs[23]Remember that \c[4]#{termwords.mold}s\c[0] have different rarities, just like equipment. Disassembling equipment will produce a \c[4]#{termwords.mold}\c[0] with the same rarity, which can be used as material for crafting equipment one rarity higher. For example, an \c[3]#{itemrarity.advanced} #{termwords.mold}\c[0] will be used as crafting material for #{itemrarity.rare} equipment, and so on.

selfcrafting.desc1: <WordWrap>\fs[23]Sometimes, after collecting special materials in the wild, either by using \c[4]#{msxinventory.tools}\c[0] or simply picking them up, you may need to combine them into something new. This could be a new \c[4]#{msxinventory.tools}\c[0] or an item required to progress in the story. That’s where \c[4]Self-Crafting\c[0] comes into play.
selfcrafting.desc2: \fs[23]To use \c[4]Self-Crafting\c[0], head to the \c[4]Menu\c[0], then select \c[4]#{menu.craft}\c[0]. There, you’ll find a list of all craftable items. Select the item you want to craft and check whether you have the required materials. Once all conditions are met, press \c[4]Z\c[0], \c[4]Space\c[0], or \c[4]Left Click\c[0] to confirm. Don’t forget to check the quantity before crafting.
selfcrafting.desc3: \fs[23]It’s a good idea to check this feature regularly, as you may need to craft certain items throughout your journey to keep progressing.

equipmentcrafting.desc1: <WordWrap>\fs[22]In the world of Valkadia, the best way to obtain powerful gear is by crafting it. Crafted equipment grants significant bonuses to your \c[4]Basic Parameters\c[0], far exceeding what shop-bought equipment offers.
equipmentcrafting.desc2: \fs[22]Craftable equipment includes \c[4]Weapons\c[0], \c[4]Armor\c[0], \c[4]Shields\c[0], \c[4]Accessories\c[0], and even \c[4]#{termwords.reinforcementcrystals}\c[0]. These items come in various rarities, ranging from \c[3]#{itemrarity.advanced}\c[0], \c[9]#{itemrarity.rare}\c[0], \c[27]#{itemrarity.myth}\c[0], all the way up to \c[17]#{itemrarity.legend}\c[0]. As expected, the materials needed also vary. Some can be purchased from shops, while others must be gathered from monsters in the wild.
equipmentcrafting.desc3: \fs[22]You’ll need to learn equipment recipes before you can craft anything. New recipes are usually available at the \c[4]#{placenames.synthesisshop}\c[0] (or \c[4]#{placenames.magicshop}\c[0], \c[4]#{placenames.church}es\c[0] for \c[4]#{termwords.reinforcementcrystals}\c[0]) in every town or city, so be sure to visit those frequently.
equipmentcrafting.desc4: \fs[22]To craft, simply talk to a shopkeeper at a \c[4]#{placenames.synthesisshop}\c[0] (or \c[4]#{placenames.magicshop}\c[0], \c[4]#{placenames.church}es\c[0] for \c[4]#{termwords.reinforcementcrystals}\c[0]). They’ll show you a list of all recipes you’ve learned. Choose the equipment you want, and if you have the required materials, you can craft it by paying a certain cost.
equipmentcrafting.desc5: \fs[22]Note that some high-rarity equipment may require a lower-tier version as part of the crafting ingredients, so be sure to check all material requirements carefully.

skilllearning.desc1: <WordWrap>\fs[23]Each character has a unique set of skills. To learn new ones, visit the \c[4]#{npcnames.spellresearcher}\c[0] at \c[4]#{placenames.magicshop}s\c[0] or \c[4]#{placenames.church}es\c[0] in major cities. Different skills require different conditions, such as level, prerequisite skills, or cost. There are various types of skills: \c[4]#{termwords.magic}\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.ability}\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.aid}\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.passive}\c[0], and even \c[4]#{termwords.ultimate}\c[0].
skilllearning.desc2: \fs[23]Before undergoing \c[4]Potential Awakening\c[0], a character can learn up to \c[3]08\c[0] \c[4]standard skills\c[0], including \c[4]#{termwords.magic}\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.ability}\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.aid}\c[0], and \c[4]#{termwords.passive}\c[0]. Of those, only \c[3]03\c[0] can be \c[4]#{termwords.passive}\c[0]. There is no limit on the number of active skills within the total. \c[4]#{termwords.ultimate}\c[0] skills are separate, and you can learn up to \c[3]01\c[0] of them.
skilllearning.desc3: \fs[22]After \c[4]Potential Awakening\c[0], the limit increases to \c[3]16\c[0] \c[4]standard skills\c[0], with up to \c[3]05\c[0] being \c[4]#{termwords.passive}\c[0]. You can also learn up to \c[3]02\c[0] \c[4]#{termwords.ultimate}\c[0] skills. Additionally, a brand new set of skills will become available to you.
skilllearning.desc4: \fs[23]If you reach your skill limit, you can reset your learned skills by speaking with the \c[4]#{npcnames.skillmaster}\c[0] at any \c[4]#{placenames.magicshop}\c[0] or \c[4]#{placenames.church}\c[0] in major cities. The reset cost is \c[3]500\c[0] per \c[4]Standard Skill Learned\c[0], \c[3]2000\c[0] per \c[4]Ultimate Skill Learned\c[0], plus \c[3]100\c[0] per \c[4]Player’s Level\c[0] (\c[6]#{termwords.gold}\c[0]).
skilllearning.desc5: \fs[23]Sometimes, equipment may grant additional skills. These do not count toward your learned skill slots and will disappear once the equipment is unequipped.

reinforcementcrystals.desc1: <WordWrap>\fs[23]\c[4]#{termwords.reinforcementcrystals}\c[0] enhance your equipment by embedding special effects into it. There are three types: \c[2]#{termwords.offensivecrystal}\c[0], \c[4]#{termwords.defensivecrystal}\c[0], and \c[6]#{termwords.supportingcrystal}\c[0]. Crystals also vary in rarity, from #{itemrarity.normal} to \c[3]#{itemrarity.advanced}\c[0], \c[9]#{itemrarity.rare}\c[0], and beyond. The higher the rarity, the more effects it carries.
reinforcementcrystals.desc2: \fs[23]\c[2]#{termwords.offensivecrystal}\c[0]: Infuse weapons with attack-based effects, known as \c[2]Reinforcement Runes\c[0]. Only usable on weapons.
reinforcementcrystals.desc3: \fs[23]\c[4]#{termwords.defensivecrystal}\c[0]: Add defense-based effects called \c[4]Reinforcement Glyphs\c[0]. These are exclusive to armor.
reinforcementcrystals.desc4: \fs[23]\c[6]#{termwords.supportingcrystal}\c[0]: Provide support-type effects. These have no special classification and can be slotted into any gear freely.
reinforcementcrystals.desc5: \fs[23]To socket a \c[4]#{termwords.reinforcementcrystals}\c[0], open the \c[4]Menu\c[0], go to the \c[4]#{yepshopmenucore.equip}\c[0] section of a character, select \c[4]#{yepequipcustomize.customize}\c[0], then pick a piece of gear. You’ll see a list of compatible \c[4]#{termwords.reinforcementcrystals}\c[0]. Choose one to embed it.
reinforcementcrystals.desc6: \fs[23]You can freely attach or remove \c[4]#{termwords.reinforcementcrystals}\c[0]. To remove one, repeat the same steps, and then select \c[4]#{yepattachaugments.removeaugment}\c[0] from the list. This will detach the current crystal from the equipment.

ship.desc1: <WordWrap>Sometimes, you will need to cross the ocean to reach other lands. Since traveling on foot is impossible, you must sail using your own ship.
ship.desc2: To start sailing, find the #{npcnames.harbormaster} at the dock in certain towns or cities and speak to him. He will take you to your ship and allow you to begin sailing.
ship.desc3: While onboard, use the \c[3]Direction Keys\c[0] to control your ship. To dock at an island or shoreline, face the land and press \c[3]Space\c[0], \c[3]Z\c[0], or use your \c[3]Mouse\c[0]. After docking, you can return to your ship by facing it and pressing \c[3]Space\c[0], \c[3]Z\c[0], or using your \c[3]Mouse\c[0] again.
ship.desc4: To return to a town or city, locate the \c[2]Red Magic Circle\c[0]. Move your ship onto it, then press \c[3]Space\c[0], \c[3]Z\c[0], or use your \c[3]Mouse\c[0].

characters.title: Characters
characters.desc: <WordWrap>This section contains the background and profiles of all playable characters in the game. Select it to explore detailed sub-entries.

morrigan.desc6: \fs[23]\c[4]Morrigan Blackpearl\c[0] was born in \c[4]#{mapnames.valenkacity}\c[0] to a noble family. Her father, Merrick, was Commander of the Royal Knights, and her mother, Amelia, led the Royal Mages. But tragedy struck early, as her mother died in battle when \c[4]Morrigan\c[0] was only two, and her father, gravely wounded, retired and took her to live a quiet life in \c[4]#{mapnames.haravitown}\c[0].
morrigan.desc7: \fs[23]At 14, \c[4]Morrigan\c[0] began learning swordsmanship and quickly mastered her father's techniques within four years. Fiercely independent and driven by profit, she left home at 18 and moved to \c[4]#{mapnames.summerbreeze}\c[0]. There, she and her childhood friend \c[4]Lilith Harventon\c[0] founded \c[4]The Eclipse\c[0], a mercenary guild that handled everything from legal contracts to under-the-table jobs, so long as the pay was good.
morrigan.desc8: \fs[23]Though often cracking jokes in battle, \c[4]Morrigan\c[0] is a ruthless fighter at heart, feared for her skill and known for never hesitating to strike down an enemy.

lilith.desc6: \fs[21]\c[4]Lilith Harventon\c[0] was born in \c[4]#{mapnames.haravitown}\c[0]. At age four, she lost her parents in a mining accident and was raised by the local church orphanage. There, she met \c[4]Morrigan Blackpearl\c[0] during a morning prayer, and the two quickly became best friends.
lilith.desc7: \fs[21]Bright and kind, \c[4]Lilith\c[0] stood out among the children. At twelve, Father Albert and the nuns began teaching her healing and purification magic, which she mastered within five years.
lilith.desc8: \fs[21]However, at seventeen, she accidentally broke a sealed Void Crystal hidden beneath the church. The dark force within entered her, nearly killing her, but instead, it fused with her. Though still alive, she knew she could never become a nun.
lilith.desc9: \fs[21]In secret, \c[4]Lilith\c[0] trained to control this darkness, eventually blending it with her sacred magic to create a new form: Voodoo. Calling herself a \c[4]Voodoo Sorceress\c[0], she left \c[4]#{mapnames.haravitown}\c[0] with \c[4]Morrigan\c[0] to start a new life in \c[4]#{mapnames.summerbreeze}\c[0], forming a mercenary guild called \c[4]The Eclipse\c[0].
lilith.desc10: \fs[21]Though her magic tortures both body and mind, \c[4]Lilith\c[0]’s compassion remains. Unlike \c[4]Morrigan\c[0], she avoids killing unless absolutely necessary.

blanc.desc6: \fs[21]\c[4]Blanc Silverhawk\c[0] is one of the last known \c[4]Griffinians\c[0] in Valkadia. Her tribe once thrived across the \c[4]#{mapnames.sandstorm}\c[0] until human wars and conquest drove them into hiding. They retreated to \c[4]#{mapnames.whitehaven}\c[0], a hidden valley surrounded by deadly quicksand, where outsiders rarely dared to trespass.
blanc.desc7: \fs[21]\c[4]Blanc\c[0] and her younger sister, \c[4]Plati\c[0], enjoyed a peaceful childhood, sheltered from the human world. Though taught to avoid it, their curiosity proved stronger. At 16, \c[4]Blanc\c[0] used a secret path through the desert and fled with \c[4]Plati\c[0] to explore the outside world, only for tragedy to strike. \c[4]Plati\c[0] was kidnapped, and \c[4]Blanc\c[0], powerless to stop it, was left consumed by guilt.
blanc.desc8: \fs[21]Determined to make things right, she set off alone to find her sister. After three years of wandering, she hears whispers that Plati is enslaved by a tyrant in \c[4]#{mapnames.religiacity}\c[0]. Without hesitation, \c[4]Blanc\c[0] begins planning a daring rescue.
blanc.desc9: \fs[21]Gifted with the strength and instincts of her \c[4]Griffinian\c[0] bloodline, \c[4]Blanc\c[0] is quiet, decisive, and relentless. Yet her lack of experience with the human world remains her greatest weakness.

leonardo.desc6: \fs[23]\c[4]Leonardo Hargreave\c[0] is the only son of the \c[4]Hargreave\c[0] family, whose parents served as loyal disciples and guards to Commander Amelia Blackpearl in \c[4]#{mapnames.valenkacity}\c[0]. Raised close to the \c[4]Blackpearl\c[0] family, \c[4]Leonardo\c[0] was often cared for by Amelia herself. Seeing his magical potential, she tried to teach him her \c[4]Illusory Magic\c[0]. But the complex spells proved too difficult, and instead, \c[4]Leonardo\c[0] excelled in elemental magic. By age ten, he had mastered elemental control and developed his own unique spells.
leonardo.desc7: \fs[23]That same year, tragedy struck. His parents and Amelia were killed defending King \c[4]Cedric Wisebrook\c[0] during Merinberg’s final assault on \c[4]#{mapnames.valenkacity}\c[0]. Devastated and filled with rage, \c[4]Leonardo\c[0] abandoned his dream of justice. Taking up Amelia’s staff, he became a wanderer, driven by a single goal: to find the one who were resposible for his loved ones' deaths and make him pay.
leonardo.desc8: \fs[23]Cold and ruthless in battle, \c[4]Leonardo\c[0] shows no mercy to his enemies. Yet behind his hardened exterior lies a sharp mind and unwavering loyalty to the \c[4]Blackpearl\c[0] family.

aiko.desc6: \fs[22]\c[4]Aiko Kusuda\c[0], the once almighty \c[4]Goddess of the Sun\c[0] and \c[4]Watcher of Valkadia\c[0], was forced to reincarnate as a demigod in the world of Cindrivia to investigate the mysterious disappearance of her twin sister, Aina, \c[4]the Goddess of Night\c[0]. With the help of loyal allies, \c[4]Aiko\c[0] uncovered the truth and successfully rescued her sister from captivity, restoring balance to Cindrivia. However, they failed to stop a powerful evil entity, which escaped to the world of Valkadia.
aiko.desc7: \fs[22]Following the incident, the last fragment of the true \c[4]Goddess of the Sun\c[0] left \c[4]Aiko\c[0]’s body. Together with the \c[4]the Goddess of Night\c[0], this remnant opened a portal to Valkadia before vanishing into nothingness,leaving \c[4]Aiko\c[0] fully mortal. Despite losing the Goddess's soul, \c[4]Aiko\c[0] retained her divine demigod powers. Joined by her childhood friend, \c[4]Lucas Shadowrath\c[0], she entered Valkadia with a heavy burden: to hunt down the escaped entity and prevent further catastrophe.
aiko.desc8: \fs[22]Once a cheerful and carefree girl known for her playful antics, \c[4]Aiko\c[0] has grown into a wise and composed young woman, now embodying the grace and insight once held by the true \c[4]Goddess of the Sun\c[0].

lucas.desc6: \fs[20]\c[4]Lucas Shadowrath\c[0], son of the legendary treasure hunter \c[4]Jason Shadowrath\c[0], once pursued vengeance blindly against the demon who had slain his father. Together with his childhood friend, \c[4]Aiko Kusuda\c[0], \c[4]Lucas\c[0] set out across Cindrivia, meeting loyal allies who joined their cause. But everything changed after they became involved in the Goddess-rescue incident. There, \c[4]Lucas\c[0] discovered \c[4]Aiko\c[0]'s true identity and uncovered the deeper purpose behind the demon’s ruthless actions throughout the world.
lucas.desc7: \fs[20]Realizing that vengeance alone would lead nowhere, \c[4]Lucas\c[0] abandoned his personal grudge and chose to stand by \c[4]Aiko\c[0], fighting not for revenge, but for justice and the will of the former \c[4]Goddess of the Sun\c[0]. Their journey brought them to Valkadia, where they now pursue the escaped demon to prevent the destruction of the \c[4]Yggdrasil Tree\c[0], the heart of the nine worlds.
lucas.desc8: \fs[20]Once cold and consumed by hatred, but \c[4]Lucas\c[0] never acted without thought, guided by keen instincts as sharp as an eagle’s. Through years of traveling with \c[4]Aiko\c[0], her light slowly melted his hardened heart, allowing him to open up and grow. He has since laid down the title of \c[4]Treasure Hunter\c[0] and taken on a new one: \c[4]Shadow Chaser\c[0], a silent force who strikes fear into his enemies like a passing shadow.

leonardo.npc3: You were forced into an unwilling decision...
leonardo.npc5: I will show you what you truly desire, the purpose of your life... Now, open your eyes.
leonardo.npc6: You hesitated to kill him, only because you followed orders from above.
leonardo.npc7: Deep inside, it was not what you wanted.
leonardo.npc8: I'll give you a second chance, to make things right.
leonardo.npc9: Finish what you started. It’s what you truly want.
leonardo.npc10: Don’t hesitate. It's just you and him. No one else to command you.
leonardo.npc11: Step forward. Do what you want to do.
leonardo.leonardo6: No! I won’t listen to you!!
leonardo.leonardo7: Yes, I was forced into that decision.
leonardo.leonardo9: But Lady \n[1] is right! I have my own pride, and revenge like this... there’s no honor in it!
leonardo.leonardo10: You won't manipulate me! Not anymore!
leonardo.npc16: I am you, and you are me. We are one, \n[4].
leonardo.npc17: You can't deny the other side of yourself.
leonardo.npc18: You wasted your chance. Now you will pay.
leonardo.leonardo12: I should be the one saying that! I shall defeat you, once and for all!!!
leonardo.npc19: YoU wIlL NEvEr DeFEaT yOuR OWn DaRKnEsS!! NEVER!!!
leonardo.npc20: I HAVE NOT FINISHED YET!!! NOW YOU ARE DEAD!!!

blanc.npc5: Now, open your eyes... See your inner rage, your inner fear.
blanc.blanc7: Please... Stop it... I beg you...
blanc.npc7: Your hometown, your family... They’re gone...
blanc.npc8: And it’s all because of you!!
blanc.npc9: You broke the rules... Your defiance brought tragedy to your sister, to your family...
blanc.npc10: It was you who altered your people's fate, leading them to extinction!!!
blanc.npc12: You already know there’s no redemption for you.
blanc.npc13: You shouldn’t exist in this world anymore!!
blanc.npc14: Even your own sister denied you. You’re worthless, your existence is just nothingness!!!
blanc.npc15: You belong in this depth of the void... where you truly fit.
blanc.blanc12: Y-You are right... I am so useless...
blanc.npc16: Now come here, \n[3]. I will guide you to where you belong.
blanc.npc17: That's right, just one more step.
blanc.blanc13:
What about 
[12]...? I am still worried about her... And the others...? 
[1], 
[2], 
[4], 
[5] and 
[6]...?
blanc.npc18: You don’t need to worry about them anymore. In their eyes, you’re nothing.
blanc.npc19: Go, \n[3]. You don't need to suffer anymore.
blanc.blanc16: Even if \n[12] does not recognize me at this moment, we are still siblings. We are still family.
blanc.blanc17: Nothing can change that. Deep inside her heart, I still matter.
blanc.blanc18: And my friends... they’ll never abandon me. I trust them.
blanc.blanc19: All of them... they’re everything I have left!! I must protect them!!
blanc.blanc20: This World of Valkadia is where I belong!! My sister, my friends... You won’t take me to the void!!
blanc.npc20: Poor \n[3]. I gave you a generous choice, and you denied it.
blanc.npc21: Now I’ll drag you into the void by force. You won’t leave this place!!

lilith.npc2: You're drowning in your own sadness...
lilith.npc3: There's a dream inside you... one you'll never reach...
lilith.npc4: Your deepest desire... but it'll never come true...
lilith.lilith4: Stop messing with me and show yourself!
lilith.npc5: Open your eyes... see what you really want.
lilith.npc6: \n[2]. Why are you so late? We've been waiting forever.
lilith.lilith7: Dad? Mom? H-How is this possible...?
lilith.npc7: Come on, \n[2], sit down. It's dinner time.
lilith.npc8: She must be starving. Have a seat, \n[2]. I made your favorite bread.
lilith.npc9: That's my girl. It's been so long since we had dinner together, right?
lilith.npc10: What do you mean? We've always been here, sweetheart.
lilith.npc11: Eat up before it gets cold. You must be hungry. I made some tea too.
lilith.lilith10: I... I missed you both so much...
lilith.npc13: We missed you too, sweetie. It's been years, hasn't it?
lilith.npc14: Look at her, dear. Our little \n[2] has grown into such a beautiful young woman.
lilith.lilith11: Thank you, Dad... Mom... I'm so happy to see you again.
lilith.npc15: We're happy too, \n[2]. How have you been?
lilith.lilith12: I've been good. I've been traveling with \n[1], remember her?
lilith.npc16: Of course. That mischievous girl, full of energy. I'm glad you're still friends.
lilith.lilith13: She hasn't changed at all, Mom! And I've met new friends on my journey. They're all great people.
lilith.npc17: We're so happy to hear that. It sounds like you're really enjoying life, \n[2].
lilith.lilith15: I've dreamed of this moment for so long... There’s so much I want to tell you...
lilith.npc18: Don't worry, sweetheart. We're here now, always.
lilith.npc19: That's right, \n[2]. Stay here with us, tell us everything.
lilith.npc20: You don't need to go anywhere. We can be a family again, full of love and laughter.
lilith.lilith16: C-Can I really stay...? Be with you again...?
lilith.npc21: Why not? Leave everything behind, and we can be together forever, just like you've always dreamed.
lilith.npc22: No more worries, no more pain. Stay here with us... forever.
lilith.npc23: Finish your meal and rest, \n[2]. Tomorrow’s a new day for us all.
lilith.npc24: That's right, \n[2]. You look tired. Sleep now, tomorrow we'll celebrate being together again. AnD fOrEvEr...
lilith.lilith18: Leave everything behind...? What am I doing...?
lilith.lilith21: I can't... I can't leave everything behind!
lilith.lilith22: My friends... they need me. There's still so much we have to do. I can't rest yet.
lilith.lilith23: I'm sorry, Dad, Mom... This has been amazing, but I have to go.
lilith.npc26: This place was made for you... deep within the void...
lilith.lilith24: W-Who are you? Where are my parents!?
lilith.npc27: You rejected my offer... You'll see your parents soon enough...
lilith.lilith25: Y-You...!! How dare you toy with my emotions!!
lilith.npc28: Stay in the void with your unreachable dream, \n[2]...

morrigan.morrigan2: I don't remember getting drunk or anything...
morrigan.npc3: Your pride... it's something you hold dear, but you can't live on it alone...
morrigan.morrigan3: Hey! You're starting to annoy me!
morrigan.npc4: Open your eyes... A second chance is waiting for you...
morrigan.npc5: You once said your pride wouldn't let you kill a disabled man.
morrigan.npc6: Well, here he is. Barbarius Heimdall, in his prime, standing right before you.
morrigan.morrigan5: What the hell are you trying to say?
morrigan.npc7: You've spent years hunting him down. And now, just like that, you're willing to walk away?
morrigan.npc8: Isn't this what you wanted? You can finally take his life—fair and square. An eye for an eye.
morrigan.npc9: Step forward, \n[1]. Fight him! Kill him!! Just like you always dreamed of! Avenge your mother!!
morrigan.morrigan6: Let me make one thing clear. The thing I hate the most is people barking out orders for their own selfish reasons.
morrigan.morrigan7: I follow my heart and my mind. I do what's right because I choose to, not because someone else tells me to.
morrigan.morrigan8: Sure, I hated his guts more than anything, but now... I have bigger things to deal with.
morrigan.morrigan9: Besides, he's already suffering a fate worse than death. And I’m more than happy with that. He doesn’t deserve the easy way out.
morrigan.npc10: So, you're turning down my offer?
morrigan.morrigan10: Yeah. Screw that. I don’t need you telling me what to do.
morrigan.morrigan11: Oh, what’s this? Seeing yourself in me, huh?
morrigan.npc11: I gave you a life to take, and you refused. Now, I’m gonna take yours! You'll rot in the void forever!!

lucas.npc3: You miss the old days, don't you?
lucas.npc4: Open your eyes... See what you're really yearning for...
lucas.lucas4: What the hell is this place?
lucas.npc5: Don’t you want to see your real friends again?
lucas.npc6: The ones you truly care about. The ones you call family.
lucas.npc7: Now's your chance. You can see them again.
lucas.npc8: Step forward, \n[6]. Walk through this gate, and you’ll be surrounded by your real friends.
lucas.npc9: Leave everything behind. This world isn’t yours anyway. Their problems aren’t your concern.
lucas.npc10: You deserve better, after everything you’ve been through.
lucas.lucas6: Who do you think I am? This crap won’t work on me.
lucas.lucas7: And let me be clear. I’ve got responsibilities as an ambassador of justice. I’m not stopping until Ryan is taken down.
lucas.lucas8: Sure, I’ve got friends I cherish in Cindrivia, but here in Valkadia, these people matter to me too.
lucas.lucas9: Without them, I wouldn’t stand a chance in this war.
lucas.lucas10: So back off!! Before I tear this place apart!!
lucas.npc14: If words won’t reach you, I’ll drag you into the void myself.
lucas.npc15: Say goodbye, \n[6]. To all your friends!!

aiko.aiko2: This voice... It's so warm, so gentle.
aiko.aiko3: Y-You... You're the Goddess of the Sun, Emi...
aiko.npc3: Yes, my child. I have awaited your arrival.
aiko.aiko4: It is an honor to stand before you, my Goddess. How may I serve you?
aiko.npc4: You have shown unwavering devotion, a true disciple of the Goddesses, an ambassador of justice sent by the former Goddess of the Sun \n[5] herself.
aiko.npc5: Your faith burns bright, and the light within you shines like the Sun itself.
aiko.npc6: But what lies ahead is not like what you have faced. It is something far darker, something purely evil.
aiko.npc7: Your current strength cannot match his. It is a sad truth, but one you must accept.
aiko.aiko5: I understand, my Goddess. I learned that in my last encounter with him.
aiko.aiko6: But no matter what, I will not lose my faith. I will give everything, even my life, to defeat him.
aiko.npc8: Such courage... That is why I am here, to offer you my help.
aiko.npc9: The power of the Sun has not yet fully awakened within you. There is much more potential yet to be unlocked.
aiko.npc10: And with the blessing of the Moon Goddess Aina, your true strength shall be revealed.
aiko.npc11: But first, you must face yourself—your truest, most powerful self. Do you accept this challenge, \n[5]?
aiko.aiko7: Yes, my Goddess. I accept. I will do whatever it takes to vanquish the demon.
aiko.npc12: Then go, my child. May the Holy Light guide and protect you.

ev21.balthazar1: Doctor Niveus can be a little eccentric at times, so please don’t pay it too much mind. Brilliant scientists like him often tend to be that way.

ev21.npc1: Professor Balthazar's office is on the right side of this hallway. Please remember to stay quiet while in the academy. Thanks!

ev5.noti1: You can interact with the sign to get back to the ocean again.

ev4.albanus1: Kaoru is naturally talented, but he can be a bit hasty at times. That’s why he usually asks me to come by and help him with his experiments.

ev26p6.einhart1: Why are you still here? Take Plati here fast before it is too late.

ev1p2.noti1: Nothing to do in this place...

ev69to74.noti1: Better not wandering around without permission...

ev41.plati1: I want to learn more about this world. \n[11] and the nuns here are so good to me.

ev42.lydia1: Having White here is so fun! I wanna study and play with her all day!

ev48.einhart1: Please be hurry! We don't have much time!

ev48p5.einhart1: I will help Plati as much as possible, so don't worry.

ev48p8.einhart1: I will be here taking care of Plati. Just come if you need my assistance.

ev51.plati1: \n[11]... she’s my first friend... I don’t want anything bad to happen to her...

ev51p2.plati1: I missed \n[11] so much... I still can't believe it...

ev131to135.guard1: Halt! No trespassing! This is a restricted area!

ev11.npc1: Why don't you leave us alone, you fucking monsters...?
ev11.morrigan1: Look who is saying, you fucking scums.

ev535857.npc1: Get lost! No merchant card, no entry!

ev535857p3.npc1: You are still here? I said get lost!
ev535857p3.morrigan1: Open your damn eyes and see what this is.

ev3839a.npc1: Go. Get yourselves in. I don't wanna waste time with you anymore.

ev3839b.npc1: Get lost! No merchant card, no entry!

ev56.npc1: I'm waiting for my husband to come back. We have a cart of soil to be delivered into #{mapnames.valenkacity}...

ev56p2.npc1: Please be careful. The bandits are aggressive.

ev16.zephaniah1: Have you collected all the \c[4]Spirit Herbs\c[0] I required?
ev16.zephaniah2: Thank you very much. I will handle the rest.
ev16.zephaniah3: Looks like it is not enough. Please find the rest as fast as possible. And remember that the Shadow Fiend will appear near the well at night, so you'd better avoid it.
ev16.zephaniah4: Please do it fast, for the sake of your friend. And demember that the Shadow Fiend will appear near the well at night, so you'd better avoid it.

ev16p4.zephaniah1: You'd better find Einhart Sylvian as soon as possible before that demon Ryan starts something. She might have a solution for your problem. Good luck to you all.

ev16p5.zephaniah1: Hopefully Mother Einhart could help unleash \n[11]'s potential, and help protect her. I hope my suspicion about her was not true...

ev16p8.zephaniah1: I still can’t move on from losing \n[11]... I just hope that, in another life, she’ll have a better one...

ev17.lydia1: I will pray Goddess Yurika to protect you. Please stay safe!

ev5p3.lydia1: I'm glad that you are back in action, \n[1]. Listening to your story makes me want to become a warrior like you, so I will try my best from now on.

ev24p3.sister1: Father Zephaniah is waiting for you in his office.

ev24p4.sister1: Father Zephaniah is always worrying about \n[11]. He treats her like his own daughter.

ev24p5.sister1: I heard about what had happened... Poor little girl... Father Zephaniah must be so broken right now...

azurebeast.lilith1: I knew it! It’s an Azure Beast! Lydia, go find somewhere to hide!
azurebeast.morrigan1: Ha! I expected something bigger. This is hardly a challenge for me!
azurebeast.lilith2: Shut up, \n[1]! Focus! This isn’t the time for jokes!
azurebeast.morrigan2: Come on, lighten up \n[2]!! Why so serious?
azurebeast.lilith3: There’s a reason for it! Just focus and let’s take this thing down first!!

31blanc.morrigan1: I don’t know who you are, but you’re going to regret this. I’ll make sure you learn a lesson for getting in our way.
31blanc.morrigan2: Still not saying a word, huh? Fine! Let’s let the blades do the talking!

46sinister.morrigan1: And I smell a foul disgusting soul that makes me wanna puke.
46sinister.lilith1: So you’re the Wraith who killed our villagers...
46sinister.lilith2: Yeah, I’ve been waiting for this moment forever. Now I’m gonnna use your own power against you. This is for our villagers, and for my parents!!
46sinister.boss3: YOUR SOULS WILL BE GONE, JUST LIKE YOUR PEOPLE'S!!

57arcticwolf.morrigan1: By the way, what is your power?
57arcticwolf.morrigan2: Time Magic? So you can control the flow of time? That’s awesome!!
57arcticwolf.morrigan3: Great! This should be easy then! Once we send this beast to the Netherworld, I bet Queen Hel will make it one of her favorite pets!!
57arcticwolf.lucia3: Just focus and get ready, or you might end up down there yourself.

74firebird.blanc1: I-Is it a firebird...? This small...?
74firebird.lilith1: Don’t judge a book by its cover. I can feel it has some terrifying power.
74firebird.morrigan1: I’m ready for a roasted bird. Who’s with me?
74firebird.leonardo1: You really have a sense of humor, \n[1]... It's so different from your father... I just hope we’re not the ones getting roasted...

75lucas.lucas1: Come at me! Give me your best shot!
75lucas.aiko2: W-Wait, is that a Griffinian? Why are you fighting her?
75lucas.aiko3: Come on, dear! I don’t care what your reason is, just stop fighting her! Don’t make her think we’re her enemies!
75lucas.lucas5: Well, I guess our fun ends here.

76succubus.succubus1: The Divine Oracle, former Goddess of the Sun! You must have some serious guts to pull me out of that relic!!
76succubus.aiko1: This place has suffered enough!! Just leave it be!!
76succubus.succubus2: Hah! You’re too late, dear! I’ve consumed all the Griffinians' souls, and I can feel this enormous power inside me! How could you possibly stop me now?
76succubus.succubus3: Oh? There’s still a Griffinian alive? I didn’t think I left one behind. But it doesn’t matter. Your soul will soon be mine!
76succubus.morrigan1: Eating souls, huh? If you’ve got the guts, go ahead and try. But I can’t guarantee your safety.
76succubus.succubus4: Playing tough, are we? Oh dear, I like that! Should I make you my pet?
76succubus.morrigan2: If you can, but remember, I do bite. So you'd better be careful.
76succubus.succubus5: Very cute. I’ll keep that in mind. Now, let the party begin!!

77subjectm.lucia1: If you surrender now, I might consider sparing your life.
77subjectm.darklilith1: Shut the fuck up, bitch! You'll be the one lying on the floor soon!!
77subjectm.lucia2: Haha! I can’t wait to see that.
77subjectm.lilith1: You’ll be the one begging for mercy!! Just wait!!
77subjectm.lucia4: Hah! Just like Master said, all bark and no bite. Alright, Subject M. I think that’s enough.

94shadowfiend.aiko1: This is the real Shadow Fiend! Come on, \n[2], \n[3]! Get on your feet! We need to get out of here!
94shadowfiend.npc1: I KNOW YOU... THE ONES WHO SEALED ME IN THIS WELL... NOW I'M GONNA HAVE MY REVENGE!
94shadowfiend.lucas1: It’s too late to back down now! We have to find a way through this! Be ready, \n[5]!
94shadowfiend.notification1: \n[2] and \n[3] are currently paralyzed by the unholy power of the Shadow Fiend. This effect has a chance to skip their performed actions and lasts until the battle ends.
94shadowfiend.npc2: YOU... YOU CAN'T DEFEAT ME! YOU... ARE GOING... WITH ME!

140fencermoth.kaoru4: That’s what we’re about to discover!
140fencermoth.kaoru5: Relax! I’m just lending you a hand. Use them or don’t, totally up to you.
140fencermoth.morrigan4: Ugh...! We are not your lab rats!!
140fencermoth.kaoru6: Throwing them away would be such a waste... Try them! You won’t regret it.
140fencermoth.noti1: The mysterious woman tossed you a few unknown vials. They might help you... or do something else entirely.
140fencermoth.vialcyanmorrigan1: Oh! This one actually cures \c[2]#{generalstate.ailment}\c[0] states!

142subjectm.morrigan1: You’ll pay for everything you’ve done to my friends!!!
142subjectm.morrigan2: *huff... huff* How... how can his fighting style be so similar to mine?!
142subjectm.leonardo1: That’s what I warned you about before... He’s even stronger than he was last time.

ev11.morrigan1: Hmm... I guess I have found the place. \n[2] should be held captive somewhere around here. Geez... Can't believe that ship sank out there and they got captured...
ev11.morrigan3: Hey, fellas! Can I get in? Don't worry! I won’t stick around long!
ev11.guards1: Who are you? Get lost! This is a restricted area.
ev11.morrigan4: So I have to make my own way in, huh?
ev11.morrigan5: You should have known what you were capable of. Now just stay there for a while.
ev11.morrigan6: Back to the search for my dearest partner. Geez... If I had known this, I wouldn't have let her take that contract on her own. So messy...!
ev11.notification1: You have gained a level. For every level, you are granted +6 JP. By distributing JPs to five Main Stats (Vitality, Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, and Spirit), you can power up your characters. To do so, please go to your \c[4]Menu\c[0] and choose \c[4]#{menu.statinvestment}\c[0].

ev07.morrigan1: Here you are, \n[2]. I never expected to see you like this. How’s it in there? Comfortable?
ev07.lilith1: \n[1]? How did you get here? Where are the guards?
ev07.morrigan2: Sleeping out there right now. It’s not my fault, I swear! But forget about them. Let’s get you out of here.
ev07.morrigan3: Key? What key? It is unnecessary. Watch this!
ev07.lilith3: What...? Hey hey wait! You can't be that seri---\|\^
ev07.lilith4: Hey, \n[1]...! You were making too much noise! They will notice us!
ev07.morrigan4: Don't worry, they will not notic---\|\^
ev07.morrigan6: Well, it couldn’t be helped. Now look, \n[2]! We've got company! Wanna join the party?
ev07.lilith6: Only if you had listened to me...
ev07.morrigan7: Oh come on! Are you in or not?
ev07.morrigan8: Now we are done here. Let's get back to our HQ. We will talk about your contract there.

ev17.morrigan: Leave without \n[2]? So what am I supposed to be here?
ev17.notification: Be careful! The guards are looking for you.

ev11.morrigan1: #{placenames.magicshop}? There is nothing to do here at all.

ev15.morrigan1: Phew... They were insanely chasing after us... What the hell was wrong with them...?
ev15.lilith1: If I were them, I would do the same...
ev15.lilith2: You broke through their camp out of no where, took their prisoner, and you are asking what is wrong with them?
ev15.morrigan2: Well... I guess you have a point...
ev15.morrigan3: But more importantly, you’re safe now, \n[2]. I can't run The Eclipse without you. Let's get back to our HQ. We need to discuss something.
ev15.lilith3: Anyway, thanks for saving me, \n[1]. I owe you this time.
ev15.morrigan4: You sure do! I’ve already noted it down. Now come on!
ev15.notification2: Your party received 500 EXP for successfully breaking out of #{placenames.religiaarmycamp}.
ev15.notification: Enter \n[1]'s house and find the hidden HQ of The Eclipse.

ev17.morrigan1: So there you are! Why didn’t you wake me up...? I thought you’d left without me...
ev17.lilith1: I tried to wake you, but you were sleeping like a log! I had no choice but to leave you there, so I packed everything up, went for a walk, and have been waiting right here!
ev17.lilith2: Alright, now that you're ready, let’s hit up some shops. We should check our equipment heading out.
ev17.morrigan3: Right! So we just need to stop by the \c[4]#{placenames.synthesisshop}\c[0] and \c[4]#{placenames.itemshop}\c[0], right?
ev17.lilith3: Not exactly, but let’s go to those places first. Oh, and here, take some #{termwords.gold} I found on the pirate ship earlier.
ev17.notification: \c[2]#{placenames.synthesisshop}\c[0] is marked by this \i[3786] sign and the shop with \i[3787] sign is the \c[2]#{placenames.itemshop}\c[0].

ev20to22.morrigan1: Not really a good time to leave the town...

ev46to48.morrigan1: Better not getting back to #{mapnames.lostforest} for a while...

ev05.lilith1: Finally home. You have no idea how much I missed this place while I was stuck in the forest.
ev05.morrigan1: Honestly, I don’t even want to think about it. Now come on! Let’s get into our HQ. We don’t have all day.

ev08.morrigan: I gotta find out if \n[2] is still in the HQ first.

ev10.morrigan1: Oh... It's morning already. I feel so refreshed.
ev10.morrigan3: Okay... What am I missing here...?
ev10.morrigan4: She told me to meet up at 6 am sharp. Let's see what time it is now.\|.\|.\|
ev10.morrigan5: Oh... Just 7. Don't scare the shit out of me like that.
ev10.morrigan7: Goddamn it! I overslept again!!! Hopefully \n[2] hasn't left yet. Can't let her do this alone! I gotta find her fast!!

ev18.morrigan1: Welcome to my nest. Make yourselves at home.
ev18.morrigan2: Please, have a seat. I will prepare something for you.
ev18.lilith1: *You said we were heading to our HQ, right?*
ev18.morrigan3: *You want to reveal our secret HQ? They might be on our side now, but that doesn't mean we can trust them completely.*
ev18.blanc3: \c[14]\n[3]\c[0]: Eat a bit more, Plati... Here! You can have mine, too.
ev18.plati2: \c[14]White\c[0]: Thank you... But I'm White, not Plati...
ev18.blanc4: \c[14]\n[3]\c[0]: Doesn't change the fact you are my sister. I will protect you for life.
ev18.lilith2: *You are right... I feel sorry for them, but this is the best we can do.*
ev18.morrigan4: *We will let them rest until noon, then escort them to the Slave Liberation Organization. We have lost so much from the last contract, so we can’t afford to fail this time.*
ev18.morrigan5: *They mentioned wanting to go home. I believe in \n[3]. She is strong enough to protect her sister and get back home safely.*
ev18.lilith5: *Even though we just met them, I feel a strong bond. It’s sad to say goodbye so soon.*
ev18.morrigan7: *It can't be helped. We did what we could.*
ev18.lilith6: *But you said you would help her recover Plati's memories?*
ev18.morrigan7p1: *I said that doesn't mean I will... They want to go home, just let them.*
ev18.lilith7: *I... still want to help them though...*
ev18.morrigan7p2: *I know being kind is good, but not too much \n[2], or you’ll end up being exploited.*
ev18.blanc5: \n[1], \n[2]... Why don’t you come join us for breakfast...?
ev18.morrigan8: Thanks... but we’re still full. You two should rest after your meal, too. Feel free to use my beds.
ev18.blanc6: But where are you gonna rest...?
ev18.morrigan9: Don't worry about us. We have our own way.
ev18.morrigan11: Oh man...! I told you to skip the mushy stuff, right? I did this for the reward from the Slave Liberation Organization, so we still need to head to #{mapnames.seagullport}. And remember to grab a dress for Plati from my wardrobe.
ev18.lilith9: What are we going to do in the meantime?
ev18.morrigan12: I'm going to have a talk with Harley. If you are tired, go rest at the HQ. We still have a long way ahead.
ev18.lilith10: I'm okay. I will stay here then. Still need to keep an eye on them, right?
ev18.morrigan13: Okay. I will be back soon.

ev27.morrigan1: Oh! The sleeping beauties are finally awake. How do you feel now?
ev27.plati1: I’ve never had such a great meal and a comfortable sleep like this. Thank you...
ev27.morrigan2: Umm... White! Would you mind if I comb and braid your hair? You’re a girl, after all. You should look pretty, right?
ev27.morrigan3: *There’s really a scar... So that’s the reason...*
ev27.blanc2: What's wrong, \n[1]? Why did you stop...?
ev27.morrigan4: Oh... It’s nothing. The comb just got stuck. Alright, White, all done!
ev27.morrigan5: Okay, fellas! I guess it is time to head to #{mapnames.seagullport}. You ready?
ev27.lilith1: I was just waiting for you to come back.
ev27.lilith2: I hope the Religia Army has abandoned their post in #{mapnames.lostforest}. We need to get through that forest to reach #{mapnames.seagullport}. It’ll be a pain if we run into them again...
ev27.morrigan6: Don’t worry. Just steer clear of their post, and we’ll be fine.
ev27.morrigan7: And White, you can't dress like that.
ev27.morrigan8: This isn’t the time to look pretty. I’m sure Big Joe is looking for her right now. She needs to disguise herself.
ev27.morrigan9: Here, White. I’ve got something else for you. Change before we go.
ev27.morrigan10: Looks good! They’ll never recognize you. Now let’s move.
ev27.notification1: You can get to the \c[3]#{mapnames.lostforest}\c[0] by going East from \c[3]#{mapnames.summerbreeze}\c[0].

ev06.morrigan1: I told you I would bring her back in one piece. Now where is Harley?
ev06.eve2: Still there, Master. I guess she is preparing the papers you requested.
ev06.morrigan2: Good. I'm going to see her now. Thanks, Eve.

ev06p2.eve1: I really enjoy my work here. Cleaning things is the best way to entertain myself.

ev07.harley1: Oh! Here they are! You kept your promise, \n[1].
ev07.morrigan1: Harley, I hate to say this, but how many times do I have to tell you to take those ridiculous glasses off?
ev07.harley2: Ridiculous? They're cool! Look, it's the trend of modern thinking!!
ev07.morrigan2: Modern thinking, my ass... For Goddess Emi's sake, just take them off. Your fashion sense is terrible, Harley.
ev07.harley3: Oh, and you’re any better? You’ve got horrible taste in music, \n[1]! That weird song you’ve been playing at HQ? I’m sick of hearing it every day!!
ev07.morrigan3: Shut up, Harley! It’s a masterpiece, and people like you will never understand it.
ev07.lilith1: Oh my... Can you two stop already? This happens every day! You're acting like kids! How old are you two again? And do you remember what we’re supposed to be doing?
ev07.morrigan5: I will take them. Alright, \n[2], let’s head to the meeting room and discuss this.

ev07p2.harley1: Tell me if you need anything, \n[1]!

ev08.morrigan1: After what happened, I guess we should avoid signing contracts with pirates. Too risky.
ev08.lilith1: I told you to think carefully before signing that contract, but you didn’t listen. The pirates who hired us were wiped out by the Religia Royal Navy, and now we get nothing.
ev08.morrigan2: Well... those rewards they promised were just too tempting... Who would've thought it would end up like that?
ev08.lilith2: To be honest, I was tempted too. I saw the risks, but I didn’t expect the pirates to be wiped out so easily. Next time, let them deal with their own problems.
ev08.morrigan4: Anyway, we’ve got another good contract! This time, the risk is under control!
ev08.morrigan5: The Slave Liberation Organization. They need our help freeing a servant in #{mapnames.religiacity}.
ev08.lilith4: #{mapnames.religiacity}? Hold on! Don’t you think going there is a terrible idea? You think the Royal Army won’t recognize us after what you pulled in #{mapnames.lostforest}?
ev08.morrigan6: Oops...! Almost forgot about that. We’ll need a disguise.
ev08.harley1: Worry no more! I have got you covered!
ev08.harley2: Come on, \n[2]! Even a Voodoo Sorceress like you can’t figure it out? Take these bottles, and no one will remember who you are!
ev08.morrigan9: Amazing! We’ll forget each other too, huh?
ev08.harley3: Of course not! We’re immune. It’s our product! I’ve calculated everything!
ev08.lilith7: What are these, Harley? Let me see...
ev08.lilith8: Illusion Scent? Isn’t this a bit much...?
ev08.harley4: Don't worry, \n[2]. I said everything’s calculated. Just trust me!
ev08.morrigan10: Hey, are you sure this will work?
ev08.harley5: Trust it with my life. Is that okay, Master \n[1]?
ev08.lilith9: Okay. Looks like we don’t have a choice. We’ll use it.
ev08.harley6: Thanks, \n[2]! Working with you is ten times better than working with \n[1].
ev08.morrigan12: One more thing, Harley! Have you figured out the 'thing' beneath our HQ?
ev08.harley7: Now you mention it...! It is incredible, \n[1]! Even though I don’t have much info yet, I know it’s some kind of.\|.\|.\| relic, \|and not human-made. But I still can’t figure out how to open the door to get inside...
ev08.morrigan13: A relic, huh? Maybe we should leave it alone for now. Tell the others to stay away from it. And thanks for your hard work, Harley.
ev08.harley8: Oh! Am I dreaming? Master \n[1] thanked me? Oh my Goddess! I've gotta remember this forever!
ev08.morrigan14: Now get back to your nest!
ev08.morrigan15: Back to our contract. Here, take a look.
ev08.lilith11: Hmm... So they want us to free a servant named Plati Silverhawk in #{mapnames.religiacity}?
ev08.morrigan16: Yeah. She’s a Griffinian, currently the servant of a tyrant named 'Big Joe.' The Organization can’t do anything because of his ties to the Royal Family, who also supports the Servant Services.
ev08.lilith12: A Griffinian? Weren’t they supposed to be myths from #{mapnames.whitehaven}? I didn’t think they were real. So the Organization is hiring us for something...\| uhm...\| 'illegal'?
ev08.morrigan17: That’s what we’re good at! We’ll leave tomorrow morning, alright?
ev08.lilith13: I’m curious. I want to see a Griffinian in person. Alright, we’ll do it!
ev08.morrigan18: That's the spirit, \n[2]! For now, let’s rest. I bet you miss your bed after a day in the forest.
ev08.lilith14: Honestly, I do. See you tomorrow morning at 6, and SHARP, \n[1]!
ev08.notification1: You can now save your progress...

ev16.harley1: Overslept again, huh? You are late, \n[1]. \n[2] went out an hour ago. Good luck catching up!
ev16.harley2: Who knows? Didn’t you two discuss it last night? Maybe try going out and looking for her, \n[1]?
ev16.morrigan3: Yeah... Right. Asking you was a mistake.
ev16.harley3: Then don't expect my answer next time.

ev07p3.harley1: Huh? Why the long face? Did something bad happen?
ev07p3.morrigan2: Yeah... There is something I want to ask you.
ev07p3.harley2: Go beg me first. I thought you said asking me was your foolish decision?
ev07p3.morrigan3: Sorry... But this is not the time to joke around.
ev07p3.morrigan4: You remember the contract I have been working on?
ev07p3.harley4: Is it the contract from Slave Liberation Organization? You couldn't rescue the girl, huh?
ev07p3.morrigan5: We did rescue the girl, and also met her own sister there...
ev07p3.harley5: Her sister? So she interfered in your affairs?
ev07p3.morrigan6: Yeah... But that's not the problem. She’s on my side now because she wanted to rescue her sister too.
ev07p3.harley6: So what is the real trouble? And where are the siblings?
ev07p3.morrigan7: They are sleeping in my house. Harley, I want to ask you something about mental problem.
ev07p3.morrigan8: Not for me. It's for that Griffinian girl. She was kidnapped three years ago, and somehow she lost her memories. She can't even realize her own identity.
ev07p3.harley8: I see. So you want to find out the reason, huh?
ev07p3.harley9: Hard to tell, but did she get abused?
ev07p3.morrigan10: A lot, I think. I saw a big scar on her head.
ev07p3.harley10: That should be the problem. I guess she was hit in the head before, which damaged the memory zone in her brain.
ev07p3.morrigan11: Is there a way to recover her memories?
ev07p3.harley11: I'm sorry, but there is no way to do it.
ev07p3.harley13: Wait, \n[1]... You care about her that much?
ev07p3.harley14: Not really, but I can do some research about this. Maybe I will find out a solution in the near future.
ev07p3.morrigan15: Please do it, Harley. You are my last hope.
ev07p3.harley15: Well... I haven't got used to this kind of fancy words, but I will do. I want to help her, too.
ev07p3.morrigan16: Thank you, Harley. Please inform me when your research is done. I gotta get back to my house now.

ev36.morrigan1: Harley! What’s the situation right now?
ev36.harley1: Oh, you're back earlier than I expected. Hold on... Who's this lovely lady?
ev36.lilith1: This is \n[3] Silverhawk. She’s our newest member.
ev36.harley2: Ah, so \n[1]'s brought in some fresh blood, huh? Nice to meet you, \n[3]. I’m Harley Gardner. Hope we can get along.
ev36.morrigan2: That’s enough for introduction! How is the situation now?
ev36.harley3: Right, right. Got a report from our spies out at #{mapnames.sanguineocean}. Seven pirate ships are surrounding ours. The crew’s outnumbered, so they can’t fight back, but they’re holding on, defending the shipments, waiting for backup!
ev36.morrigan3: We will get there to make sure they can head back to #{mapnames.seagullport} safely. No way in hell are we letting those damn pirates get away with this! They messed with the wrong people!!
ev36.harley4: Take this pass, \n[1]. Without it, you’re not getting anywhere near the ship. Hand it to the #{npcnames.harbormaster} at #{mapnames.seagullport} and he’ll let you board. The ship’s already waiting on your orders.
ev36.harley5: Good luck. I’m sure the three of you are more than enough to show those bastards a lesson. Later, \n[2] and \n[3]!
ev36.notification1: You can use this secret passage as a shortcut to move to the #{mapnames.lostforest}.

ev37.blanc1: It’s been a whole day already...
ev37.lilith1: Harley, have you heard anything new from the rescue team?
ev37.harley1: Not really... but they said they’re expanding the search area. The pirate ship was sunk by that storm yesterday, too.
ev37.lilith2: That was a real shock... But I believe \n[1] is still alive. She’s not someone who dies that easily.
ev37.harley2: I hope so. She’s always been tough as nails.
ev37.lilith3: All we can do is wait for news from the rescue team and pray for \n[1]...
ev37.harley3: Oh! \n[2], there are some contracts waiting to be signed. With \n[1] gone, can you handle it?
ev37.lilith4: Refuse them all... I don’t want to sign anything right now.
ev37.lilith5: I think I should head to #{mapnames.seagullport} myself and check for any news on \n[1]. \n[3], could you help manage things here? Harley will guide you.
ev37.harley5: Can't blame her... \n[1] is like family to her. Of course she’s down right now.
ev37.blanc5: I feel the same... It hurts seeing someone you care about in so much pain...
ev37.blanc6: By the way, Harley, I think I should tell you something about \n[2]...
ev37.blanc7: Yeah... She... She killed the pirate captain who backstabbed \n[1]...
ev37.harley8: Killed? \n[2]? That’s not like her at all. She’s always telling us to show mercy, even to our enemies.
ev37.blanc8: It was terrifying. Her eyes turned red, and she killed that pirate without even blinking... There was this... emptiness in her eyes....
ev37.harley9: Something’s definitely wrong with \n[2]... I’ll look into what’s going on with her. Thanks for telling me, \n[3]. Keep an eye on her for me, alright?
ev37.harley10: For now, let’s handle the rest of the work here, \n[3]. Can you help me out?

ev38.lilith1: I still can’t believe it. How the hell did you manage to get back to #{mapnames.seagullport}?
ev38.morrigan1: I found help from a new friend named \n[13] Sceleratis. She used her magic to bring me back to #{mapnames.seagullport}.
ev38.morrigan2: When I came to, I found myself on the shore of a desert island called #{mapnames.whirlwind}.
ev38.morrigan3: Here’s where things got interesting. There was a temple there, called #{placenames.arctictemple}. I met \n[13] inside, and she was in some serious trouble.
ev38.lilith2: #{mapnames.whirlwind} and #{placenames.arctictemple}...? Harley, do we have any info on these places?
ev38.morrigan4: She barely had any magic left and was getting attacked by a giant arctic wolf. I stepped in, and together we took it down.
ev38.harley2: Wait, hold on! You said it was a desert island? Why was \n[13] there?
ev38.morrigan5: She said she went there on her own to destroy one of the five Relics.
ev38.morrigan6: I’m not sure, but according to \n[13], they’re draining the world’s life essence. She and her master are trying to destroy them all. That’s all the info I got.
ev38.lilith4: I wonder who built those Relics... and why their creator wanted to destroy the world in that way...
ev38.morrigan7: We don’t need to worry about all that. But if \n[13] needs our help, we’ll be there. I promised her that much before I left #{mapnames.whirlwind}. She might even visit our town soon.
ev38.lilith5: I still think we should do some research on the Relics and find out if they’re connected to the ‘thing’ beneath our HQ. Harley, can you handle that?
ev38.morrigan8: By the way, Harley. Any good contracts come in while I was gone?
ev38.lilith6: There were a few, but I refused them all.
ev38.morrigan9: Why...? You know how rare a good contract can be, \n[2]?
ev38.lilith7: I know, but I didn’t want to focus on anything but finding you. So...
ev38.morrigan10: Well, I get that. If I were you, I’d probably do the same. And sorry for making you guys worry.
ev38.blanc3: It's okay... At least you’re back safely...
ev38.morrigan11: So what’s our next move? No contracts left, right?
ev38.morrigan12: Any ideas on what we should do next, \n[2]?
ev38.lilith8: For the past two days, all I could think about was finding you. So I haven’t come up with a plan yet.
ev38.blanc4: Umm... can I make a request...?
ev38.blanc5: It's about my hometown... I have been away for over three years, so...
ev38.lilith9: So you want to go back? But what about Plati?
ev38.blanc6: That’s not what I meant... I just want to visit, see what’s changed while I’ve been away... and I want you and \n[1] to come with me. I think the Elder knows something about the Relics....
ev38.morrigan14: But isn’t #{mapnames.whitehaven} surrounded by deadly quicksand? Isn’t that supposed to keep outsiders out?
ev38.blanc7: There’s a way for humans to cross the quicksand, but it’s only a myth the Elder told me...
ev38.morrigan15: Hmm... Hard to believe a myth, but we don’t really have another choice. Tell us what you know, \n[3].
ev38.lilith10: The independent kingdom near the top of #{mapnames.merinmount}?
ev38.blanc9: Exactly... Our destination is the top of #{mapnames.merinmount}...
ev38.morrigan16: And what are we supposed to do there?
ev38.blanc10: According to the Elder’s myth, the top of #{mapnames.merinmount} used to be the nest of Phoenix, one of Goddess Emi’s pets...
ev38.blanc11: Its feathers are said to let you hover above the ground. If we get them...
ev38.lilith11: I get it! We’re after the Phoenix’s feathers, right? With those, we can cross the quicksand and make it to #{mapnames.whitehaven}.
ev38.blanc12: Yes... But remember, it’s still just a myth...
ev38.morrigan17: Myth or not, we don’t have any other leads. Might as well give it a shot, right?
ev38.morrigan18: Alright, our next target is Phoenix feathers from the top of #{mapnames.merinmount}. We’re heading out right now!
ev38.morrigan19: Harley, keep an eye on HQ while we’re gone. If you get a letter from \n[13], let me know. Are the messenger pigeons still in good shape?
ev38.morrigan20: Good. I’m counting on you, Harley. Don’t mess this up, okay?
ev38.harley7: You’re the one who always messes things up, \n[1].
ev38.morrigan21: That was in the past... just drop it already....
ev38.blanc14: But \n[1], don’t you want to rest? You just came back from the brink of death...
ev38.morrigan22: Rest is for the dead, and I'm still alive!!
ev38.lilith12: \n[3] has a point, \n[1]. I also think you should take it easy for now.
ev38.morrigan23: I know my limits. Besides, I can’t wait to see #{mapnames.whitehaven} with my own eyes!
ev38.lilith13: Alright... Just don’t push yourself too hard. I almost lost you once, and I won’t let it happen again.
ev38.blanc15: The way you two talk... it’s like a mother and daughter. Of course, \n[2] is the mom...
ev38.lilith14: W-What?! N-No way!! Cut it out, \n[3]...!
ev38.morrigan25: So, are we ready to leave?
ev38.morrigan26: So, we head south from #{mapnames.religiacity} to get to #{mapnames.sandstorm}, right?
ev38.notification1: You are now free to switch positions between your party members. Go to your \c[3]Menu\c[0] and choose \c[3]Party\c[0] to make change.
ev38.notification3: \c[3]Waypoint System\c[0] and \c[3]Reinforcement Crystals Crafting System\c[0] is now unlocked. To use Waypoint System, you can simply interact with the \c[1]Blue Crystals\c[0] in every town or city and choose your destination. Please keep in mind that you can only teleport to a place you have remembered.
ev38.notification4: To gain access to \c[3]Reinforcement Crystals Crafting System\c[0], simply interact with the \c[3]#{npcnames.gemmaker}\c[0] in every #{placenames.magicshop}. However, you need to collect \c[3]Crystal Recipes\c[0] and use them before crafting, or else you will see nothing to craft.
ev38.notification2: You can get to \c[3]#{mapnames.sandstorm}\c[0] by going south from \c[3]#{mapnames.religiacity}\c[0].

ev04.ricky1: Oh! Hi, \n[1] and \n[2]! What brings you here?
ev04.morrigan2: We’re about to head out for a new 'job,' so can you check over our equipment for us?
ev04.ricky2: Not a problem! Let me take a look!
ev04.ricky3: Everything still looks good. You can count on these. But if you want to play it safe, why not check out my shop for some new gear?
ev04.morrigan4: Thanks, Ricky. I’ll stop by when I need something. We’ve got to head out soon.

ev04.morrigan1: There is nothing to do here, \n[2]. Are you that free?
ev04.lilith1: Nothing? I know you're tough, but at least grab some potions, just in case.
ev04.morrigan2: Still feels odd... Alright, here goes!
ev04.tori1: Oh! \n[1]! It’s rare to see you around here.
ev04.morrigan4: Yeah. \n[2] practically dragged me over to grab some potions. Got any?
ev04.tori2: Of course! But are you two heading out somewhere?
ev04.morrigan5: Just some work we need to take care of.
ev04.tori3: Oh... I see. Well, here you go! Not just potions. I’ve got a little something extra for you!
ev04.notification2:
Received 5x \c[3]Red Potion\c[0] and 2x \c[3]Yggdrasil Leaves\c[0] as normal items.
Please check your inventory.
ev04.morrigan6: Yggdrasil Leaves too? Thanks, Tori! How much do I owe you?
ev04.tori4: Just take them as a gift! But promise me you'll drop by more often, okay? Good luck to both of you!
ev04.morrigan7: You got it! We’re heading out now!

summerbreeze3shops.morrigan1: Looks like we're all set! Ready to go, \n[2]?
summerbreeze3shops.lilith1: Not quite yet. Let's stop by the #{placenames.magicshop}. There's something there for you.
summerbreeze3shops.morrigan2: The #{placenames.magicshop}? Isn’t that the place run by those two new guys who just moved to town? What do you need there?
summerbreeze3shops.lilith2: It’s not just for me. You’ll need it too.
summerbreeze3shops.morrigan3: But I don’t have anything to do with magic!
summerbreeze3shops.notification: You can locate the #{placenames.magicshop} via its \i[3788] sign.

same2npcs.morrigan1: Looks like we’re all geared up. Ready to head out?
same2npcs.lilith1: Yeah, let’s get going. We still need to cross #{mapnames.sunlightriver} to reach #{mapnames.religiacity}.
same2npcs.morrigan2: About time! Let’s go kick some ass!

leavemagicshop.lilith1: Hey! Where do you think you’re going? We’re not done here yet!
leavemagicshop.morrigan1: Ugh... such a waste of time...
leavemagicshop.lilith2: This is for your own good! Just stay and do what I said!

ev39.morrigan1: I can’t wait to deal with that tyrant! I’m gonna teach him a lesson-\|-\|-\^
ev39.lilith2: I think someone’s crying, really close by.
ev39.morrigan3: Oh... Yeah, I hear it now. Sounds like it’s coming from #{mapnames.moonlightcave} to the north, but honestly, it’s not really our problem so-\|-\|-\^
ev39.morrigan4: Alright, alright... Let’s go check it out then.

ev39p2.lydia2: You... aren’t one of those Mountain Cats...
ev39p2.morrigan3: What...? What makes you think I’m a Mountain Cat? You’re the one who looks like a cat!
ev39p2.lilith1: Come on, \n[1]! Are you really gonna argue with a kid?
ev39p2.lydia3: I’m not a kid!! I’m 15 already!!
ev39p2.lilith2: So what is your name, uh... 'young lady'?
ev39p2.lydia5: People call me #{npcnames.lydiasanctus}, but just call me Lydia.
ev39p2.lilith3: Okay, Lydia. Why are you crying here?
ev39p2.lydia6: Oh...! I almost forget! The Mountain Cats!!! They took my stuff!! I need get it back!!
ev39p2.lilith4: Just calm down. Do you know where they went?
ev39p2.morrigan6: Oh, come on, \n[2]... Not again... Are you really gonna hel-\|-\|-\^
ev39p2.lilith6: Now tell us, Lydia. We’ll help you get your stuff back.
ev39p2.lydia7: Can you really get it back?
ev39p2.lilith7: Just tell us where they went!
ev39p2.lydia8: They went into the #{mapnames.moonlightcave}. I couldn’t chase after them because...
ev39p2.morrigan8: You’re scared of the dark, huh?
ev39p2.lilith8: I see. We’ll handle this for you. Can you wait for us in #{mapnames.summerbreeze}? You’ll be safe there.
ev39p2.morrigan9: Hah? You want to come with us? I thought you were scared of the dark?
ev39p2.lilith9: I get it. You don’t trust us yet, right? Alright, you can come with us, but stay close.
ev39p2.lilith10: It’s okay. If I were you, I’d feel the same way. Now come on. We don’t have all day.
ev39p2.lilith11: I'm \n[2] Harventon. And this is \n[1] Blackpearl. Nice to meet you, Lydia
ev39p2.lydia14: Thank you, \n[2], \n[1]! And nice to meet you, too!!
ev39p2.morrigan10: Enough with the introductions. Let’s make this quick. I’ve got another job to take care of, so you’d better not be a burden, Lydia.
ev39p2.notification: \n[11] has joined your party as a \c[3]GUEST\c[0]. She will follow you all the way, but she does not take part in any battles.

ev43.morrigan1: #{mapnames.moonlightcave}? No, thanks. I have nothing to do inside.

ev44.lilith1: You got your pouch back! So, what are you gonna do now, \n[11]?
ev44.lydia1: Well, I guess I’ll continue my adventure. Thanks again, \n[1] and \n[2].
ev44.morrigan1: Adventure? You? Oh my Goddess... You can’t be serious. Where’s your hometown? I bet your parents are worried sick about you.
ev44.lydia2: I... I don't have a family...
ev44.morrigan2: Okay... I’m really sorry to hear that. So, where do you live then?
ev44.lydia3: I live in an orphanage in #{mapnames.luviniacity}. I’ve never seen my parents...
ev44.morrigan3: Orphanage? So she’s kind of like you, \n[2].
ev44.lilith2: Not really... At least I lived with my parents for a while. She didn’t.
ev44.lilith3: Yeah. People in #{mapnames.haravitown} raised me until I was 18. Hey, \n[11]. Why don’t you head back to your town? I bet the folks at your orphanage are worried about you too.
ev44.lydia5: Maybe... but I can’t rely on them for the rest of my life. I’ve grown up enough to take care of myself. Plus, I want to make some money to help them...
ev44.morrigan4: Oh! That’s the spirit. You’re not just a kid, \n[11].
ev44.lydia6: I told you, I’m not a kid!!
ev44.lilith4: I’m glad to see you’re thinking positively, but if you want to help them, you should definitely go back to your orphanage. Your presence would mean a lot to them.
ev44.lilith5: Listen to me, \n[11]. I know how you feel. But you should also think about how they feel. Losing someone you care about hurts a lot. I lost my parents once, so I get it.
ev44.lilith6: I’m okay now. Will you head back home safely? Do you need us to escort you?
ev44.lydia9: Thanks, but I can manage on my own. I know you and \n[1] have things to do, so I won’t waste your time.
ev44.lilith7: Just promise me you’ll stay safe, okay? We’ll be there to check on you soon!
ev44.lydia10: I promise! So goodbye, \n[2], \n[1]! Once you get to my orphanage, you’ll get the warmest welcome!!
ev44.lilith9: I really hope she’ll be okay...
ev44.morrigan5: Don’t worry. She’s a tough little one. She’ll be just fine. Now can we get back to our job? It’s already noon.
ev44.lilith10: Yeah. It’s time to head to #{mapnames.religiacity}.

towardreligia45to47.lilith1: Hey! We have to deal with the problem here first!

ev21.morrigan1: Sometimes I wonder how the Mountain Cats can live in a dump like this.
ev21.lilith1: Well, you could always ask them.
ev21.morrigan2: I wish I could. Hey, \n[11]! Have you seen your stuff around here?
ev21.lydia1: Not here. They must be stashed somewhere deeper in this cave.
ev21.morrigan3: That’s the plan. Just stick close, \n[11]. I’m not responsible if you get lost.

ev18.lilith1: Shhh!! They’re sleeping. We can quietly grab your pouch and get out.
ev18.morrigan1: Hey, jerks!! Wake up and hand over that pouch!!
ev18.lilith2: What the fuck \n[1]...? Oh my Goddess...
ev18.morrigan2: What’s with that attitude? You wanna fight? Bring it on!
ev18.morrigan3: You should’ve just run instead of picking a fight.
ev18.lilith5: Hey, \n[1]! You said you wanted to get this done quickly, but you just wasted our time!!
ev18.morrigan4: Come on! We’re already in it! Go grab your pouch back, \n[11].
ev18.lydia4: I know! Thank you so much!
ev18.lydia5: My sweet lovely pouch! Now you’re saf---
ev18.lilith6: Something's off...!! Hurry and grab your pouch, \n[11]!!
ev18.lilith8: Calm down, \n[11]. It’s over. We’re safe now.
ev18.lilith9: \n[1]!!! Do you have anything else to say
ev18.morrigan7: Oh come on!! It is done already!
ev18.lilith10: To hell with that!! It would be one thing if it was just us! But WE HAVE A CHILD HERE, AND YOU JUST PUT HER LIFE IN DANGER!!
ev18.morrigan8: Okay, okay! It was my bad. I’m sorry... Let’s just get out of here.
ev18.lilith12: I warn you, \n[1]. Don’t let this happen again. Think a little before you act.

ev86.morrigan1: Harley was right. Our identities are still under wraps. This is gonna be an easy job.
ev86.lilith1: Of course. Our Illusion Scent is a powerful thing, and people can’t resist it. They can’t see through us now, but your mouth might be an issue, so keep it shut, \n[1].
ev86.morrigan2: Don't worry. I know what to do.
ev86.lilith2: Just make sure you don’t screw things up like you did in #{mapnames.moonlightcave}. Now, where do we start?
