ev86.morrigan3: According to the contract, Big Joe lives in a big mansion to the west of this city. Not too many guards there, so I think we should have no problem---.
ev86.lilith4: You really want to discuss our plan out in the open?
ev86.lilith5: True, but not like this. Come on! We need to find a private spot to talk.
ev86.morrigan6: How about the #{placenames.inn}? We can rest a bit while we go over the plan.
ev86.lilith6: Sounds good. I’m feeling a bit worn out after that fight in #{mapnames.moonlightcave}.

ev92westgate.morrigan1: Shouldn't pass through this gate yet. We still have work to do in the city.

ev98.morrigan1: Hah! Mission accomplished. They’ll never know what hit them.
ev98.lilith1: Not so fast. We can’t stick around in #{mapnames.religiacity} for long. Once Big Joe realizes White is missing, he’ll scour this city first.
ev98.morrigan2: Then let’s head back to our HQ first. We still need to get Pla... I mean White... something to eat.
ev98.lilith2: That sounds like the best plan for now.
ev98.morrigan3: Just keep quiet and follow us.
ev98.morrigan4: Come on, White! Time to find you something decent to eat. And remember to stay quiet.
ev98.morrigan5: *Geez... There’s no doubt they’re siblings. They even talk the same way... What a tragedy...*

ev41.morrigan1: Like I said, there are only a few guards around the mansion, so we can sneak in pretty easily. But I think we need more detailed info about the place.
ev41.lilith2: Hmm... You’re right. What we got from the contract is pretty sparse. Are you really going to ask the locals?
ev41.morrigan2: Come on, \n[2]! What’s the best way to gather information without asking people? I’m sure you know what I mean.
ev41.lilith3: Oh! I know the place you’re talking about! The #{placenames.tavern} is always the best spot to get what we need!
ev41.morrigan3: Exactly. We can just sit at a random table and wait for information to come to us. We might even find out exactly where that Griffinian girl is locked up.
ev41.lilith4: In theory, yes. But remember, reality is always different. If something goes sideways, you need to be ready.
ev41.morrigan4: You don’t have to worry about that. My blade is always ready.
ev41.lilith5: So, shall we head out now?
ev41.morrigan5: Not yet. There won't be many people there at noon. Better to wait until dusk. Just take a rest first, \n[2]. You said you were tired, right?
ev41.lilith6: Haha! When it comes to money-related jobs, you’re sharp, \n[1]. I hope you can always keep your mind this sharp.
ev41.morrigan6: That doesn’t sound like a compliment at all...
ev41.lilith7: Alright! Let’s get some rest then. We’ll hit the #{placenames.tavern} by 6 PM.

ev7.morrigan1: Just as expected, the #{placenames.tavern} is packed. Time to find us a seat.
ev7.bar2: Tell me if you need something else!
ev7.morrigan5: Now, \n[2]! It’s time. Don’t miss a single thing, okay?
ev7.adventurer2: Of course! Have you heard anything yet?
ev7.adventurer3: It’s about Big Joe. A landlord like you should have known this ages ago.
ev7.landlord3: Ah! You mean he’s putting his servant up for auction, huh?
ev7.adventurer4: So you know! Do you have a plan to buy her? I heard his servant is quite unique. They call her... um...
ev7.adventurer5: That’s right! A Griffinian. You can’t find her anywhere else.
ev7.landlord5: I want to buy her, but that fat Joe is greedy. I know she’ll cost a fortune.
ev7.adventurer6: So you’re passing on this opportunity? I know she might be overpriced, but many landlords and nobles are willing to spend a fortune to own her!
ev7.landlord6: No, thanks! I may be rich, but I spend my money wisely. However, I think I’ll go to the auction to watch. It’s still worth seeing a real Griffinian up close. So when does it start?
ev7.adventurer7: Tomorrow at 3 PM. You’d better get there early to find a good spot. He might charge a small entry fee, but he’ll also sell his other servants, so I think you should bring some #{termwords.gold}.
ev7.landlord7: Hmm... That’s interesting. I should go home to prepare.
ev7.adventurer8: I’ll be there too. Still need to buy a servant, though.
ev7.landlord8: I’m leaving now. See you there tomorrow then, son!
ev7.adventurer9: A servant... I’ve always dreamed of one! Okay! Time to get some money!
ev7.lilith3: Sure. Looks like we need to act before the auction starts.
ev7.bar3: Customer, we’re truly sorry for any inconvenience, but please calm down!
ev7.morrigan8: What was wrong with that little chick...?
ev7.lilith4: She looked quite angry. I wonder what happened.
ev7.morrigan9: Maybe her drink wasn’t what she expected. But never mind, we’d better get going too. We need to do this at midnight.
ev7.bar4: Thank you very much! Please come again soon!

ev13to17.notification2: Get yourself through the West Gate to enter Big Joe's mansion.

ev38.morrigan1: Thanks to the auction tomorrow, there’s a shitload of guards crawling around this residence. Big Joe must be aware of potential thieves.
ev38.morrigan3: We still have to sneak into the residence and find that Griffinian girl. Try to avoid trouble as much as possible, but we need to prepare for the worst.
ev38.lilith3: You mean we might have to fight if it comes to that?
ev38.morrigan4: In that case, we’d better make it quick. Now let’s go.
ev38.lilith4: But where exactly is our destination?
ev38.morrigan5: Oh... I haven't figured it out yet...
ev38.lilith5: Yeah, sure... Just like the ordinary \n[1].
ev38.morrigan6: Well... Let’s just approach the mansion first. That girl might be imprisoned inside. Come on, \n[2]. Time is short, and we can’t just stand here thinking any longer!
ev38.lilith6: Okay then. I’ll trust you this time.
ev38.notification1: In this place, running is disabled and you can only walk. Guards will notice your presence from a short distance and will chase you while you’re in their line of sight. If they catch you, you will be forced to fight them.

ev1.lilith1: Are you crazy? Even if it wasn't locked, you couldn't get inside through the front doors!
ev1.morrigan1: You are right. What about the windows?
ev1.lilith2: You really think he locked his front doors and left the windows open?
ev1.morrigan2: Geez... Guess we gotta find another way in, huh?
ev1.lilith3: I think I have found it.
ev1.lilith4: You see those small culvert doors? Hopefully, one of them can be opened.
ev1.morrigan4: You can't be that serious, \n[2]. That place is stinky as hell.
ev1.lilith5: No, I’m serious. Do you expect us to stay clean while doing this job?
ev1.morrigan5: But who knows if those doors will even open...
ev1.lilith6: Just give it a try. It won’t hurt, right?
ev1.morrigan6: Geez... Why not the windows...? Alright then.

ev25.lilith1: See? Now we can get inside the mansion this way. And it’s not as stinky as you thought, \n[1].
ev25.morrigan2: How could he forget to lock this entrance...? And this is the only one out of four.
ev25.lilith2: Come on! What are you waiting for? More guards might come, so get your ass inside now!

ev13.lilith1: It's not easy to find a way in like this so just stop bitching around.
ev13.morrigan2: So we’re going to follow this route, huh?
ev13.lilith2: I guess. Hopefully, there will be a way up soon.

ev18.morrigan1: Hey! Is that the angry little chick at the #{placenames.tavern}?
ev18.morrigan2: So you are the one who opened the culvert. What the fuck are you doing here?
ev18.blanc3: I should be the one asking... I heard what you two were talking about in the #{placenames.tavern}. I won't let you take the girl away.
ev18.lilith2: Hey! It's none of your business! Get out of our way! Or are you planning to take her? Because I won't allow that either!
ev18.morrigan4: Ah! So you’re also after the girl, huh?
ev18.morrigan5: I take that as your answer. So you won't move aside, right? Guess I’ll have to force you out.
ev18.morrigan7: Is that all you've got? So disappointing.
ev18.blanc5: Don’t you dare... touch... my sister...
ev18.morrigan8: Your sister? You think I would believe your words?
ev18.lilith3: That Griffinian girl named Plati is... your sister?
ev18.blanc6: So what...? She... has suffered... enough... Just let go... of her...
ev18.lilith4: Looks like there’s a misunderstanding here. Juju Balance!
ev18.morrigan9: Really, \n[2]? I know you are kind, but isn't it too easy to trust her?
ev18.lilith5: I’d rather not waste my strength on a fight we can avoid.
ev18.blanc8: You just beat the crap out of me, and now you’re helping me...?
ev18.lilith6: Like I said, there’s a misunderstanding here. But Plati is really your sister? So you’re a Griffinian too? What’s your name?
ev18.lilith7: Please trust us. We don’t mean any harm to her.
ev18.lilith8: We’re here to rescue her at the request of the Slave Liberation Organization.
ev18.morrigan10: *Sigh* I will let you handle it then. If the contract settles this, show it to her.
ev18.lilith9: Here is our contract with the organization, with the real mark on it.
ev18.blanc10: That’s the real mark from the Slave Liberation Organization... And this is actually my request to them... So you’re here to rescue Plati...
ev18.lilith10: You understand? Now, can you share your story with us?
ev18.blanc11: Name's \n[3] Silverhawk. Just call me \n[3]. Plati is my younger sister. We used to live peacefully in #{mapnames.whitehaven}, but because of my foolish decision, and...
ev18.lilith11: And now you’re here to rescue her, to fix what went wrong in the past?
ev18.blanc12: Yeah... It's been three years, and I’ve been looking for her since then. I’m not sure if I’ll be forgiven, but I have to bring her out of this place at all costs. She has suffered enough already...
ev18.blanc13: I tried to contact the Slave Liberation Organization before to ask for their assistance, but they said they couldn’t guarantee help... So I decided to rescue her on my own...
ev18.lilith12: I see... \n[3], why don’t you come with us then? We will help you bring your sister out.
ev18.morrigan11: I don’t care, but if you want to rescue your sister, you’d better get moving now. Don’t fall behind; I won't wait for you.
ev18.blanc14: Thank you... \n[2], \n[1]... And forgive me for my ignorance...
ev18.morrigan12: So have you figured out where your sister is?
ev18.blanc15: Should be behind that door... But we can’t reach it...
ev18.morrigan13: Great...! Now we have to find a way to get there again...
ev18.morrigan13b: Maybe we need something to create a bridge to connect these two banks.
ev18.lilith15: Take a look around this culvert. I believe we will find something useful.
ev18.blanc16: By the way, I found this here...
ev18.morrigan15: Oh! A \c[3]\ii[23]\c[0]. This should come in handy. Thank you, \n[3].
ev18.notification1: \c[3]\n[3] Silverhawk The Platinum Guardian\c[0] has joined your party.
ev18.notification2: Take a look around the culvert to find something which is able to help you reach the door on the other side.

ev14to15back.morrigan1: There is no turning back now...

commonevent202.morrigan1: That should do the trick. We can get to the other side now.
commonevent202.blanc1: I just hope Plati’s still safe over there...
commonevent202.lilith1: I’m sure she is, \n[3]. She’s probably waiting for you. Now come on, let’s move!

ev1.blanc1: It’s locked... Should we look for the key?
ev1.morrigan1: Nah, screw that. I’ve got a faster way to deal with it.
ev1.morrigan3: \n[2], sometimes it’s better to keep things simple. Now come on, it's open!

ev8.morrigan1: Ugh... can people even live in a place like this?
ev8.lilith1: Are you sure your sister’s here, \n[3]?
ev8.blanc1: Not really... but I’ve got a feeling...
ev8.pluto1: Wake up, White!! You’ve had enough rest!!
ev8.morrigan3: You sure? He called her White.
ev8.blanc3: It’s her! I’d recognize my sister anywhere!
ev8.pluto3: Get up! And don’t make me say it twice!
ev8.blanc4: I swear I’m gonna kill that bastard!!
ev8.lilith4: Stop, \n[3]!! Calm down! You want to save her, right? You don’t want to wake up the whole place, do you?
ev8.blanc5: Dammit...! So I just have to sit here and watch him hurt her...??
ev8.lilith5: I’m sorry, but you have to be patient, \n[3]. It’s for her sake, and ours.
ev8.pluto4: Here’s your meal for today. Eat up, and be ready to serve Master Joe this afternoon.
ev8.morrigan5: That’s food? Seriously, they can’t give her something that’s actually edible?
ev8.morrigan6: No, no, no...!! You can’t eat that!!
ev8.lilith6: The thug’s gone. This is our chance! Let’s go!

ev10.blanc2: Yes, it's me, your sister! I’ve been looking for you for three years... It’s time to go home, Plati...! I won’t let go of your hands this time!!
ev10.lilith1: Looks like it's all good now, right \n[1]?
ev10.morrigan1: We still gotta get her back to the Organization, or else we're not getting paid... again.
ev10.lilith2: Come on, \n[1]!! You just ruined the moment!
ev10.plati2: I’m... sorry, but... who are you?
ev10.blanc3: What...? You don’t recognize me, Plati...? I know it’s been a while, and maybe I look a little different, but it’s me! \n[3], your sister...!!
ev10.plati3: I’m sorry, I don’t know any \n[3]... And my name’s not Plati... People here call me White...
ev10.blanc4: Wh... What? You don’t remember me...? No... This can’t be happening.
ev10.morrigan2: Are you sure she’s your sister? I mean, yeah, she looks like her, but how do you know it’s really the Plati you’ve been searching for?
ev10.blanc5: Shut the fuck up, \n[1]!! Open your damn eyes! Only Griffinians have this special white skin!! Three years ago, it was just me and my sister sneaking out of our town!! She is Plati!!
ev10.morrigan3: Whoa, easy! I’m just saying... if she’s your sister, why doesn’t she remember you?
ev10.plati4: I... I don’t know what’s going on... I don’t want to disappoint you, but I think this is the first time we’ve met...
ev10.blanc7: No... no... This isn’t real... IT CAN'T BE HAPPENING...!!
ev10.morrigan4: If she’s really Plati, how could she forget you...? Unless...
ev10.blanc8: Unless what...? What do you two know...? Spit it out...!
ev10.blanc10: Come on, Plati... Look into my eyes. It’s me, \n[3]. You know me, right...? Right?
ev10.plati5: I said I don’t know you... and I don’t know who Plati is. You’re scaring me...
ev10.lilith5: Let me handle this. \n[1], take care of \n[3]. This is a huge shock for her.
ev10.morrigan5: Ugh... I’m not really great at this kind of thing, but... people always say 'everything’s gonna be okay', right, \n[3]?
ev10.lilith6: You said your name was White, right? Does the name Plati mean anything to you at all?
ev10.lilith7: What about your birthplace? Or do you know who you really are?
ev10.plati7: No... They told me I’m a Griffinian, and they named me White... I don’t even know what Griffinian means...
ev10.lilith8: Thank you, Pla... I mean, White.
ev10.lilith9: Bad news, everyone. She’s really lost her memories... and it’s for real.
ev10.morrigan6: Doesn’t matter. We need to get her out of here first. The sun’s coming up, and we can’t stay here any longer.
ev10.lilith10: You are right. Time to move.
ev10.lilith11: White! Listen to me. You might not know who we are, but we’re here to get you out, to free you from this hell. Please, come with us. We’re running out of time.
ev10.lilith12: Yes, you can! We’ve gone through hell just to get to you! Come with us, and you’ll be free!
ev10.plati9: But... if I get caught again, they’ll kill me...
ev10.lilith13: That’s why we’re here. Come on, White!
ev10.morrigan7: Let’s go! They’ll be down here soon. Move, \n[3]! Stop acting so dumb!
ev10.blanc11: What the fuck is wrong with you, \n[1]!!??
ev10.morrigan8: I should be asking you! What the hell is wrong with you, \n[3]? Where’s your spirit? Do you even want to save your sister???
ev10.morrigan9: Then move your ass! Or do you wanna sit here crying all day? I’ll figure out what happened to her, and I’ll find a way to get her memories back. But first, stand up and get out of here!!
ev10.morrigan10: No time for that! Let’s go!
ev10.notification1: You have to escape #{placenames.bigjoes} and get back to #{mapnames.religiacity} before 7 AM. A minute in real time is equal to an hour in game, this means you only have 4 minutes. Make it fast because if you fail to escape, your game will be over.

ev5.morrigan1: Ah...! Fresh air! I always feel so relaxed when I step into this place. Why the hell do they call it #{mapnames.lostforest}...?
ev5.morrigan2: I know, I know...! Let’s keep moving...
ev5.lilith2: That’s not what I meant. I wanted to ask if you’d like to visit our hometown after this. It’s nearby.
ev5.morrigan3: #{mapnames.haravitown}? Honestly, I don’t have much reason to go there right now, but if you’ve got business, sure.
ev5.morrigan4: Not exactly... My father told me I was born in #{mapnames.valenkacity}, but I don’t remember the place. By the time I became aware of things, we were already living in #{mapnames.haravitown}, so yeah, I’d call it my hometown.
ev5.plati1: So, your parents are in #{mapnames.haravitown}...? Why did they leave Valenka City?
ev5.morrigan5: My father was the Commander of the Valenka Royal Knights, and my mother was Commander of the Royal Mages. We could’ve had a peaceful life... if the Four-Kingdom War hadn’t happened.
ev5.morrigan6: #{mapnames.valenkacity} won, but it came at a huge cost. My father was badly injured, and my mother... she sacrificed herself to save the King. I was only one year old at the time.
ev5.morrigan7: My father couldn’t handle the grief, so after a year of treatment, he retired and took me to #{mapnames.haravitown}.
ev5.morrigan8: Haha! Don’t worry about it. I barely remember my mother anyway.
ev5.blanc3: Why didn’t you join the Valenka Royal Army like your father...?
ev5.morrigan9: I hate them... Sometimes I wonder why my mother had to sacrifice herself for the King. Does having a high rank mean your life is worth more than anyone else’s? Besides, I’ve got my own group now, where everyone’s equal. We live, work, and fight however we want.
ev5.morrigan10: Oh, sorry! I’m wasting time here. We still need to get to #{mapnames.seagullport}, right? Let’s go!

ev6.morrigan1: Oh! The salty smell of the ocean... It never gets old.
ev6.plati1: So this is the sea... It’s beautiful. I wish I could sail it one day...
ev6.morrigan2: Someday you will, but not today. The sea might look stunning, but it's dangerous too, right \n[2]?
ev6.lilith1: I’d rather not talk about it...
ev6.blanc1: Are we heading to the Organization...?
ev6.morrigan3: Ah! Sorry! Got a bit distracted by the ocean’s charm. Alright, let’s get moving to the Slave Liberation Organization!

ev29.morrigan1: Plati should be safe here for a bit. What's your plan now, \n[3]? Are you heading home?
ev29.blanc1: I’m not leaving without Plati... Actually, I have a request...
ev29.lilith1: What’s on your mind? We’re all ears. Don’t hold back.
ev29.blanc2: I’m not sure if you’ll accept it, but I think I need to tell you...
ev29.morrigan2: Just spit it out. You’ve got me curious now, \n[3].
ev29.blanc3: I heard you mention The Eclipse. Is that the group you're talking about? The one where everyone is equal and works freely?
ev29.morrigan3: That’s right. It's my own group that I formed. But what’s your angle?
ev29.blanc4: I... I want to join you, \n[1]...
ev29.lilith2: Are you serious, \n[3]? I thought you were planning to head back to train on your own?
ev29.blanc5: Before I met you two, I thought I was strong enough to protect Plati without any worries and that we could return home peacefully.
ev29.blanc6: But I was too confident... You opened my eyes to my shortcomings and showed me I was wrong...
ev29.blanc7: That’s why I think teaming up with you is the best way for me to get stronger...
ev29.lilith3: I see... What do you think, \n[1]?
ev29.morrigan4: Let me ask you one thing, \n[3]. Why do you want power?
ev29.blanc8: Being weak is a sin. I can't protect the things I care about if I'm weak... I made a mistake before, one I can’t forgive, and I don’t want to repeat it...
ev29.morrigan5: Okay. That's enough for me. Welcome to The Eclipse, \n[3]. You are one of us now.
ev29.lilith4: I hope we’ll get along well, \n[3].
ev29.blanc9: Thank you... I will do my best.
ev29.morrigan6: We still need to hold a ceremony at HQ to officially welcome you to The Eclipse. Until then, you’re on a trial basis. Do you accept that, \n[3]?
ev29.morrigan7: Great. For now, let’s head back to #{mapnames.haravitown}. I still need to send Ryland's regards to my old man. You’ve got some business there too, right \n[2]?
ev29.notification: You can go back to #{mapnames.lostforest} to find #{mapnames.haravitown}.

ev42.morrigan1: Here is the \c[3]Sailing Pass\c[0]. Can you please get me set to sail as quickly as possible?
ev42.npc1: Hmm... \n[1], huh? You seem pretty eager. I won’t hold you up. Your ship is ready and waiting. Bon voyage!
ev42.notification: Talk to the #{npcnames.harbormaster} again to set sail.

ev44.morrigan1: Wow! I’m back at #{mapnames.seagullport}. \n[13]'s magic is incredible!
ev44.lilith1: But it's been two days already!!
ev44.morrigan2: Huh...? \n[2]'s voice...? What is she doing here?
ev44.npc1: I know, but the rescue team hasn’t found any traces of your friend yet. You need to be patient!
ev44.lilith2: How can I be patient right now?! She’s my best friend, MY BEST FRIEND! Do you understand?!
ev44.morrigan3: Hey. What are you doing here?
ev44.lilith3: Get out!! I don’t have time to play!!
ev44.lilith4: Can you send out more rescue ships? I can pay extra! I have to find \n[1] at all costs!
ev44.npc2: I understand how you feel, but all our rescue ships are out. Even if you pay more, we have no ships left.
ev44.lilith5: I TOLD YOU I DON'T HAVE TIME TO PLAY!!!
ev44.lilith7: Wait a second...! Is that \n[1]'s voice...
ev44.morrigan7: Hi \n[2]! You look like a panda. Why don’t you go home and rest?
ev44.lilith8: I-Is this... real...? Y-You are... really \n[1]...? N-Not a s-spirit, right...?
ev44.morrigan8: Oh come on, \n[2]. Don't jinx it! Who’s a spirit here? I’m perfectly fine. Let’s head back to HQ. Everyone’s waiting, right?
ev44.lilith9: C-Can I touch you, \n[1]...? Just to make sure?
ev44.lilith10: I believe... I believe you’re our real and beloved \n[1]! It’s so good to see you alive! I thought I lost you...
ev44.morrigan10: Oh \n[2]! Didn’t I tell you not to jinx it? Now let’s go home! Don’t keep everyone waiting!
ev44.lilith11: I still wonder how you got back here...
ev44.morrigan11: It’s a long story. I’ll explain later. Come on! Let’s race to HQ!!
ev44.lilith12: Hey, \n[1]!! You are cheating!!! I wasn't ready!!!
ev44.npc3: Looks like I’ve been totally forgotten...

ev17.morrigan1: I guess you’re safe now, White. You can take off your hood and cloak.
ev17.morrigan2: Now, let’s talk to the receptionist. We need to confirm that you’re here with us. Please stay close, White.

ev7.morrigan1: My name is \n[1] Blackpearl. I represent The Eclipse Group, and here is our contract. We are here to inform the Organization that we have secured the safety of Plati Silverhawk. She is right here with us.
ev7.npc2: Ah! Miss \n[1] from The Eclipse Group. May I take a closer look at Plati?
ev7.morrigan2: Come on White. Just step up.
ev7.npc3: Looks like she is the real Plati Silverhawk. Pardon me to ask this, but why do you call her White?
ev7.morrigan3: Well... it’s a bit complicated. She lost her memories during her time in captivity.
ev7.morrigan4: So, I’ve completed our contract, and according to it, it’s time for my bounty, right?
ev7.npc5: Ah! That’s right. Please take this confirmation letter and speak to our boss on the second floor. I believe he’s waiting for you.

ev8p2.morrigan1: Excuse me! Where’s Ryland? We’re looking for him, and for Plati.
ev8p2.npc1: Ah, Miss \n[1]! I'm sorry, but Master Ryland left the city with Plati.
ev8p2.blanc1: What...?? Why would he take Plati out of the city...? What if Big Joe sees them...??
ev8p2.morrigan2: Calm down, \n[3]. Even if that happens, Ryland can handle it. Remember, I told you he used to be my father’s comrade.
ev8p2.morrigan3: I’m sure there’s a reason, and we’re going to find out. So take a breath and trust Ryland, okay? Honestly, the only one who could match him might be my father himself.
ev8p2.npc2: They set sail for #{mapnames.sanguineocean} yesterday and were headed to #{mapnames.shiroitown}. Oh, and Miss \n[1], Master Ryland asked me to give you this letter.
ev8p2.morrigan7: Ryland’s taken Plati to #{mapnames.shiroitown}. He says she needs to understand more about this world and learn how to stand on her own, instead of always being protected.
ev8p2.morrigan8: We can trust Ryland to keep her safe. I’m not worried about that, but...
ev8p2.morrigan9: They won’t be back for a whole week...
ev8p2.aiko1: That’s not good. We need to bring Plati back as soon as possible. A week is too long, and we don't have much time left!
ev8p2.morrigan10: I know. We’re heading to #{mapnames.shiroitown} now. We’ll find her and bring her back to Einhart.
ev8p2.morrigan11: If we set sail today, we should reach #{mapnames.shiroitown} quickly.
ev8p2.lilith1: In that case, I’ve got bad news... We can’t travel by ship.
ev8p2.lilith2: Remember the encounter with the pirates? Our ship hasn’t been fully repaired since then, and then the 'incident' happened with The Eclipse...
ev8p2.morrigan12: So you’re saying we can’t sail?
ev8p2.blanc7: So what do we do now...?
ev8p2.lucas1: Then we go on foot. We can reach #{mapnames.shiroitown} by cutting through #{mapnames.seishinwood}, east of #{mapnames.luviniacity}.
ev8p2.aiko2: And stay alert. That forest is the nest of demons.
ev8p2.morrigan14: Thanks for the update. We’re heading out.
ev8p2.npc3: Of course, Miss \n[1]. Good luck on your journey!

ev1.morrigan1: Ryland! My job's done, and I’m here for my bounty!
ev1.npc1: Ah! I've been waiting for you and \n[2]. I knew I was right to sign this contract with you two. You’ve never let me down.
ev1.morrigan2: Piece of cake! I was expecting something tougher, right \n[2]?
ev1.npc3: By the way, how’s your old man doing?
ev1.morrigan3: My old man? It’s been a while since I left #{mapnames.haravitown}, so I haven’t heard much. But I bet he’s doing alright. Have you seen him lately?
ev1.npc4: I wish! But I’ve been swamped. Honestly, I feel for him. That was a huge loss for Sir Merrick back then. You should check in on him; he might be feeling lonely without you.
ev1.morrigan4: I’ve got plans to head back, but first things first, my bounty.
ev1.npc5: You haven’t changed at all! Always chasing the gold. Here you go, 5000 #{termwords.gold}, just like I promised.
ev1.morrigan5: Thanks! I still can’t believe you left your Royal Knight gig in #{mapnames.valenkacity} to be the president of this place.
ev1.npc6: They offered me your father’s spot when he left, but I turned it down. After the mess during The Four-Kingdom War, I’d had enough. Plus, I’m getting too old for that nonsense.
ev1.npc7: Alright, I think we’re all set here! We’ll be in touch with her sister, \n[3] Silverhawk, who asked for our help. Plati, are you cool staying here with us until then? We’ll take good care of you.
ev1.npc8: Oh! So you’re with \n[1] too. Planning to take Plati home now?
ev1.plati1: By the way, I’m not Plati... I’m White...
ev1.npc9: Huh? White? What’s that about? You’re Plati Silverhawk, \n[3] Silverhawk’s younger sister, right?
ev1.plati2: And I don’t remember having a sister...
ev1.lilith1: Let me explain. Right now, she’s going by White, and she doesn’t remember anything about her past. She lost her memories while she was enslaved...
ev1.npc11: For real? That’s unbelievable... That Big Joe must be a monster. I wish I could teach him a lesson, but the Religia Royal Army has his back.
ev1.npc12: So, uh... Plati... I mean, White, what are you planning to do now? Are you coming home with \n[3]?
ev1.blanc3: That’s right, Plati... It’s over now. Let’s go home together!
ev1.plati3: I don’t remember having a home, so I can’t go with you, \n[3]...
ev1.blanc4: That’s true... Right now, you’re not really Plati...
ev1.lilith3: Sir Ryland, is it cool if White stays here for a bit?
ev1.npc13: Not a problem. We can take care of her.
ev1.blanc6: You want her to stay here...?
ev1.lilith4: Exactly. I’m sorry, but for now, she’s White, not Plati. And Big Joe is probably looking for her, so even if she agreed to go with you, it would be risky.
ev1.lilith5: She should stay here and let things settle down first. It’s for her own safety. You get that, \n[3]?
ev1.blanc8: Sir Ryland... Please help me take care of Plati. I’ll find a way to recover her lost memories and become stronger to protect her.
ev1.npc14: Don’t worry. We’ll keep an eye on her.
ev1.blanc9: Plati, I’ll do everything I can to help you remember. Until then, please stay here with the Organization. They’ll keep you safe while I’m not around.
ev1.plati4: I don’t really get what you’re saying, but okay... I don’t have anywhere else to go...
ev1.lilith6: Then it’s settled. Thanks for accepting her, Sir Ryland!
ev1.npc15: Haha! Don’t mention it. It’s our duty, after all.
ev1.morrigan7: Alright, we’re off now. See you later, Ryland.
ev1.npc16: If you’re heading back to #{mapnames.haravitown}, send my regards to your father!

ev20.morrigan2: Huh? Where the hell did he go?
ev20.morrigan3: Don’t tell me Big Joe found them and—
ev20.lilith1: I don’t think that’s the case. Slavery is banned in this city, so he wouldn’t dare.
ev20.lilith2: Besides, Ryland knows all about Big Joe. There’s no way he’d hand Plati over to him.
ev20.morrigan4: Then where on earth are they...?
ev20.lucas1: Seriously? There are two receptionists downstairs, and you’re just standing here guessing?

ev20.morrigan1: Yeah. A lot’s changed since I left, but it still feels like I’m stepping right back into my childhood memories.
ev20.morrigan2: Why the long face, \n[2]? I thought you were excited to come back here?
ev20.lilith1: Well... it’s nothing, really. I just have some important business to take care of, that’s all...
ev20.morrigan3: What kind of business? We can handle it together, right \n[3]?
ev20.lilith2: Thanks, but this is something I’ve got to deal with on my own.
ev20.morrigan4: What’s going on, \n[2]? Aren’t we friends? If something’s weighing on you, just tell us. We’ll figure it out together.
ev20.lilith3: Okay... I’ll tell you. It’s about Father Albert.
ev20.morrigan5: Father Albert? The one who raised you?
ev20.lilith4: Yeah... I got a letter from him before we started the contract in #{mapnames.religiacity}. He asked me to come back and meet him in person.
ev20.lilith5: I think it’s about my magic... my Voodoo Magic...
ev20.morrigan7: I thought you were taught how to use it?
ev20.lilith6: To be honest, I wasn’t... No priests teach this kind of magic. I stumbled upon it myself when I got lost in the forbidden library, and I never told him about it...
ev20.morrigan8: So he found out? But how?
ev20.lilith7: Beats me... but now I’ve got to meet him and clear things up. Like I said, it’s my problem, and I need to handle it alone.
ev20.morrigan9: I see. So you're heading to the #{placenames.church} now?
ev20.lilith8: Yeah. I don’t know if I’ll be punished for messing with forbidden magic, but don’t worry about me. I’ll be fine.
ev20.morrigan10: Alright. I’ll take \n[3] to my house in the meantime. Good luck, \n[2].
ev20.lilith9: Thanks. I will be back soon.

ev25.morrigan1: And where exactly do you think you're sneaking off to, \n[2]?
ev25.morrigan2: Hah! Who do you think I am? My father wasn’t home, so \n[3] and I went to the #{placenames.church} to find you. Heard almost everything.
ev25.morrigan3: Save your breath. This is my hometown, and I’m not letting anyone mess with it. It’d be pretty selfish if you didn’t let us tag along, right \n[3]?
ev25.blanc2: We are friends, right...? We've got your back.
ev25.lilith4: Alright, fine. I give up. Even if I kept refusing, you two wouldn’t listen anyway.
ev25.morrigan4: Exactly. Three’s always better than one. I don’t care how tough this monster is, it’s going down.
ev25.lilith5: Haha! Don't count your chickens before they hatch.
ev25.lilith6: Wait a sec... did you beat up that guard?
ev25.blanc3: He kept repeating the same nonsense and wouldn’t let us through. I got annoyed, so... I punched him in the face...
ev25.lilith7: Wow... you surprise me, \n[3]... Is it okay to just leave him there?
ev25.morrigan5: He’ll wake up soon. No need to worry.

ev32.lilith1: Why the rush, \n[1]? We could’ve stayed here for a few days. I thought you were eager to see your father?
ev32.morrigan1: Eager? Not really. Just need to pass Ryland’s regards. That can wait. There's something more urgent right now.
ev32.blanc1: You seem serious, \n[1]... What’s going on?
ev32.morrigan2: A letter from Harley. One of our carrier pigeons delivered it to me while we were waiting for you.
ev32.morrigan3: My right-hand in The Eclipse. I’ll introduce her to you later. For now, we need to get back to HQ.
ev32.morrigan4: Our ships are under attack by pirates in the #{mapnames.sanguineocean}. They're trying to hijack our shipments.
ev32.lilith3: You mean the ships we sent to buy supplies from #{mapnames.shiroitown}?
ev32.morrigan5: Exactly. They’re surrounded. We need to get there as soon as possible to rescue them.
ev32.morrigan6: And \n[3], I’m sorry, but the ceremony will have to wait until we deal with this.
ev32.blanc3: It’s fine... Looks like you’re diving into another mess. Can I help...?
ev32.morrigan7: Not only can you help, you're required to. Come on, let’s head back to HQ.
ev32.blanc4: The Eclipse HQ, right? This’ll be my first time there...
ev32.lilith4: You’ll love it. For now, just stick with us.

ev59.lilith1: Sorry to keep you waiting, Father.
ev59.father1: No worries. Is this her place, \n[2]?
ev59.lilith2: Yes, Father. She’s inside. Please, come in and make yourself at home.

ev66.lucas1: Feels just like the old times in Verde Village, huh?
ev66.aiko1: Yeah! I really wonder how everyone in Cindrivia is doing... Ethan, Chris, Emily, and Raphael... I miss them so much...
ev66.lucas2: Chieftain Riko, Chieftain Hanako, Grandmaster Linda, and Master Lacie... I wish I could see them again, especially at Ethan and Yurika's wedding. But it might be too late for that now...
ev66.aiko2: Do you think we’ll ever get a chance to come back...?
ev66.lucas3: Honestly? I don’t know... It’d be nice if there was a way...
ev66.aiko3: So, what do you think of our new friends here?
ev66.lucas4:
It's tough to say. They seem alright, but 
[1] and 
[2] are clever and confident, maybe a bit too much so. 
[3] is tough and brave but kind of naive. And 
[4] reminds me of Raphael, but he’s not exactly the sharpest tool in the shed.
ev66.lucas5: They still have a lot to learn...
ev66.aiko4: Do you think they’ll join us in the fight against Ryan?
ev66.lucas6: For now, Ryan’s also their enemy, so there’s a chance.
ev66.aiko5: It’s been years, but I still can’t wrap my head around the fact that I was once the Goddess of Sun...
ev66.lucas7: Yeah, it shocked me when I found out. Who would’ve thought a loud-mouthed, easy-going girl like you was the Goddess of Sun?
ev66.aiko6: That was the past! I’m so different now!! And you’ve changed too!!
ev66.lucas10: Just... thank you for always being by my side.
ev66.aiko8: I-It's... nothing... It’s just my responsibility... as your wife...
ev66.lucas11: When we get back to Cindrivia, we’re throwing a real wedding party. You’ll love it.
ev66.aiko9: Thank you, dear!! I love you so much!!
ev66.lucas12: Me too. Now let’s head back home. It’s already midnight.

ev13.npc1: It is good too see you again, \n[2]. It’s been a while since you left town, and you’ve really grown up. Now, let’s get straight to the point. Do you know why I called you back?
ev13.npc2: You’ve always been a clever girl, \n[2]. I’ll be waiting for you in the library. I want to hear your answers clearly.

ev13p3.lilith1: Yep, it’s done, Father. The blight force has been eliminated.
ev13p3.npc2:
I’m glad you have your friends with you, 
[2]. Without them, you could’ve ended up in a lot of trouble. Thank you for saving our town, 
[2], 
[1], and... uh... this young lady.
ev13p3.morrigan1: Sorry, Father. We didn’t introduce her. She’s a Griffinian from #{mapnames.whitehaven}. We met her while rescuing her sister in #{mapnames.religiacity}.
ev13p3.npc3: A Griffinian? Really? I thought they’d never leave their land.
ev13p3.blanc2: Something happened back home... I had to leave to take care of it...
ev13p3.npc4: I see. It’s an honor to have your help. Please make yourself at home while you’re here, \n[3].
ev13p3.npc5: But injuring the guard wasn’t the best move, was it?
ev13p3.lilith2: Father, now that the blight force is gone, what about the creatures living inside the #{placenames.coalmine}?
ev13p3.npc6: Without the blight force, they’re no threat. We should show some mercy. They’ve never left their habitat.
ev13p3.morrigan2: By the way, Father, have you seen my dad? He wasn’t home when I came back.
ev13p3.npc7: Sir Merrick? It’s been almost two months since he left town. Didn’t you hear?
ev13p3.morrigan3: Two months...? Shit... I haven’t heard anything about that. Do you know where he went?
ev13p3.npc8: No idea. And \n[1], how many times do I have to tell you to watch your mouth in this sacred place?
ev13p3.morrigan4: Sorry, Father... It’s just a habit, and you know how hard it is to break.
ev13p3.npc9: Why don’t you stay for a few days? There’s a chance you might see your father.
ev13p3.morrigan5: I think I’ll pass. Who knows when he’ll come back? Plus, I’ve got some work to handle, so I can’t stay too long.
ev13p3.npc10: Well, the choice is yours, \n[1]. I hope everything goes well. I’ll send you a letter if Merrick returns.
ev13p3.morrigan6: Thanks, Father. We’re heading out now. Please take care of our town.
ev13p3.npc11: I will. You all take care of yourselves too. May the Goddess of Sun be with you.

ev23.npc1: Now tell me, \n[2]. Were you the one who accidentally broke the Void Crystal and absorbed the Voodoo Energy three years ago?
ev23.lilith2: I’m sorry, Father. I was just too curious. When I touched it, it shattered, and that Voodoo Energy shot into me. I thought I was a goner, but somehow, I survived. Ever since then, that power has been part of me.
ev23.npc2: I don’t blame you for being curious; it’s one of your strengths. You were lucky to survive and even gain the Voodoo power. But have you considered the consequences of your careless actions back then?
ev23.lilith3: Consequences...? Sorry for my ignorance, but I thought it would only consume my spirit if I couldn’t handle the Voodoo power...
ev23.npc3: You’re partially right, but there’s more to it. Do you know why the Void Crystal was created?
ev23.lilith4: I never really thought about it...
ev23.npc4: Do you remember the #{placenames.coalmine} and the accident that happened there?
ev23.lilith5: How could I forget? It’s where my parents took their last breaths...
ev23.npc5: Exactly. After that accident, the #{placenames.coalmine} was closed for investigation, and I led that investigation.
ev23.npc6: I discovered that the mine was covered by an unknown blight force. To contain it, I sealed and isolated the mine to stop the blight from spreading into our town, but it wasn’t enough.
ev23.npc7: That’s why the Void Crystal was created, to absorb part of the blight force that leaked out.
ev23.lilith6: So... it was part of the seal? And I broke it...?
ev23.npc8: The seal hasn’t been fully broken, but it has been weakened. Since then, the blight force has been slowly spreading throughout the town. It’s too late to create a new Void Crystal now.
ev23.lilith7: I know it’s late to say this, but I’m truly sorry, Father. I’ll accept any punishment for my ignorance.
ev23.npc9: I’m not calling you back to punish you. I have a plan, and I need your help to eliminate the blight force once and for all because you’re the one who possesses the Voodoo power. Will you help me, \n[2]?
ev23.lilith8: I’m responsible for this mess, so I’ll do whatever it takes to make it right, Father. Just tell me what to do.
ev23.npc10: Thank you, \n[2]! Now come with me. We don’t have much time.

ev10.lilith1: Father, this place...? And what’s that thing...?
ev10.npc1: You remember this place, don’t you? That’s the Detection Crystal. It reacts when you get closer to the source of the blight force inside the #{placenames.coalmine}. I know the blight force is created by a terrifying monster, so once you locate the source, use this crystal to draw the monster out.
ev10.npc3: I really want to help you, but I’m too old for this. This mission is dangerous, so you need to be vigilant.
ev10.lilith2: Leave it to me, Father. I won’t disappoint you.
ev10.npc4: So I'm counting on you, \n[2]. And I know \n[1] is here too, right? You should definitely ask for her help. She’d be a great asset.
ev10.lilith3: But I don’t want her involved in my mess...
ev10.npc5: Well, the choice is yours. Just remember what true friendship means.
ev10.lilith4: I know, Father... If you’ll excuse, I’m heading out now.
ev10.npc6: I hope everything goes well. Meet me at the #{placenames.church} when you’re done. Good luck, \n[2].

ev26.morrigan1: So your \c[3]Detection Crystal\c[0] is the key to finding the monster?
ev26.lilith1: #{npcnames.father} Albert said the crystal will react when we get close to the energy source. So, we need to keep an eye out for its reaction. Once we locate the source, we break the crystal to draw out the monster.
ev26.blanc1: This means we're going to be doing a lot of walking...
ev26.lilith2: Yeah, unfortunately. We don’t have much choice.
ev26.morrigan2: But that’s not the biggest issue. The real problem is the other monsters lurking in this mine. I can feel their presence, so stay sharp.
ev26.blanc3: I’ll keep an eye on your backs...
ev26.blanc4: Since we're in a mine, shouldn’t we grab that \c[3]Pickaxe\c[0]...?
ev26.morrigan4: Now that you mention it, we definitely should. It could come in handy.
ev26.notification1: Explore the #{placenames.coalmine} to find the source of the blight force. As you get closer, your \c[3]Detection Crystal\c[0] will emit a sound like this:
ev26.notification3: When you’re getting even closer, the sound will change to this:
ev26.notification4: And when the energy source is right beneath your feet, you’ll hear this sound:
ev26.notification5: That’s the moment to break your \c[3]Detection Crystal\c[0] to attract the monster. Just cycle through your tools, select the \c[3]Detection Crystal\c[0], and activate it. Good luck!

ev52.blanc1: This is my first time facing a Wraith...
ev52.lilith1: We’ve avenged our villagers. Their souls, along with my parents’, are finally free.
ev52.blanc2: But \n[2], are you really okay with having that kind of power...? I don’t want to see you become a servant of darkness...
ev52.lilith2: Thank you, \n[3]. I can’t abandon this power; it’s been a part of me for years. As long as my faith remains strong, I won’t fall into darkness.
ev52.morrigan2: \n[3] has a point, \n[2]. I know your faith is strong, but nothing is certain in the future. If the worst happens, we’ll be there to pull you back from the darkness.
ev52.morrigan3: Now let’s get out of here. #{npcnames.father} should be waiting for us.

ev7.npc1: Welcome aboard, Captain \n[1]! We have been waiting for you.
ev7.morrigan1: Cut the pleasantries and get to work, Liam. Our allies are counting on us.
ev7.npc3: Alright, lads! You heard the Captain! Full sail ahead to #{mapnames.sanguineocean}!
ev7.blanc1: It’s my first time on a ship... I wish Plati were here to see the vast ocean...
ev7.lilith1: When she gets her memory back, we’ll sail together again. For now, let’s focus on our mission.
ev7.notification1: You are sailing to the sea on your own ship. To move your ship, simple use your \c[3]Direction Keys\c[0]. To dock your ship, face the land and press \c[3]Space\c[0], \c[3]Z\c[0] or use your \c[3]Mouse\c[0]. After docking, if you want to get back to your ship, face it and press \c[3]Space\c[0], \c[3]Z\c[0] or \c[3]Mouse\c[0] again.
ev7.notification2: If you want to get back to #{mapnames.seagullport}, simply move your ship over the red magic circle below.

ev7p3.morrigan2: Not good news. Eleven pirate ships are surrounding our cargo vessels.
ev7p3.lilith2: Really? I thought Harley said there were seven. Eleven just to take down our two? What the hell are they thinking?
ev7p3.blanc1: So, we’re going to fight them all...?
ev7p3.morrigan4: Looks like we have no other choice. Are you ready to engage?
ev7p3.morrigan5: Alright, everyone! Full speed ahead! We’re taking those pirates down!

ev15p5.npc1: Arrr!! Ye've come to the wrong haven, lads!! Abandon yer ships!!!
ev15p5.sailor1: Never! Come and get it, you filthy pirates!
ev15p5.npc2: T’is no time to play heroes. Charge!!!
ev15p5.sailor3: We’re good, Master \n[1]! Thanks for the reinforcement!!
ev15p5.morrigan3: Good! The way is clear now. Get yourselves back to #{mapnames.seagullport}. I’ll handle this mess for you.
ev15p5.npc4: Not so easy!!! Stop them, lads!!
ev15p5.morrigan4: Oh! I don't think so! Mortars! Fire!!
ev15p5.npc6: Ye will pay fer this!! Board thar ship, lads!!!
ev15p5.morrigan8: So, what now? Want to retreat? We have plenty of mercy to share.
ev15p5.npc7: Arrr! A true pirate ne'er runs from a battle!! I’ll scuttle ye fer what ye did!
ev15p5.morrigan9: It was you who started this, and this is what you get for messing with The Eclipse, you weaklings! Now I'm gonna end this!

ev29.morrigan1: I can’t believe they dare to board our ship. \n[2], \n[3]! Take care of the ship. I’m gonna deal with that scumbag myself!
ev29.morrigan2: No, you two need to look after the ship and the crew! I’ll be back soon.
ev29.blanc2: But three are better than one, right...?
ev29.morrigan3: Let me handle him! One-on-one. I’ll teach him a lesson he’ll never forget!
ev29.lilith2: \n[1], if you insist, then so be it. But please, be careful.
ev29.npc2: Yohoho! A brave cap’n! But ye'll regret this! Lads, scuttle her!
ev29.morrigan6: Your crews are gone. What are you gonna do now, 'Captain'?
ev29.npc4: Arrr! Ye be naught! I’ll scuttle ye meself!!
ev29.morrigan7: Now it’s over. This is what you get for messing with The Eclipse.
ev29.morrigan8: It’s done, guys! How about you?
ev29.lilith3: Phew...! I had a bad feeling about this, but now I can ease my mind. You did well, \n[1]!
ev29.morrigan9: Haha! Just a piece of cake! That pirate captain was no match for me. Let’s head home, guys!
ev29.blanc4: Why... is this happening...? She was joking, right...? \n[1] was joking, right...?
ev29.lilith6: Dammit!!! This is why I had a bad feeling!! \n[1], I’m coming to your aid!!
ev29.liam1: No, \n[2]!! The torrents will sweep you away!!
ev29.lilith7: Shut the fuck up, Liam!! You want to leave her there to die? I gotta save her, no matter what!!
ev29.liam2: Calm down, \n[2]!!! You’re losing your mind!! What are you gonna do after jumping down there!!??? You’ll be dead!!!
ev29.lilith8: So you think \n[1] is dead...!!??? If that’s what you’re saying, I’m gonna kill you!!
ev29.liam3: Please, calm down, \n[2]!!! This isn’t like you at all!!! Can you think twice about this...? I’m worried about \n[1], but we can’t do anything right now!! We’re in the middle of a storm!! I don’t want you risking your life, too!!
ev29.blanc5: What are we gonna do now, \n[2]...?
ev29.lilith10: Liam... is the ship still movable...?
ev29.liam4: It can still move, but not far... As you can see, our ship is heavily damaged, and we’re in the middle of a storm!! If we use it to look for \n[1], we won’t make it back to #{mapnames.seagullport}...
ev29.liam5: Let’s go back first. We’ll get some rescue ships out to look for her as fast as possible. It’s the best plan for now.
ev29.lilith12: Goddamn it...!!! Back to #{mapnames.seagullport}!! And double time!!
ev29.blanc6: \n[2]...? You didn’t have to do that... He’d be dead with his ship anyway...

ev10.morrigan3: Something’s off here... Where are \n[2] and \n[3]...?
ev10.morrigan5: I remember being on my ship... What actually happened to me...?
ev10.morrigan6: Shit...! Now I remember... I was backstabbed by that pirate captain and tossed into the sea... The tidal waves must’ve swept me here...
ev10.morrigan7: Now I just need to figure out how to get back home... \n[2] and \n[3] must be worried sick about me...
ev10.morrigan8: Geez... It’s freezing... This place looks like an island somewhere in #{mapnames.sanguineocean}...
ev10.morrigan9: Just standing here makes no sense. I’d better check this place out... Hope there’s something useful around here...

ev12.morrigan1: Woah...! What is this massive thing...? Looks like an ice cave...
ev12.morrigan2: I should check it out, especially since the gate's already open. There might be something inside that can help me get out of here.

ev12p3.lucia1: Now I'm gonna take you back to #{mapnames.seagullport}. You ready?
ev12p3.morrigan3: Wow...! This is the first time I’ve seen magic like this!
ev12p3.lucia3: Once you step into this portal, it’ll whisk you straight to #{mapnames.seagullport}, and then it’ll vanish.
ev12p3.morrigan4: But what about you, \n[13]? You're not leaving?
ev12p3.lucia4: This portal only takes you to #{mapnames.seagullport}. My destination is different.
ev12p3.morrigan7: Just wanted to thank you for your help. I can finally go home.
ev12p3.morrigan8: I can't repay your kindness right now, but please take this, \n[13]. If you ever need my help in the future, like searching for Relics, just find me, and my people will take care of it.
ev12p3.morrigan9: I hope we cross paths again, \n[13]. See you around!

ev16.lucia1: This is more than I expected...
ev16.lucia2: There's no choice. I have to defeat it to get my power back, or I'll never leave this place.
ev16.morrigan2: No time to doubt it. This is my only chance to escape.
ev16.morrigan3: It's not fair for you to take on that massive wolf alone. Let me help you!
ev16.lucia3: Who are you? What are you doing here? Get out of this temple, or you’ll end up dead!!
ev16.morrigan4: Don’t underestimate me, lady. I'm here to help because I want to leave this place, too!
ev16.lucia4: It’s not as easy as you think.
ev16.morrigan5: Then let me show you what I can do!
ev16.lucia5: Fine! Do what you want. I won’t be responsible for your death.
ev16.morrigan6: You’d better say that to the wolf! Here goes!
ev16.morrigan7: Phew...! It’s tougher than I thought, but still no match for us.
ev16.lucia7: Not a big deal... Just exhausted from using all my magical energy...
ev16.morrigan9: I heard you need to defeat that wolf to get your power back, right? It’s dead already, but your power hasn’t returned?
ev16.lucia8: It’s not the wolf that absorbed my energy. It’s that relic up there. Two-thirds of my magical power is sealed inside it.
ev16.morrigan10: Tell me how I can help you get your power back.
ev16.lucia9: I don’t even know you. Why do you want to help me so much?
ev16.morrigan11: I was thrown into the sea and washed up on this island. All I want is to leave and go home. My friends must be worried about me. You have a way to get us out of here, right?
ev16.lucia10: I do, but only with my full power. If you want to help me, take the shining crystal from that relic and break it into pieces.
ev16.morrigan12: Just a simple job like that?
ev16.lucia11: Yes, and I’ll handle the rest.

ev1.lucia1: Good. I’ll handle the rest from here. Just stay away from it.
ev1.morrigan3: Looks like your power’s been restored.
ev1.morrigan4: Hey, I don’t think I’ve caught your name yet. I’m \n[1], \n[1] Blackpearl.
ev1.morrigan5: But \n[13], why are you here? What is this place? And what’s that 'Relic' thing...?
ev1.lucia4: Why do you want to know?
ev1.morrigan6: Just curious, but if you don’t want to talk about it, I won’t push.
ev1.lucia5: This is the #{placenames.arctictemple} of #{mapnames.whirlwind}. I came here willingly to destroy that Relic for my master.
ev1.morrigan7: But what purpose does it serve?
ev1.lucia6: As far as I know, it’s slowly draining the life essence of this world. That’s why it needs to be destroyed, to prevent the world from collapsing.
ev1.lucia7: But it’s not easy to find all the Relics with just me and my master. This is only one of five. The others must be scattered across this world. I hope we can find and destroy them all before they erase everything.
ev1.lucia8: Let’s get out of here. This place is about to collapse.

ev11.morrigan1: Geez... Hot and dusty... Not exactly the best day to be here...
ev11.morrigan2: Hey \n[3]! What’s your town like? I’m kinda curious.
ev11.blanc1: It’s pretty small... and full of sand. It’s scorching during the day but freezing at night...
ev11.morrigan3: Wow... Doesn’t sound like a great place to live, at least for us humans...
ev11.blanc2: We’re used to it, so it’s not a problem for us...
ev11.lilith1: And this is definitely not the place for chit-chat! Do you really want to get buried alive in this sandstorm?
ev11.morrigan4: I’m just asking some questions... Why so harsh?
ev11.lilith2: You don’t feel the heat, huh?! We’re about to roast if we don’t move!
ev11.lilith4: Now come on, \n[1]! Move your ass!
ev11.morrigan6: What the...? Did you guys hear that?
ev11.lilith5: Loud and clear. Sounds like it’s coming from the cliffs to the west.
ev11.leonardo1: Stealing is bad. You could find a job to earn some cash.
ev11.npc2: Shut up!! This is our territory! Pay the entry fee or you’re dead!!
ev11.leonardo2: My Goddess... I guess we have no choice...
ev11.leonardo3: Here’s the money. Go find a real job and act like a real man.
ev11.morrigan9: What the hell...? Is he really that stupid? Why’d he just hand over his money like that?
ev11.lilith6: So what now, \n[1]? Are we going in?
ev11.morrigan10: Geez... Saving an idiot, huh...? Alright...
ev11.npc3: Captain! He’s still got his staff! Looks expensive!
ev11.npc5: Haha! This one’s the real prize. Now hand it over---
ev11.leonardo4: GET YOUR DIRTY HANDS OFF IT!! TAKE THE MONEY AND GET OUT OF MY SIGHT BEFORE I GET MAD!!
ev11.npc6: Haha! What are you gonna do? Hand it over before I kill you!!
ev11.leonardo5: I gave you a chance to walk away in one piece, but you blew it. Now you’re all gonna regret it!
ev11.npc7: Shut up! You’re dead! Kill him, boys!!
ev11.leonardo5p5: Thunder sprites, heed my call! Strike down upon these wicked souls with furious anger!
ev11.leonardo6: Worthless pieces of shit. What a waste of my time.
ev11.lilith7: Very impressive...! He must be a high-ranked wizard to control lightning like that.
ev11.leonardo7: Hmm? You’re not with the bandits, are you?
ev11.leonardo8: Curious about what’s happening here, huh?
ev11.morrigan12: Kinda. But we’re not here for that.
ev11.leonardo9: I figured. By your looks, you’re not just some pretty ladies passing through, right? So, what brings you here?
ev11.leonardo10: Got something to do in #{mapnames.merinberg}, huh?
ev11.leonardo12: Wait a second... You look familiar. Have we met before?
ev11.morrigan15: I don’t think so. You look kinda strange.
ev11.leonardo13: No, I’m serious. You look just like someone I knew. Mind telling me your name?
ev11.morrigan16: How about you start with telling me about yourself first?
ev11.leonardo14: Call me \n[4] Hargreave. I'm just a wanderer.
ev11.morrigan17:
[1]. 
[1] Blackpearl. And these are my friends, 
[2] Harventon and 
[3] Silverhawk.
ev11.leonardo16: \n[1] Blackpearl...? Y-You’re the daughter of Commander Merrick and Commander Amelia Blackpearl...?
ev11.morrigan19: That’s right... But why do you ask?
ev11.leonardo17: Lady \n[1], forgive my ignorance. I should’ve known...
ev11.morrigan20: Hey! Wait a second! What are you doing...? I said I didn’t know you...
ev11.blanc6: Wow... \n[1] is so awesome... Even an almighty wizard has to kneel before her...
ev11.morrigan21: I said I didn’t know this man... His brain must be fried...
ev11.morrigan22: Hey...! You’re \n[4], right...?Just stand up and explain what’s going on... You’re confusing me...
ev11.leonardo19: You look just like Commander Amelia, Lady \n[1]. The last time I saw you, you were just a little kid. That’s why you don’t remember me.
ev11.morrigan23: So who the hell are you? How do you know me and my parents?
ev11.leonardo20: My parents were Commander Amelia Blackpearl's bodyguards back in #{mapnames.valenkacity}. She treated me like her own. Even taught me her illusory magic, but I never could get the hang of it.
ev11.leonardo21: But when I was ten, the Four-Kingdom War threw everything into chaos. My parents... Commander Amelia... I’m sorry, Lady \n[1]. I couldn’t save her...
ev11.morrigan24: Enough. I’ve heard this from my dad already. No need to blame yourself. I know a ten-year-old kid couldn’t do much.
ev11.morrigan25: Long story short, you were my mother’s pupil, huh?
ev11.leonardo22: Yes, Lady \n[1]. Not long after the war ended, I heard that Commander Merrick had retired. I was trying to find him, but I couldn’t get any leads.
ev11.leonardo23: So how is Sir Merrick, Lady \n[1]? I really want to meet him.
ev11.morrigan26: He’s doing well, I guess. But I’m afraid you won’t meet him in person. He went out months ago and hasn’t come back.
ev11.morrigan27: But why are you here, \n[4]? Shouldn’t you be a Royal Mage of #{mapnames.valenkacity}?
ev11.leonardo25: You’re right, but I chose to wander instead. This way, I can sharpen my magic and track down the bastard responsible for my parents’ and Commander Amelia’s deaths.
ev11.leonardo26: That’s what I swore on their graves...
ev11.leonardo27: For over ten years, I’ve been hunting him down nonstop, and I finally found him! That’s why I’m headed to #{mapnames.merinberg}! To serve justice and make him pay for what he did!
ev11.morrigan30: We’re also on our way to #{mapnames.merinberg}, so \n[4], wanna join us?
ev11.morrigan31: Great. We’re heading to #{mapnames.merinberg} first. We need to get there before reaching the top anyway.
ev11.leonardo29: Your wish is my command, Lady \n[1].
ev11.blanc7: \n[4] is joining us...? That’ll be a huge help...
ev11.leonardo30: It’s my pleasure to team up with these pretty ladies. Just take care of me.
ev11.lilith10: Finally found a lead after so many years, huh...? What’s your plan once you get there, \n[1]?
ev11.morrigan32: Depends on the situation, but I still need to see 'him' with my own eyes first. Let’s go.
ev11.notification1: \c[3]\n[4] Hargreave The Natural Magus\c[0] has joined your party.

ev59.blanc1: I-It’s so high... My legs feel like jelly...
ev59.lilith1: But we finally made it. Welcome to #{mapnames.merinberg}!
ev59.morrigan2: First off, drop the 'Lady.' Just call me \n[1].And cut the formal crap. Enough of that.
ev59.leonardo2: As you wish, Lad- I mean, yes, \n[1]...!
ev59.morrigan3: We’ve come a long way. Let’s find a place to rest first. We’ll talk there, \n[4]. I’ve got a few questions for you.
ev59.blanc2: We’re going to the #{placenames.inn}, right...? I really need to rest...!
ev59.lilith2: Yeah, no place better than that.

3cityhalldoors.blanc1: It doesn’t look like we can get in...
3cityhalldoors.lilith1: We’ve got business with the President.
3cityhalldoors.leonardo1: Isn’t the President recruiting mercenaries to deal with the monsters on #{placenames.merinpeak}? We’re here for that.
3cityhalldoors.npc3: Yeah, that’s right. We need skilled mercenaries. These monsters have been terrorizing us for months. If you're serious, go inside and talk to the receptionist to sign up.
3cityhalldoors.leonardo3: *Saw it on the notice board outside. Lucky they’re still hiring.*
3cityhalldoors.lilith3: *Saved us a lot of hassle. Nice work, \n[4].*
3cityhalldoors.npc4: What are you waiting for? Scared of the monsters already? Go home if you can’t handle it.
3cityhalldoors.morrigan2: Let’s see who’s scared of who.

ev9.npc1: Halt! State your business, or leave at once!
ev9.morrigan1: We’ve got business with General Helena Winston. Here, take a look at this.
ev9.npc2: Alright, head inside and talk to the #{npcnames.recep}. She’ll notify General Winston for you. And don’t cause any trouble.

ev132.leonardo1: So that was her real face, acting like we were her underlings.
ev132.lilith1: But I think Crawforde is quite an elegant and reasonable person.
ev132.morrigan1: At least for now, but we can’t be sure. Anyway, it’s good that we can finally meet him in his own office. It gives us a solid chance to approach his father.
ev132.morrigan2: Don’t let your head get filled with hatred, or you’ll lose control, \n[4]. Like I said, we’ll decide what to do based on the situation there, got it?
ev132.morrigan3: Good. Now let’s move, or he’ll die waiting for us.

ev136.morrigan1: Alright, we’ve got the rainbow feather. Time to head to #{mapnames.whitehaven}.
ev136.blanc1: I can’t believe we’re finally going home... I’m so excited...!
ev136.lilith1: I’m really curious about how #{mapnames.whitehaven} looks.
ev136.leonardo1: Seriously? You’re asking what’s wrong...? The bastard who killed my parents is still alive over there! How am I supposed to face my parents when I see them...? Like, 'Dear, Mother and Father, I spared his life.' Yeah, right!
ev136.morrigan3: You really want to kill a disabled man that badly? Where’s your damn pride? Did your parents raise you to think like that? Or did my mom teach you to think that way?
ev136.morrigan4: \n[4], you really don’t get it, do you? Before I saw him, I was dead set on killing him to avenge my mom and your parents. But my pride wouldn’t let me take out a disabled guy like that.
ev136.morrigan5: And if you were him, would you want to 'live' like that? If you killed him, would you tell your parents 'Dear, Mother and Father, I killed a disabled man' when you see them? Do you think they’d be proud of that?
ev136.morrigan6: Just leave him be, \n[4]. I’m sure your parents wouldn’t want you to throw away your pride and do something dirty like that. Barbarius is already in a worse state than death.
ev136.leonardo3: You’re right. I get it now.
ev136.morrigan7: Glad to hear that. Now that everything here is sorted, what’s next for you, \n[4]? Back to your own journey?
ev136.leonardo4: My only goal is to find Barbarius and take my revenge. Now that this is over, I’ve got nothing else to do. Since I found you, I’ve decided on my next mission.
ev136.leonardo5: I owe so much to Commander Amelia and Sir Merrick, so I swore eternal loyalty to the Blackpearl family. From now on, I’m your bodyguard, Lady \n[1]. I’ll protect you for life, even if it costs me mine.
ev136.morrigan9: Wow, \n[4]...! Are you really serious about this?
ev136.morrigan10: Well, if that’s what you want, I guess I can’t say no. Welcome to the team, \n[4]!
ev136.blanc2: Yay..! We’ve got a new ally...
ev136.lilith2: From now on, we’re partners, \n[4]. Please look out for us.
ev136.leonardo7: You got it! Mister 'Handsome' \n[4] is always ready to help.
ev136.guard1: Emergency! The #{placenames.church} is under attack! We need reinforcements!
ev136.lilith4: Who the hell is attacking the #{placenames.church}...?
ev136.morrigan12: Honestly, I don’t give a damn about what happens here, but something’s pulling me to go check it out. You in?
ev136.leonardo9: I’m feeling it too. Let’s go see what’s up.

ev29.lilith1: Looks like \n[3] has burned out all her energy just getting here. She’s out cold.
ev29.morrigan1: Don’t wake her. Just let her sleep. She needs to recover to catch up with us.
ev29.morrigan2: Now, shall we get to the point?
ev29.leonardo1: Yeah, Lad... I mean \n[1]... I’ll answer every single question you’ve got.
ev29.morrigan3: You found the guy responsible for my mother’s death and your parents’, right? Who is he?
ev29.leonardo2: Barbarius Heimdall - the former Earl Marshal of the Merinberg Imperial Army. He’s the one who led the attack on Valenka Royal Castle.
ev29.lilith2: But wasn’t it the King of #{mapnames.merinberg} who approved that attack? Shouldn't he be the one held responsible?
ev29.leonardo3: They’re both responsible, but Barbarius was the one who directly took my parents’ lives and Commander Amelia's...!
ev29.leonardo4: Plus, the King of #{mapnames.merinberg}, Lawrence Heimdall, died seven years ago, which ended feudalism in this Kingdom. So now it’s just Barbarius left.
ev29.lilith3: So what’s your plan to get to him, \n[4]?
ev29.leonardo5: We’re going to abduct his son, Crawforde Heimdall - the President of this Kingdom.
ev29.lilith4: A-Are you serious? ABDUCTING THE PRESIDENT? No way, \n[4]! That’s a terrible idea! You’ll be up against the Merinberg Army, one of the deadliest forces in Valkadia. How do you plan to fight them? Even with all of us, it’s a lost cause!
ev29.morrigan4: \n[2] is right. We can’t do that. The risk isn’t worth it.
ev29.morrigan5: This is one of the reasons I formed The Eclipse. I’ve been searching for years, and now that opportunity is knocking, how can I just let it go?
ev29.lilith6: We’re with you, but not with that plan. We need something safer.
ev29.morrigan6: Where can we find the President?
ev29.leonardo9: The city hall, the largest building in the Kingdom. That’s where he lives and works. I believe we might find Barbarius there too. Any ideas?
ev29.morrigan7: Information is key. We haven’t pinpointed where Barbarius is, so if we can access the city hall, we should gather some intel. Plus, I want to meet the President in person.
ev29.leonardo10: Meet him in person...? Is that okay, \n[1]...?
ev29.lilith7: It’s all or nothing, but don’t sweat it. Gathering information is our specialty. We won’t blow our cover if we keep it low-key.
ev29.morrigan8: I’m sure he doesn’t know who we are, so this is the best way to approach him and his father.
ev29.leonardo11: I’m not sure I can stay calm when I see him and his father...
ev29.morrigan10: I know you hate Barbarius more than anything, but let’s be clear. Crawforde Heimdall isn’t to blame for this, so DO NOT hurt him. You have to keep it together, or our whole plan will fall apart.
ev29.morrigan11: Are you even listening to me?
ev29.blanc1: It’s too noisy... I can’t sleep anymore... What are you guys talking about...?
ev29.lilith8: Oh! Sorry, \n[3]. We didn’t mean to wake you.
ev29.blanc2: I just want to know what’s going on... You all look so serious again...
ev29.morrigan12: Just sit down. We’ll fill you in.
ev29.blanc4: So that’s the plan... But what will you do when you find Barbarius...?
ev29.leonardo15: Kill that son of a bitch!!
ev29.morrigan13: We’ll see. For now, we need to get to the city hall first. We need some information.
ev29.morrigan14: And \n[4], remember to keep yourself in check. Don’t mess this up, got it?

ev3.morrigan2: I heard that this kingdom is in trouble with monsters on the #{placenames.merinpeak}, so we are here for the recruitment.
ev3.npc2: Ah, yes! We’re looking for members for The Peacekeeper Squad, a team of four. You’re mercenaries, right? Mind giving me your names?
ev3.npc3:
Okay... Let me repeat those... So, Miss 
[1], Miss 
[2], Miss 
[3] and Mister... uh... 'Handsome' 
[4], right...? Give me a sec...
ev3.leonardo2: Oh, come on... I was just being honest...
ev3.npc4: I’ve got your names registered. But before we start, we need to test your skills to make sure you can handle this job. And just so you know, we aren’t responsible if anything goes wrong during the job. Once you complete it, you’ll get your rewards, and this contract will automatically lose its effect.
ev3.npc4p5: If you agree, please sign your names here.
ev3.npc5: Thanks. Take this paper to General Helena Winston at the #{placenames.militaryhq}. Your skills will be tested there.
ev3.lilith2: Pardon me, but I’ve heard the Merinberg Army is one of the best in the world. Why is the President still recruiting outside mercenaries for this? The army could handle it, right?
ev3.npc6: You’re right, but our army is busy defending the kingdom and dealing with nomads in #{mapnames.sandstorm}. We need to bring in mercenaries to help lighten the load.
ev3.npc8: Just remember to bring the contract to General Helena Winston at the #{placenames.militaryhq}. You’ll need the signature after the test to officially make the contract effective. Have a good day!
ev3.morrigan6: Got it. Thanks a lot. Have a good day!

ev40.npc1: Welcome back. The President's waiting for you in his office. You can head up to the second floor now. Just talk to one of the guards.

ev11.morrigan1: We were told to meet General Helena Winston. Here’s the paper.
ev11.npc2: Can you hang on a minute? General Helena Winston is a bit tied up right now.
ev11.helena1: What's going on, Celia? Is someone here to see me?
ev11.npc3: General! These young mercenaries are here to meet you. They want to join the Peacekeeper Squad.
ev11.helena2: It’s fine, Celia. Let me handle this.
ev11.helena3: Thanks for your interest in the Peacekeeper Squad. We’ve been looking for mercenaries like you.
ev11.morrigan3: I’m sorry... You look a lot younger than I expected...
ev11.helena4: Haha! No worries, I get that a lot.
ev11.morrigan4: We were told to come here to test our skills before joining the Peacekeeper Squad. We’re ready.
ev11.helena5: Right... There’s a test to see if you can handle this job, and it won’t be easy. Are you sure you want to go through with it?
ev11.helena6: Haha! I like your spirit. Just wait a moment.
ev11.helena8: Hehe! Can I borrow your Special Force for a bit? I have some mercenaries applying for my Peacekeeper Squad.
ev11.francis2: It's your idea; why not handle it yourself? You’re not a little girl anymore, right?
ev11.francis3: Alright, alright! Just for an hour, okay?
ev11.francis4: Forcing them to fight my Special Force to pass your test... You really think they’ll last more than five minutes...?
ev11.helena11: But it’s the best way to find good soldiers, Dad.
ev11.francis5: Hmm... I think you’re onto something. Go ahead and call them over.
ev11.lilith1: Did you hear that? Looks like we’re being underestimated.
ev11.leonardo1: Special Force, huh? I don’t care how skilled they are; they’ll regret it.
ev11.blanc1: I’ll punch them right in their faces...
ev11.morrigan6: Let’s show them what we’re made of.
ev11.helena13: This is Marshal Francis Winston, my father.
ev11.francis6: So, you’re the mercenaries Helena mentioned.
ev11.helena14: The test is simple. You’ll have a match against our Special Force. Win, and you pass. And don’t worry, I’ll tell them to---
ev11.morrigan8: Tell them to give us everything they’ve got.
ev11.helena15: What...? Are you serious? You won’t last a minute...
ev11.francis7: Hmm... This is getting interesting. I think I’ll stick around to watch. Helena, no need to go easy on them. Let the Special Force go all out.
ev11.morrigan10: Please do what he said, General. We’re going full force, too.
ev11.helena17: Alright. Just know I won’t take any responsibility if things go south.
ev11.morrigan11: You should say that to your soldiers.
ev11.helena18: Okay, soldiers! We have some mercenaries here who want to spar with you. Give them everything you’ve got, alright?
ev11.helena19: Now, get into the training area.
ev11.morrigan12: Is that it? That was barely five minutes.
ev11.francis8: H-How... is this possible...? W-What are you people...?
ev11.helena21: Wow...! This is way beyond what I expected. You’re quite strong warriors.
ev11.morrigan14: So we passed the test, right?
ev11.helena22: Absolutely! Welcome to my Peacekeeper Squad.
ev11.helena24: Just append my seal on their contract! They passed the test!
ev11.helena25: Do you need a break, or are we jumping straight into business?
ev11.helena26: Haha! I like your attitude! Alright, let’s get to work. Go grab your contract and meet me in my office on the second floor.
ev11.helena27: And Dad! Thanks for your help, and tell your soldiers I’m sorry for what just happened!
ev11.francis9: I still can’t believe it... These warriors might be something special...

ev11p2.npc1: I think General Helena was impressed. No one has passed her test before. Congratulations! Here’s your contract. You now have access to the second floor. Don’t keep her waiting.
ev11p2.leonardo1: *Hold on... Does this mean we’re actually working for them...?*
ev11p2.morrigan2: *We need to earn their trust first. That’s the safest way to approach our target. We might be able to take on some soldiers, but that doesn’t mean we can take on a whole army. Don’t forget that,\n[4].*

ev48.helena1: Don’t worry, Mr. Crawforde. I’m confident they’ll pull through. These aren’t just any mercenaries.
ev48.npc1: So these are the mercenaries you mentioned?
ev48.helena3: Yes, Mr. Crawforde. Guys, meet Mr. Crawforde Heimdall, President of #{mapnames.merinberg}.
ev48.helena4:
And Mr. Crawforde, these are 
[1] Blackpearl, 
[2] Harventon, 
[3] Silverhawk and Mister 'Handsome' 
[4] Hargreave.
ev48.npc2: Pleasure to meet you all. Thanks for accepting our request. I hope you enjoy your time here in #{mapnames.merinberg}.
ev48.morrigan2: The pleasure’s all ours, Mr. Crawforde.
ev48.helena5: So, how did the job go? I bet you crushed it, huh?
ev48.morrigan3: You’re spot on. We did it.
ev48.helena6: I knew it! I had faith in you. What about the rainbow feathers? Did you find any?
ev48.npc3: You REALLY found a rainbow feather?
ev48.helena7: Wow! You guys are impressive. Since Mr. Crawforde’s here, could you hand it over---
ev48.morrigan6: I said I’m not giving it to you. What’s in it for me?
ev48.helena9: You were hired to do a job and get paid! This is part of it!!!
ev48.morrigan7: We don’t need your rewards. Our contract is done. This rainbow feather is ours.
ev48.helena11: I actually like you guys, but ignoring orders isn’t cool! Hand over the rainbow feather, or I’ll take it by force!!
ev48.morrigan8: How ridiculous! We’re not your soldiers!! We’re not obligated to follow your orders!!
ev48.helena12: You’re in the territory of #{mapnames.merinberg}, and you have to obey our rules and laws!!
ev48.npc4: Helena, sheathe your sword. Don’t be rude to our guests.
ev48.helena13: But Mr. Crawforde... They have the rainbow feather you wanted!!
ev48.npc5: I know. And they’re right, Helena. They’re not your soldiers to boss around. What you’re doing makes you look like a thug. Let me talk to our friends here.
ev48.helena15: Mr. Crawforde!! Be careful!! Don’t get too close to them!!
ev48.npc6: It’s okay, Helena. I don’t feel threatened by these folks. They’re not here to hurt us.
ev48.npc7: I’m sorry for our rudeness, my friends. I understand why you can’t hand over the rainbow feather. If I were in your shoes, I’d do the same.
ev48.morrigan10: The rainbow feather is what we’re after too. I get that it’s important, so I’m not just handing it over without knowing your story.
ev48.npc8: You want to know what’s behind my request, right? I don’t think this is the right place to discuss that. How about a personal invitation to my office?
ev48.helena16: Mr. Crawforde!! Are you serious?? We don’t know these people!! You can’t just trust them like that!!
ev48.npc9: I know what I’m doing, Helena. Look at you. Your old-school thinking just drives a wedge between you and our citizens, and that’s why I can’t stand the feudal system we used to have! I want to get closer to my citizens, understand their feelings, and raise this city to a whole new level. That’s what being President is about.
ev48.npc10: I want to get closer to my citizens, to understand their feelings, and to raise this city to a whole new level. That's the responsibility of being a President.
ev48.npc11: Now, could you please let me handle this, General Helena?
ev48.npc12: Sorry for the interruption. Now, where were we...? Ah, right. Would you accept my humble invitation, my friends?
ev48.npc13: I’ll be waiting for you, my friends.
ev48.helena18: You’re lucky today. If it weren’t for Mr. Crawforde, you’d all be dead already. Now get lost! You’re not welcome here anymore.

ev16.helena1: Ah! You made it. Have a seat.
ev16.helena2: I was really impressed with what you did back there. Honestly, I thought my father's #{npcnames.specialforce} would wipe the floor with you, but it turned out the opposite happened in less than five minutes.
ev16.morrigan1: Thanks for the compliment, but can we get down to business, General?
ev16.helena3: Right, sorry! Got a little carried away there. So, where do we start...?
ev16.helena4: Okay. Let’s talk about my Peacekeeper Squad and what we’re doing here. Do you know why I’m not using the Merinberg Army for this job?
ev16.morrigan2: I heard you wanted to hire outside mercenaries to lighten their load?
ev16.helena5: Exactly, but that’s not the whole story. The main reason is that I want to find good soldiers and give them a shot at joining our army once the job is done, if they want to.
ev16.helena6: But we’ll get into that later. For now, let’s discuss your job, alright?
ev16.helena7: In recent months, the monster population on #{placenames.merinpeak} has skyrocketed, and they’ve become increasingly aggressive. Your first objective is to reduce their numbers and keep them away from the Tomb of King Lawrence Heimdall at the top of this mountain.
ev16.lilith1: Hold on a second. You said 'first' objective, right? So there’s a second one?
ev16.helena8: Of course. There is a second objective I’m about to mention. This one is optional, so it’s up to you whether to pursue it or not.
ev16.morrigan5: Now I’m curious. What is it?
ev16.helena9: There’s an ancient myth that says #{placenames.merinpeak} was once the nest of the Phoenix, the Goddess of Sun's pet. When it flew off to the Heavenly World, it supposedly dropped a few rainbow feathers, which have yet to be found.
ev16.helena10: How could I not know? This is my kingdom, and this myth has been passed down for generations. But, you know, a myth is just a myth, so I’m not sure if it’s real...
ev16.leonardo1: *\n[3] sounds like she knows more about the rainbow feathers than she’s letting on...*
ev16.morrigan6: *Yeah. She knows more than you think. Just keep quiet for now; I’ll fill you in later.*
ev16.morrigan7: Pardon me for asking, but why are you seeking those rainbow feathers? What are they used for?
ev16.helena11: Good question, but that’s not for me to answer. It’s a request from our Mayor, Crawforde Heimdall. You might learn more if you meet him in person.
ev16.helena12: Yes, but only if you bring back at least one of the rainbow feathers.
ev16.morrigan9: So, two objectives in total, right? We’ll take on both.
ev16.helena13: Yep, just those two. The first one should be easy for you, but the second will be a challenge.
ev16.morrigan10: If it’s too easy, where’s the fun in that?
ev16.helena14: Haha! I knew I picked the right team. What a great spirit! Alright, you now have access to #{placenames.merinpeak}. The guards there won’t stop you anymore. I’ll be waiting for some good news.
ev16.morrigan11: We’ll bring them back to you soon.

ev23.leonardo1: Helena mentioned there are some monsters near the King’s tomb at the top of this mountain. I think we should check that out first.
ev23.morrigan2: Sounds like a plan. We can investigate the old nest of the Phoenix while we’re at it.

ev19.kyungri1: Shit... Where did they come from...?
ev19.kyungri2: Stay away from me, or I swear I’ll kill you all!!!
ev19.kyungri3: I-It's no use... Is this how my life ends...?
ev19.leonardo1: Look, \n[1]! That little girl is in trouble!
ev19.leonardo2: Don't worry!! Mister Handsome \n[4] is on his way to the rescue!!
ev19.lilith3: Hey...! Wait a second...! Is that you, Kyungri, the Thief of Haravi...?
ev19.morrigan2: Kyungri? So you stole something from those monsters, and now they want to eat you alive, huh?
ev19.kyungri7: Y-You too, \n[1]...? What a shit day I’m having...
ev19.morrigan3: Should I let them chop your hands off for stealing, huh?
ev19.kyungri8: I-It's not the time for jokes!!! Just save me first...!!
