ev19.kyungri9: I-I will pay you 5000 #{termwords.gold}...!! Just please save me...!!
ev19.leonardo4: AAre you hurt? Let me check---
ev19.morrigan6: Don’t tell me you were lying, Kyungri.
ev19.kyungri12: I-I’ll pay you next time... Right now, I'm broke...
ev19.leonardo5: I think you should lay off her, \n[1]... She looks like she’s had a rough time.
ev19.kyungri13: He’s right!!! I was scared shitless!! Just stop bullying me already!!!
ev19.lilith5: Alright, I’ll back off. Anyway, it’s great to see you again, Kyungri. Are you still swiping stuff from people, you Thief?
ev19.kyungri14: Just stop calling me that...!!! I’ve moved on to being a T-Treasure Hunter!
ev19.blanc1: Who is she...? An old friend of yours?
ev19.morrigan7: Han Kyungri, an old acquaintance from the orphanage in #{mapnames.haravitown}.
ev19.leonardo6: And 'Mister Handsome' \n[4] Hargreave at your service. Must be fate bringing a pretty lady like you into our path, Miss Han Kyungri.
ev19.kyungri15: Y-Yeah... It’s... an honor... to meet you...
ev19.lilith6: This place is off-limits, so how the hell did you get in here, Kyungri?
ev19.kyungri16: Do you really think those guards could stop me? They had no clue I was here.
ev19.lilith7: Oh, right. I forgot you were a Thief.
ev19.kyungri17: I told you to stop calling me that...!!!
ev19.kyungri18: Looking for treasures. They buried plenty inside the tomb of King Lawrence Heimdall, but I only found a few.
ev19.morrigan9: Eh? A 'Treasure Hunter' turned grave robber, huh?
ev19.kyungri19: S-So what...!!?? Don’t you want to be rich, Greedy \n[1]?
ev19.morrigan10: I don’t take money from the dead. And you said you found some stuff, right? I thought you were broke?
ev19.kyungri20: J-Just... a small golden statue, but I need to take it to another city to sell first... I promise I’ll pay you back the next time we meet.
ev19.morrigan11: So it's a promise. Don’t forget it.
ev19.kyungri22: But what are you guys doing here? You’re not just here to save me, are you?
ev19.lilith8: That’s right, Kyungri. We need to ask you something. Have you seen any rainbow feathers around here?
ev19.kyungri23: Rainbow feathers...? Never seen them. By the name, they must be something special, huh?
ev19.lilith9: Maybe. It’s a request from the Merinberg Military HQ, so we’re in the dark.
ev19.kyungri24: Hmm... I’ve been scouting this area for days, checking every corner, and haven’t seen anything like that. I bet it’s not easy to find.
ev19.kyungri25: Well, not quite. I haven’t made it to the very top of this mountain yet. Couldn’t find a way up. But I have a hunch there’s something there.
ev19.morrigan12: So we need to find a way to climb up there, huh...?
ev19.kyungri26: Hey! I have an idea. Do you want to check out the tomb of King Lawrence Heimdall? Who knows, maybe there’s a secret passage that leads us to the top?
ev19.morrigan13: You want to go treasure hunting, huh?
ev19.kyungri27: I-It’s not just that...! I just want to help you out since you saved me. Plus, I saw a locked gate inside.
ev19.leonardo7: Not a bad idea. We’ve been scouting this place too, and we haven’t found squat.
ev19.kyungri28: He’s right. Just let me tag along so I can guide you.
ev19.morrigan14: You’re definitely after the King's treasures, Kyungri. But fine, just remember our promise.
ev19.lilith11: It’s fine to let her come with us. But Kyungri, is the main entrance accessible?
ev19.kyungri30: Of course not. But I have another way in. Just don’t tell anyone, and I’ll show you.
ev19.morrigan15: You’ve made a secret passage already? Impressive for a 'Thief.
ev19.kyungri31: I told you to stop calling me that...!!!
ev19.lilith12: It's her nature. Let's go after her.

ev27.blanc1: Is that all...? I feel nothing...
ev27.lilith1: Just give it a minute. I’m sure it will---
ev27.lilith2: Whoa! What the hell is this...?
ev27.lilith3: The temperature is rising. I can feel its presence!! Get ready, guys!!!
ev27.blanc3: I thought I was getting burned alive...
ev27.lilith4: Hey, look! I-Is that... the rainbow feather?
ev27.morrigan2: By the looks of it, I think that’s what we’re after.
ev27.lilith5: But there’s only one... Hey \n[3], is that enough for us?
ev27.blanc4: One should be enough to help us cross the quicksand area...
ev27.leonardo2: But what the hell is it used for?
ev27.morrigan3: It gives us the ability to float. We need it to get through the quicksand to reach #{mapnames.whitehaven}.
ev27.leonardo3: Got it. But we’ve only got one, so we need to hand it over to Helena if we want to meet Crawforde, right?
ev27.morrigan4: We’re not giving it to her. I’ll figure out another plan. For now, let’s grab the feather and head back to Helena's.

ev37.lilith1: So this is the Tomb of King Lawrence Heimdall. No wonder it looks so damn splendid.
ev37.leonardo1: You mentioned a locked gate here, right?
ev37.kyungri2: That’s the gate, but there’s no way in. It’s blocked by two layers.
ev37.morrigan1: Hmm... There’s gotta be a way to get rid of those layers.
ev37.leonardo2: We should search this place carefully. I bet there are some hints lying around.
ev37.morrigan2: Agreed. Let’s take a look around.
ev37.notification: \c[3]Han Kyungri\c[0] has joined your party as a GUEST.

ev47.morrigan1: Wow, this is easier than I thought.
ev47.lilith1: Alright, let’s head in and see what’s waiting for us.

ev1.kyungri1: Wow...! I never expected to find a hidden room like this in the King's tomb.
ev1.leonardo1: This place looks like a ritual room.
ev1.lilith1: That’s gotta be an important artifact. I mean, the King must’ve wanted to hide it here in his tomb. So, what’s our move, \n[1]?
ev1.morrigan1: It could be a clue to finding the rainbow feathers. Let’s check it out!
ev1.morrigan2: It looks like the spheres we found earlier, but bigger. What do you think it's for?
ev1.lilith2: That’s the Azure Sphere, a divine artifact used to summon the Guardian Firebird of #{mapnames.merinberg}.
ev1.lilith3: It's written on that tablet over there. This sphere was the last gift from King Lawrence Heimdall to his people.
ev1.leonardo2: Wait, you can read that? I can’t make sense of any of it.
ev1.lilith4: Kind of. It’s an ancient language. I did some research back in #{mapnames.haravitown}, but I didn’t think it would actually come in handy.
ev1.morrigan3: So, we can summon a firebird with this? But how do we do that?
ev1.lilith5: First, we have to reach the very top of this mountain, then use the sphere to light the divine torches up there.
ev1.blanc2: But what exactly is a firebird...?
ev1.leonardo3: As far as I know, it’s like a young Phoenix.
ev1.morrigan4: A young Phoenix, huh? I wonder if it has rainbow feathers like the real deal...
ev1.leonardo4: No clue, but I think it’s worth a shot.
ev1.kyungri3: A-Are you really gonna fight that firebird...? I know you all are tough, but do you realize how powerful it is?
ev1.morrigan5: Why not? This could be our chance to get the rainbow feathers. I can’t just pass that up.
ev1.kyungri4: Well... I guess it’s time for me to say goodbye... I’m still young, and I really don’t want to die...
ev1.lilith6: Don’t worry. We can handle this from here. Thanks for your help, Kyungri.
ev1.morrigan6: Yeah, exactly. If you stick around, you’ll just be a burden. Just head to another city, sell that statue, and we can catch up next time.
ev1.kyungri7: Oh! One last thing! I found something interesting, but I’m not sure how to use it. You can grab it from my tent in #{placenames.merinpeak}.
ev1.morrigan8: Alright, I’ll take the sphere now.
ev1.leonardo5: Those stairs must lead us to the top. But is it really okay to take on the Guardian of #{mapnames.merinberg}?
ev1.morrigan9: It’s not our problem. Plus, they want the feathers too, right?
ev1.morrigan10: Let’s go. Time for a real challenge.

ev35.npc1: Thanks for coming. Please, have a seat. Would you like some tea?
ev35.morrigan1: Nah, skip it. We want your story. Why are you after the rainbow feathers?
ev35.npc2: It’s for my father... He’s dreamed of seeing those feathers his whole life, but now...
ev35.npc3: He can’t chase his dream anymore...
ev35.lilith1: What do you mean? Where’s your father now?
ev35.npc4: He’s fallen victim to a cruel disease, and he's been unconscious for over a year... I don’t think he has much time left...
ev35.npc5: That’s why I want to grant his last wish. I just want him to see the rainbow feathers before he leaves this world for a better one...
ev35.morrigan3: Are you trying to play on our sympathy? Sorry, but we’re not that kind of audience. Your father has reaped what he’s sown. Do you even know what he did during the Four-Kingdom War? How many lives he took?
ev35.npc6: I know, but what could he do? War is a crime... Sometimes, it’s kill or be killed in this brutal world...
ev35.npc7: The war’s been over for ages, but I know the families of his victims will eventually come for him.
ev35.morrigan4: So what will you do when that happens? Stop them from taking his life?
ev35.npc8: If it makes them feel better, I won’t interfere. The cycle of revenge never ends if people keep seeking it. Forgiveness is the only real cure...
ev35.npc9: Our ancestors always craved power, leading to inevitable wars to prove who’s strongest. But they never considered the aftermath...
ev35.npc10: All I want is a world where people can live in peace. No more wars, no more vengeance. Because if you live by 'an eye for an eye', the whole world will go blind...
ev35.npc11: Ah, sorry... I’m getting off track. Where were we?
ev35.morrigan5: Right. What do you know about the rainbow feathers?
ev35.npc12: They’re amazing artifacts, right? All I care about is showing them to my father to fulfill his dream. What they are doesn’t really matter to me.
ev35.morrigan6: So, you want to 'borrow' our rainbow feather just to show it to him?
ev35.npc13: Yeah, I hope there’s a miracle when he sees it. So, if you don’t mind...
ev35.morrigan7: I don’t mind, but can we make a request?
ev35.npc14: A request? Sure, just tell me.
ev35.morrigan8: Can we meet your father in person? Even if he’s unconscious, I still have things I want to say to him. I’ll bring the rainbow feather.
ev35.npc15: Meet my father...? It’s possible, but what do you want to talk to him about?
ev35.morrigan9: Just some small talk. If you’re worried, you can call Helena and set up some protection.
ev35.npc16: I get it. Just give me a moment.
ev35.notification: Once you are ready, please enter this \c[2]Rest Room\c[0] to meet Crawforde Heimdall.

ev31p4.npc1: I never thought it would end up like this... #{mapnames.merinberg} has lost a talented general. Poor Marshal Francis... After his wife died, all he had left was his daughter. It’s just unbearable pain...
ev31p4.morrigan1: But what about that woman in the black hood? What’s her deal with the #{lorewords.shardofchaos}?
ev31p4.npc2: I wish I knew. I’m still baffled by how she figured out where we stashed the #{lorewords.shardofchaos}, even though it was hidden deep in the secret basement for generations.
ev31p4.morrigan2: She called it the fourth #{lorewords.dimensionalshards}. Does that mean there are other shards? What the hell are they?
ev31p4.npc3: I don’t know much, but King Lawrence Heimdall once told me there are four #{lorewords.dimensionalshards} that let you travel to another dimension. We’ve been guarding the fourth one for ages.
ev31p4.morrigan3: So you’re saying that woman wants to jump to another dimension? What the hell’s in there?
ev31p4.npc4: No one has a clue... Now that both the #{lorewords.shardofchaos} and Helena are gone, how the hell am I supposed to face my ancestors about this...?
ev31p4.lilith1: There was nothing we could do. That mysterious woman wields a destructive force you can’t even begin to imagine.
ev31p4.npc5: I heard from Marshal Francis that you’re going after that woman, right? Can I ask a favor...?
ev31p4.npc6: Could you... avenge Helena's death for me?
ev31p4.morrigan5: Wow! Look who’s talking. Where’s your so-called 'world without vengeance' now?
ev31p4.npc7: B-But... this isn’t a war... That woman is just a heartless demon, so...
ev31p4.morrigan6: What a pathetic excuse! If you want revenge, do it yourself. Why should we dirty our hands for your vendetta?
ev31p4.npc8: Y-You’re right... I’m sorry for asking such an absurd thing...
ev31p4.morrigan7: Anyway, thanks for the info on the #{lorewords.dimensionalshards}. If you’ll excuse us, we’re out of here. We’ve got other things to handle.
ev31p4.npc9: Y-Yeah... Don’t mention it. Good luck on your journey. Hope we cross paths again.
ev31p4.morrigan8: Alright, let’s go, everyone. Time to hit our next destination.
ev31p4.notification: You can head West from #{mapnames.sandstorm} to reach #{mapnames.whitehaven}.

ev9.morrigan1: Huh? I thought you summoned Helena? Where the hell is she?
ev9.npc1: I’m sorry, but Helena is out on an urgent mission. Marshal Francis Winston will be here with us.
ev9.morrigan2: So your father’s been like this for over a year?
ev9.npc2: Yeah... We’ve tried everything, but nothing worked...
ev9.morrigan3: Can I have a word with him?
ev9.guard1: Halt! Where do you think you’re going?
ev9.morrigan4: Get the hell out of my way.
ev9.npc4: Just let her go. We’ll keep an eye on her.
ev9.npc5: So, what do you want to tell him?
ev9.morrigan5: I want to share a story, especially for you, 'Mister' Crawforde.
ev9.morrigan7: Twenty years ago, Amelia and Merrick, the Commander of Valenka Royal Mages and Knights, had a daughter. They lived a beautiful life like any family.
ev9.morrigan8: But when the Four-Kingdom War hit, they had to leave their two-year-old child behind to fight for Valenka and the Royal Family.
ev9.morrigan9: They fought hard and took down two kingdoms, Religia and Luvinia, leaving Valenka and Merinberg as the last ones standing.
ev9.morrigan10: But then, during a surprise night attack from Merinberg, Amelia and her two bodyguards were slaughtered by a cold-blooded barbarian.
ev9.npc7: Wow... didn’t see that coming. That’s a truly sad story...
ev9.morrigan11: Merrick rushed in to save her, but he was too late. He could only save the King’s life, not his beloved wife or her bodyguards.
ev9.morrigan12: A year after the war, Merrick retired, took his daughter, and moved to a small town to raise her alone.
ev9.morrigan13: Years went by, and Merrick told his daughter about her brave mother and the monster who took her away. That’s when the young lady decided to hunt down her mother’s murderer.
ev9.npc8: What a tragedy... So did she find him? Who was it?
ev9.morrigan14: Of course she did... And how ridiculous is it that the murderer, Barbarius Heimdall, is standing right in front of her!!!
ev9.npc9: T-This means... the young lady you mentioned is...?
ev9.morrigan15: Yes. It's me, \n[1] Blackpearl, the daughter of Merrick and Amelia Blackpearl.
ev9.francis1: Show me your hands!! Get on your knees!!
ev9.leonardo1: And Commander Amelia’s bodyguards were my parents too!!
ev9.npc10: So that’s why you’re here... to take your revenge...
ev9.francis2: We’re here, Mr. Crawforde. They won’t be able to harm you.
ev9.leonardo2: I’ve waited for this moment forever!! It’s time he pays for what he did!!
ev9.npc11: Marshal Francis, just let her be.
ev9.francis3: I’m here to protect you and Marshal Barbarius!!
ev9.npc12: Let her go, please. This is an order.
ev9.npc13: I won’t stop you from seeking revenge, but first, let me have a last word with my father...
ev9.morrigan18: I’m not like that. Killing a near-dead person is pointless.
ev9.morrigan19: Your father killed my mother and \n[4]'s parents. That’s unforgivable. But you’re right. War is a crime, and we have to kill or be killed.
ev9.morrigan20: Living in his current state is worse than death. He can’t live like a normal person, yet he can’t find peace either. That’s his penance.
ev9.morrigan21: He reaps what he sows in this life. He doesn’t even deserve to die by my hands.
ev9.morrigan22: Let’s go home, everyone. We’ve got what we need. Staying here is a waste of time.
ev9.leonardo4: How can you say that so easily? He killed my parents!! MY PARENTS!!
ev9.morrigan23: Will killing him bring you peace? He might even thank you if you take his life. Will that really satisfy you? It’ll only dirty our hands more...
ev9.morrigan24: Let's go home, \n[4]. Don’t become a person like Barbarius. We have something he doesn’t, a human heart.
ev9.francis5: You’re not going anywhere! You think you can just leave after what you’ve done?
ev9.morrigan25: Please, move out of my way, Marshal Francis. I don’t want to fight you.
ev9.francis6: Don’t act so cocky! Who do you think you are?
ev9.npc15: Marshal Francis, let them go. They’ve done nothing wrong.
ev9.npc16: I am. Just let them go.
ev9.npc18: Thank you, Lady \n[1]... I hope we meet again. You’re always welcome here.

ev9.lilith1: Marshal Francis? You’re hurt! What the hell is going on?
ev9.leonardo1: He’s out cold but still breathing. Where’s his daughter?
ev9.morrigan1: Ouch! What the fuck is this thing...?
ev9.leonardo2: It’s a barrier! But this one’s different...
ev9.leonardo3: No, \n[1]! Don’t waste your strength! It’s immune to your attacks!
ev9.morrigan3: But something is pulling me over there! Shit...! Is there another way to break this barrier?
ev9.leonardo4: This is... Illusory Magic... I’ll try to do something, but it’ll take time!
ev9.helena1: Back off! You can’t go any further!
ev9.amelia1: YOU HAVE THREE SECONDS TO GET OUT OF MY WAY.
ev9.helena4: You don’t scare me! I’d rather die an honorable death than run away!
ev9.gableonardo1: No, Helena! Get away from that!!
ev9.amelia6: EMPTY VESSELS ALWAYS MAKE THE MOST SOUND.
ev9.blanc2: S-She killed Helena... with just one spell...!
ev9.lilith3: What kind of monster is she...?
ev9.morrigan5: \n[4]! Can you do it faster!? We need to break this barrier!
ev9.leonardo6: This is as fast as I can do! Breaking a high-level barrier isn’t easy!
ev9.corlilith1: Stay out of this! Let me handle it!!
ev9.corlilith2: No time for that! Here it comes!
ev9.corlilith3: Dammit...! What the fuck is this barrier...?
ev9.amelia7: YOU THINK YOU CAN BREAK MY BARRIER WITH YOUR CHILDISH SPELLS? HOW NAIVE.
ev9.morrigan8: Who the hell are you? What’s with this barrier? Come fight me, you coward!
ev9.leonardo7: Shit...! She’s right...! We can’t break through...! Her magic is on another level...
ev9.amelia9: HERE. THE FOURTH DIMENSIONAL SHARD - THE SHARD OF CHAOS.
ev9.morrigan9: #{lorewords.shardofchaos}? What the hell is that thing?
ev9.amelia10: TIME TO LEAVE THIS MISERABLE PLACE.
ev9.morrigan10: She’s gone... Goddamn it...! There’s something familiar about her.
ev9.morrigan11: Can you feel any traces of Helena, \n[2]?
ev9.lilith5: I can’t sense her presence. Not even her soul...! It’s like she’s been completely wiped out.
ev9.morrigan12: What kind of magic is this...?
ev9.morrigan13: What’s going on? Do you know something, \n[4]?
ev9.leonardo10: The magic that woman used... is Illusory Magic, just like Commander Amelia Blackpearl used in the past...
ev9.morrigan14: Wait, does that mean she’s also a disciple of my mother?
ev9.leonardo11: I-I’m not sure... It’s hard to say... But it’s definitely high-level Illusory Magic...
ev9.lilith7: I’m so sorry... The barrier was too strong, so...
ev9.lilith8: She fought bravely, like a true warrior. You can be proud of her, Marshal Francis...
ev9.francis4: She shouldn’t have sacrificed herself to protect the #{lorewords.shardofchaos}... She’s still too young...
ev9.morrigan15: But why did she have to protect it with her life? Is it really that important?
ev9.francis5: It’s our ancestors' wish... We’ve been guarding it for generations, but this is the first time we’ve faced a true demon like this... We were no match for her...
ev9.blanc3: I’m really sorry for your loss...
ev9.morrigan16: This is getting confusing... First, it was the 'Relics', now 'Shards'... What the hell are they?
ev9.francis6: I can’t believe Helena’s gone forever... My poor little girl... Hel, Queen of Netherworld! Why don’t you take this useless father instead of my daughter...?
ev9.morrigan17: I get how you feel, but we can’t bring the dead back to life. I wished for the same thing once, but now I have to face the truth. I’m sure Helena wants you to be proud of her, not wallowing in despair.
ev9.francis7: I’m going to find that damn woman, and I will have my revenge...!
ev9.morrigan18: Looking at how easily she took down your daughter and your army, I’d bet you’d reunite with Helena in the Netherworld if you go after her. She might even burn your hometown to ash if you piss her off. You really want that to happen?
ev9.morrigan19: Anyway, we’ve got business with that woman, so leave it to us. I feel like I know her from somewhere.
ev9.leonardo12: *I hope it’s not what I’m thinking...*
ev9.morrigan20: Now go get some rest, old man. You’ve had enough for today.
ev9.blanc4: Poor guy... I hope he’ll be okay...
ev9.lilith9: I’m sure he’ll pull through. But \n[1], are you really set on going after that woman?
ev9.morrigan21: I’m dead serious. I bet it’s what \n[4] wants too. I want to learn more about the 'Shards' and 'Relics', and she probably knows something.
ev9.lilith10: But why don’t we ask Crawforde about the #{lorewords.dimensionalshards} first? He might have some answers.
ev9.morrigan22: Ask him...? Honestly, I really don’t want to go back there.
ev9.lilith11: Just a suggestion. If you’re not up for it, we can skip it.
ev9.morrigan23: It’s not a terrible idea... Well, let’s head back to the #{placenames.cityhall}...

ev5.morrigan1opt1: Last time we were here, this place was a dead end. Why are we coming back, \n[3]? We’re not lost, are we?
ev5.morrigan1opt2: This is a dead end. What the hell are we doing here, \n[3]? Are you sure we’re still on track?
ev5.blanc1: How could I forget the way back to my hometown...? We’re totally on course.
ev5.lilith1: But seriously, what’s the plan here?
ev5.morrigan2: Wow...! I had no idea there was a gate here. How the hell did you do that, \n[3]?
ev5.blanc3: This is the sealed gate of #{placenames.fabledgateway}... It leads to #{mapnames.whitehaven}, and it only shows up when a drop of a Griffinian's blood hits the seal...
ev5.morrigan3: So the quicksand area is right behind this gate?
ev5.blanc4: There’s still another sealed gate... Anyway, just get inside first...

ev12.blanc0: You see...? That’s the second sealed gate, but this one’s a hell of a lot easier to activate...
ev12.morrigan1: Hmm... Looks like we’ve got some more work to do here.
ev12.blanc1: It won’t take long... You know what to do, right...?
ev12.morrigan2: Absolutely! This is gonna be a piece of cake.
ev12.blanc2: Once we bust out of this cave, the quicksand area will show up...
ev12.morrigan3: Got it. Let’s get to work!
ev12.notification1: You can push these rocks away just by moving toward them. Moving back to #{mapnames.sandstorm} will reset their positions.

ev8.morrigan1: Wow! It’s turned into a lever. What now, \n[3]?
ev8.blanc1: You know what to do, right...?
ev8.morrigan2: Well, I mean, I think so...
ev8.lilith1: Whoa! That looks like a bridge of light!
ev8.blanc2: There you go... You did it...
ev8.morrigan3: So that’s how the rainbow feather works.
ev8.leonardo1: All we gotta do now is step on it, right?
ev8.morrigan4: And it won’t disappear while we’re walking on it, right?
ev8.lilith2: But \n[3], there are so many skeletons around here. Don’t tell me...
ev8.blanc5: No... They weren’t my people. Just some curious idiots who tried to cross here before...
ev8.blanc6: That’s why my ancestors set up these sealed gates, to keep my hometown completely cut off from the outside...
ev8.morrigan5: Come on! I can’t wait to see your hometown, \n[3].

ev9.morrigan1: Shit... This place is nothing like I imagined. A single rainbow feather can really lift us up?
ev9.morrigan2: Huh? Isn’t that the whole point of needing it?
ev9.blanc2: It can only lift one person...
ev9.lilith1: What? I thought you said one was enough?
ev9.blanc3: Of course one is enough, but we’re not using it to fly...
ev9.morrigan3: So what the hell are we supposed to do with it?
ev9.blanc4: See that machine on your right...?
ev9.morrigan4: Should be my left, but yeah, I see it.
ev9.blanc5: Go put the rainbow feather in there...
ev9.blanc6: Just do what I say... You’ll see soon enough...

ev25.morrigan1: Geez... Another one...? What the hell?
ev25.blanc1: This is it... The portal to my land...
ev25.morrigan2: So what’s the plan this time...?
ev25.blanc2: Just light those torches up... That’s all we need to do...
ev25.morrigan3: \n[4], can you take care of this?
ev25.leonardo1: Finally, some action! Just leave it to the greatest magus of all time!
ev25.morrigan4: Alright, I’m counting on you. Just don’t screw it up.
ev25.notification: \c[3]\n[4]\c[0] must be the party leader to perform his magic.

ev21.blanc1: N-No... T-This... is not... true! This can't be... happening...
ev21.blanc2: E-Elder Gwyn...? W-Where are you...? Anyone?
ev21.blanc3: W-Where is everybody...? I-It's me, \n[3]... I'm home... Please, someone come out...
ev21.blanc4: Papa... Mama...! C-Can you hear me...? I-It's... your daughter, \n[3] here... Please answer me...
ev21.leonardo1: What the hell could've caused this level of destruction...? This is unreal.
ev21.lilith1: Poor \n[3]... This has to be a massive shock for her... Her life’s already been filled with so much pain, and I don’t know if she can get back up after this...
ev21.morrigan2: Yeah... We need to find her. We can't let her wander alone, or it’ll be even worse...

ev1.lilith1: \n[3], I'm really sorry for your loss...
ev1.blanc1: My hometown... My people... My parents... Why...? Why is this happening to me...? How the hell am I supposed to tell Plati about this...?
ev1.lilith2: I get how you feel, but natural disasters can be unbelievably cruel...
ev1.blanc2: It's been... three years... and I’ve always dreamed of this day... But now? It’s worse than any nightmare I could imagine...
ev1.blanc3: Papa... Mama... I'm so sorry... I’ve been such an unfilial daughter...
ev1.morrigan1: I know it hurts, but you can’t just sit here and cry all day, \n[3]...
ev1.morrigan2: Hey, chill out! What I mean is, why don’t we scout the area? There might still be survivors out there. What do you think, \n[3]?
ev1.morrigan3: Well... If you don’t want to, then forget it...
ev1.leonardo1: No \n[1], that’s actually a good idea. If we find at least one survivor, we might learn something about this disaster.
ev1.morrigan4: Geez... Where is she off to now...?
ev1.leonardo2: She might be looking for survivors. We’d better get moving too.

ev4.morrigan1: Hmm... What the hell is this place?
ev4.lucas1: So this is the #{lorewords.relicofviolentdust}, but we're too late. This is the dirty work of Ryan and his minions.
ev4.aiko1: Yes, \n[6]. There’s still an evil force from the inside...
ev4.aiko2: Just the two of us? Isn’t that a bit risky? You sure about this, dear?
ev4.lucas4: We don’t have a choice. If we leave it here, who knows what it could turn into. You know how insidious Ryan is, right?
ev4.morrigan3: Who the hell are these people...? \n[3], they're not your friends, are they?
ev4.blanc1: Who the hell are you...? What are you doing here...?
ev4.lucas5: Hmm... A Griffinian? So one’s still alive.
ev4.lucas6: Even if I told you, it wouldn’t change anything. Better wait until we finish our job here. She needs to focus, so don’t interrupt.
ev4.blanc3: So... you’re the ones who did this to my village...?
ev4.lilith2: Don't worry, \n[3]. We've got your back.
ev4.leonardo1: What kind of monster destroys an entire place like this?
ev4.morrigan4: You cold-blooded, heartless rogue. It's time to pay for what you did.
ev4.lucas8: Interesting. Are you really going to fight me? If I were you, I’d think twice.
ev4.blanc4: Stay back... This is my fight...
ev4.lilith3: Are you kidding, \n[3]? Don’t underestimate your enemy!
ev4.blanc5: Thanks for your concern... but I need to handle this myself... It's not fair to fight him like that...
ev4.lucas9: One-on-one, huh? Fair enough, but not the smartest move. Let’s see what you’ve got.
ev4.lucas10: You’re not bad. I’m pretty impressed for a Griffinian.
ev4.aiko4: You started this, right? Just let me handle it from here.
ev4.aiko5: We mean no harm, and we didn’t cause this destruction, \n[3].
ev4.blanc8: Don’t bullshit me! You attacked me first, and now you’re claiming to mean no harm...?
ev4.aiko6: I’m sorry for that, but \n[6] didn’t mean to hurt you. He just wanted to test your skills since you’re the last Griffinian alive. We have a reason for being here, and I hope you’ll listen.
ev4.blanc9: So what do you have to say...? If I find out you’re lying, I swear I’ll kill you...
ev4.aiko9: \n[13] Sceleratis? Where did you meet her? What did she tell you?
ev4.morrigan6: Why don’t you start by telling us about the #{lorewords.paradisorelics}?
ev4.lucas12: This is a life and death situation! Tell us where you met her!
ev4.morrigan7: I don’t take orders from you!
ev4.aiko10: Let me do the talking, dear.
ev4.aiko11: I can give you detailed info on the #{lorewords.paradisorelics}, but you’ve gotta trust me. Is that cool?
ev4.aiko13: Now, let's start with the history of the #{lorewords.paradisorelics}. They were created by the former Goddess of the Sun before she reincarnated into another form.
ev4.lilith5: The former Goddess of the Sun? Reincarnation? Honestly, that sounds hard to believe. From what I know, Emi the Goddess of the Sun has never reincarnated into anyone.
ev4.aiko14: Goddess Emi is the current Goddess of the Sun, but there was a FORMER Goddess of the Sun. You’ve never heard of her?
ev4.leonardo2: I did hear about it once from my grandfather. But no one believed it. Before Goddess Emi, there was another Goddess of the Sun who suddenly gave up her power and vanished.
ev4.aiko15: Your grandfather was telling the truth. Aiko, the former Goddess of the Sun, reincarnated into a human in another world called Cindrivia to save her twin sister, Aina, the Goddess of Night.
ev4.aiko16: With the help of some good people in Cindrivia, she finally rescued Goddess Aina. But she also collided with a demon named Ryan, who was planning to recreate all nine worlds by destroying the Yggdrasil Core.
ev4.morrigan9: Relics, #{lorewords.dimensionalshards}, and now the Yggdrasil Core... Seriously, my brain can’t handle this shit right now...
ev4.aiko18: Each world has its own Genesis Core linked to the Yggdrasil Core, which is Ryan’s final target. To get to it, he needs to collect all nine Genesis Cores and use them to boost his Time Magic, allowing him to open a dimensional crack to the Yggdrasil Core.
ev4.aiko19: He got the Cindrivia Core from Goddess Aina during the rescue and came to this world. Now he’s after the Valkadia Core. That’s why Goddess Aiko’s reincarnation and her friend have been chasing after him to stop his plan.
ev4.morrigan10: Whatever he’s doing, it’s not our concern. We’re here to talk about the #{lorewords.paradisorelics}, right? We want to know what happened HERE.
ev4.aiko20: The #{lorewords.paradisorelics} are the keys leading him to the #{lorewords.valkadiacore}!!
ev4.morrigan11: Huh? But \n[13] said those Relics were slowly draining the life essence of this world. She and her master had to destroy them all before it was too late.
ev4.aiko21: That’s a lie! \n[13] is Ryan’s most loyal right-hand! Where did you meet her?
ev4.morrigan12: Inside the #{placenames.arctictemple}, on an island called #{mapnames.whirlwind}. I was there and helped her destroy a Relic.
ev4.lucas14: Fuck! Goddamn it! Do you have any idea what you just did?
ev4.morrigan13: That whole island was surrounded by violent whirlpools. I helped her destroy the Relic so she could recover her magic and take me home! What the hell do you expect when you’re stuck on a deserted island?
ev4.lucas15: Shit... Now two Relics are gone. Only three left before the dimensional crack to the #{lorewords.valkadiacore} opens...
ev4.morrigan14: Stop hiding shit and tell us what’s going on here!
ev4.aiko22: Those Paradiso Relics... are seals for a dimensional crack that leads to the Valkadia Core...
ev4.aiko23: If all five Relics are destroyed, the dimensional crack will open, and with his Time Magic, Ryan will easily get there and take the #{lorewords.valkadiacore}.
ev4.aiko24: And once a Relic is destroyed, all the space connected to it will also collapse... Just like what happened at the #{placenames.arctictemple}, right?
ev4.morrigan15: Y-Yeah... I thought it was just a coincidence...
ev4.leonardo4: So the massive destruction in #{mapnames.whitehaven} was caused by the same source?
ev4.aiko25: Now you’re getting it, right? Behind me is the #{lorewords.relicofviolentdust}, connected to #{mapnames.whitehaven}. It was destroyed by Ryan, and he also used this place to summon one of his most powerful demons.
ev4.lilith8: T-That means... you’re... the reincarnation of Goddess Aiko...?
ev4.morrigan16: Alright, let's say I trust you for a second. What are you actually doing here? You can't just 'fix' that Relic, can you?
ev4.aiko28: No one can fix a wrecked Relic, not even the Goddess herself. Like I said, Ryan used this place to summon one of his strongest demons, and we're here to wipe it out.
ev4.morrigan17: A demon? I don’t see any demons around. It’s just us here.
ev4.aiko29: You'll find out soon enough. But first, I've got a favor to ask.
ev4.aiko30: \n[6] tested your skills earlier, and I see you've got potential. So, I hope you can help us take down this demon and cleanse this place.
ev4.morrigan19: \n[3], what do you think? It's your call.
ev4.blanc12: We're in...! This is for my hometown, for my people, and for me...!
ev4.aiko31: I’m so relieved to hear that. Thank you! I honestly thought we’d have to handle this alone, so it’s a blessing to meet you all here. By the way, I'm \n[5] Kusuda.
ev4.lilith9: I'm \n[2] Harventon. Not exactly the best place for making friends, but nice to meet you.
ev4.leonardo6: And I’m the most handsome and greatest magus of all time, \n[4] Hargreave, at your service, my beautiful Goddess of Sun.
ev4.aiko32: Please... I'm not a Goddess anymore. Just call me \n[5].
ev4.blanc14: Just tell us what to do, \n[5]... We’ll give it our all...
ev4.aiko33: Our target is hiding inside the destroyed Relic, currently bound by my divine magic. Once you're ready, I’ll pull it out.
ev4.notification1: \c[3]\n[5] the Divine Oracle\c[0] and \c[3]\n[6] the Shadow Walker\c[0] have joined your party.
ev4.notification2: Your party now has six members. However, only four can join the battle, meaning two must stay behind as reserves. They’ll earn only 75% of total EXP from fights, so make sure to arrange your party wisely before each battle.
ev4.notification3: For this quest, \c[3]\n[5]\c[0] and \c[3]\n[3]\c[0] are required in your active party. You can rearrange your team later.

ev1p2.aiko1: Remember, this is one of Ryan's most powerful demons, so you better be on your toes. Are you ready?
ev1p2.aikochoiceno: Alright, take your time. I can wait.
ev1p2.morrigan1: And now she’s Queen Hel's little pet. Not sure if she bites, but I’d bet Queen Hel will slap her if she does.
ev1p2.aiko3: Well, I guess... Anyway, you all fought really well. Thanks a ton for your help.
ev1p2.leonardo1: Always a pleasure, my beautiful Goddess of Sun.
ev1p2.aiko4: I told you, I’m not a Goddess anymore...
ev1p2.lucas1: Don’t play tough. If you’re hurting, let it out. Don’t keep it bottled up inside.
ev1p2.lilith2: It’s okay, \n[3]. We’re here for you. Just let it out.
ev1p2.blanc3: *Sniff* No... I-I'm not... crying... I... I have to... be strong... *Sniff*
ev1p2.blanc4: Waaaaahhhhh... *Sob sob* I... I'm not... crying... but why... are the tears... just flowing... *Sob sob* Why...? Why is this happening...? *Sob sob*
ev1p2.blanc5: Waaaaahhhhh... *Sob sob* My people... My hometown... *Sob sob*
ev1p2.blanc6: Thanks... I feel a lot better now...
ev1p2.aiko7: I’m really glad, though I didn't think you'd cry for that long...
ev1p2.blanc7: My hometown’s gone... Now Plati and I have nowhere to call home, no family left...
ev1p2.morrigan3: What the hell are you talking about? Look around! We’re here for you, and we’re family, \n[3]. We won’t leave you or your sister behind.
ev1p2.morrigan4: I swear, throw me to the Netherworld and smash my soul into pieces if I’m lying.
ev1p2.lilith3: \n[1] is right, \n[3]. We will be your family, and The Eclipse will be your new home, now and forever.
ev1p2.leonardo2: \n[1]'s family is my family. I’ll protect you with my life, too.
ev1p2.blanc9:
Waaaaahhhh! Thank you... so much... 
[1], 
[2]... and 
[4]...
ev1p2.lucas2: Are you done yet? Please tell me you’re not gonna cry for another thirty minutes...
ev1p2.aiko8: Well, I guess it’s time for us to say goodbye.
ev1p2.morrigan5: Hold on. We still have some questions about all this.
ev1p2.morrigan6: You said the Relics are the key to the #{lorewords.dimensionalcrack}, right? So how many Relics are there in total?
ev1p2.lucas3: Five. I already mentioned that, remember?
ev1p2.morrigan7: Okay, I remember now. One's in the #{placenames.arctictemple}, one’s here. What about the other three?
ev1p2.aiko10: The other three are the #{lorewords.relicofblisteringflame}, #{lorewords.relicofvendurousleaf}, and #{lorewords.relicofsparklingthunder}. I don't have any memories left from the former Goddess of Sun, so I can’t tell you exactly where they are, but I can sense a Relic’s energy nearby.
ev1p2.morrigan8: Oh my Goddess... What about the... um... #{lorewords.dimensionalshards}? I saw one in #{mapnames.merinberg}, but it was taken by a mysterious witch. According to \n[4], she used Illusory Magic. Do you know anything about her?
ev1p2.aiko11: A witch who uses Illusory Magic, huh...? I don’t know much, but I bet she’s one of Ryan’s lackeys.
ev1p2.lucas4: Because you need four #{lorewords.dimensionalshards} to create a #{lorewords.dimensionalcrystal}, which boosts Ryan’s Time Magic to open a #{lorewords.dimensionalcrack} that leads to the #{lorewords.valkadiacore}. Looks like Ryan’s making moves quickly.
ev1p2.lilith4: Things just got a lot more complicated than I thought...
ev1p2.blanc12: So where’s Ryan now...? I’m gonna make him pay for what he did to my hometown and my people...
ev1p2.aiko12: He rarely shows himself, so we can’t be sure where to find him. We’ve just been tracking him by following the Relics and #{lorewords.dimensionalshards}. Luckily, he doesn’t know where the Relics are, but \n[13] has the same ability to sense Relics, just like me.
ev1p2.morrigan10: It’s still vague, but at least we know what those Relics are. I can’t believe \n[13] tricked me like that. I was almost ready to help her...
ev1p2.lilith5: Hold up... You said \n[13] could also identify Relics?
ev1p2.aiko13: Yeah. That gives them a huge advantage in this race, especially with their time magic allowing teleportation.
ev1p2.lilith6: Shit! If I’m right, this is really bad...
ev1p2.morrigan11: What are you talking about? What’s so bad?
ev1p2.lilith7: You once told \n[13] where to find us if she needed help, right? Remember that 'thing' beneath our HQ? What if that’s a Relic? And what if she comes to our town?
ev1p2.morrigan12: She’ll sense its energy!! Damn it!! This is really bad!
ev1p2.lilith8: You see what I’m getting at, right? \n[5], you said you could identify Relics, right? Can you both come with us?
ev1p2.aiko14: Absolutely. If it’s a Relic, your place is in danger. Let’s go now! We need to move fast!
ev1p2.morrigan13: Shit... Goddamn it! I should have seen this coming... That was my fault... Everyone, please stay safe...
ev1p2.notification2: You can now arrange your party freely. The Waypoint System is temporarily unavailable during this quest.

ev38.lilith1: #{mapnames.summerbreeze}... I can’t believe this... We’re too late...
ev38.leonardo1: What a massacre... That Ryan... he’s a real cold-blooded monster!!
ev38.blanc1: This used to be such a beautiful town... How could he do this...?
ev38.lucas1: That’s just how he rolls. And trust me, you haven’t even seen the worst of it.
ev38.aiko0: There’s definitely a Relic here! I can feel its energy!! It’s gotta be the #{lorewords.relicofvendurousleaf}!!
ev38.morrigan2: FUCK IT!!! I’M GONNA KILL THAT MOTHERFUCKER!!! HIM AND ALL HIS MINIONS!!! I’M GONNA TAKE THEM ALL OUT!!!
ev38.aiko1: \n[1]!! Don’t be reckless!!! Ryan could still be around, and you can’t take him on alone!!
ev38.aiko2: \n[2]!! You know where she’s headed, right?
ev38.lilith2: It’s gotta be the HQ where the Relic is...
ev38.aiko3: So what are you waiting for?? Let’s go after her, or she’s gonna get herself killed!!!

ev19.lilith1: The Eclipse... Everyone... They’re all gone...
ev19.aiko1: Just take us to the Relic!!
ev19.aiko2: For the sake of Goddess Emi, \n[2]!! We need to get to the Relic!!

ev1.ryan1: So those are their names, huh? Vile creatures. Just getting in my way for nothing.
ev1.ryan2: Well, well, if it isn’t the kids again! You've got some guts following me here. Didn’t learn your lesson from your pathetic deaths back in Cindrivia, huh?
ev1.lucas2: Shut the fuck up!! This time will be different! We’re here to take you down!
ev1.ryan3: Still all bark and no bite, huh?
ev1.aiko1: We’re not what we used to be!!
ev1.lilith2: Harley... \n[1]... What did you do to them...?
ev1.lucia1: You’d better ask our two puppets down there. It was their masterpiece.
ev1.darklilith1: I WILL KILL YOU ALL FOR WHAT YOU'VE DONE!!!
ev1.lucia2: I’m really looking forward to it. But first, you gotta deal with our puppets here.
ev1.lucia3: Let’s start with subject M. Show them your power!
ev1.blanc1: Is that the witch we ran into in #{mapnames.merinberg}...?
ev1.lucia4: So you met Subject A in #{mapnames.merinberg}, huh? She’s right here too. But it wouldn’t be fair to fight them all at once.
ev1.darklilith2: Whatever you are, I'm gonna kill you all!!
ev1.lucia5: Very well. We’ll see about that soon.
ev1.lilith3: How dare you...!! \n[1] saved you and trusted you back in #{placenames.arctictemple}. Is this how you repay her??
ev1.luciaoptional1: Hah! Bullshit! Is that what she told you? I never asked for her help. She did it on her own, just to get me to take her home.
ev1.luciaoptional2: But hey, thanks to her for pointing me to this Relic. Too bad she can’t hear me now. How unfortunate!
ev1.lilith4: Y-You... You monster...!! I will kill you!!!
ev1.lilith5: You’ll be my next target after this!!
ev1.notification2: Please arrange your party before starting your battle. When you're done, just close the Menu.
ev1.lucia6: Looks like I won't get the honor of being your next target. How tragic for me!
ev1.ryan5: You’re still the same, and your new buddies are just as pathetic. All bark, no bite.
ev1.ryan6: \n[13], I think we’re done here. Humans are the most pathetic creatures, only good for being our puppets.
ev1.ryan7: You kids aren’t ready yet! I hope the next time we meet, you’ll actually impress me. Hahaha!
ev1.lucas3: FUCK!! After all these years, we’re still no match for him!!
ev1.aiko3: Stay strong, \n[2]. I’m here to help.
ev1.aiko5: Calm down, \n[2]! Let me take a look!
ev1.aiko6: \n[1] is still alive, but her injuries are bad. I’ll try to help. Fingers crossed...
ev1.aiko7: Okay. She responded! That should keep her alive, at least for now.
ev1.lilith11: Thank you, \n[5]! But what about Harley...?
ev1.aiko8: I’m sorry, \n[2]... There’s nothing I can do for her...
ev1.lucas4: Your friend, \n[1], must have a strong will and mind to survive Ryan's #{termwords.blackmagic}. Her soul resisted manipulation, but it took a toll on her, leaving her in this state.
ev1.aiko9: Unfortunately, Harley didn’t have that same strength, so...
ev1.leonardo5: But what about \n[1]?? She hasn’t woken up yet!!
ev1.aiko11: At least she’s alive, but her mind is unstable. She can’t get back on her feet right now. We should move her out of here first.
ev1.lilith13: Is this... the end of The Eclipse...? I’m sorry, everyone... I couldn’t save you all...
ev1.lilith14: Those monsters... I will make them pay for this!!
ev1.aiko12: Of course we will, but let’s get \n[1] out of here first!! Where should we take her?
ev1.noti1: The Way Point system has been reactivated. #{mapnames.summerbreeze} has been removed from the map due to the destruction.

ev15.lilith1: Do you have any idea when \n[1] will be able to get back on her feet...?
ev15.aiko1: It depends. Her mind needs to be stable first, or else when she wakes up, she’ll lose control.
ev15.lilith2: Please help her! I’ll do anything to repay your kindness!
ev15.aiko2: Don't mention it, \n[2]. Of course, I’ll help her, but...
ev15.aiko3: My spell can only purify the dark energy Ryan put into her soul. We’ll need help from someone else, and I know just the expert.
ev15.lilith4: Please tell me! I’ll go find them!
ev15.aiko4: It’s the Great Bishop Zephaniah Whisperoak, the principal of #{mapnames.luviniacity}. He should be at the local #{placenames.abbey}.
ev15.lilith5: But we can’t leave \n[1] alone... It’d be better if Sir Merrick were here...
ev15.leonardo1: Don’t worry. As her bodyguard, I’ll take care of her. You two go get help from the Great Bishop.
ev15.lilith6: I want to stay here with \n[1]...
ev15.leonardo2: You have to go, \n[2]! This is for \n[1]'s life. I also need to talk to Sir Merrick if he comes back.
ev15.lilith7: Okay, I’ll leave \n[1] in your hands. Please take care of her.
ev15.lucas1: So, are we ready? Let’s hurry up. No time to waste, or she won’t recover.
ev15.aiko5: Wait! To get to #{mapnames.luviniacity}, we have to cross the #{mapnames.voicelessjungle}. It’s a dark area, so bring something to light the way.
ev15.lilith9: I know, I’ve got this. It should be enough.
ev15.notification0: You’ve received an \c[3]\ii[47]\c[0]. This item lets you light your way. Press \c[3]1\c[0] or click the button at the top left corner to turn it on/off anytime outside of battles.
ev15.notification1: Keep heading South from #{mapnames.seagullport} to reach #{mapnames.luviniacity}. The Waypoint System is now enabled again.

ev20.lydia1: \n[1], it's me, \n[11]. Can you see me? Can you hear me?
ev20.lucas1: She might hear you, but don’t expect a reply just yet.
ev20.father1: Hmm... You did a great job saving her from this awful state, \n[5].
ev20.aiko1: I did what I could, Father.
ev20.lilith1: So, how is she doing, Father Zephaniah?
ev20.father2: Her soul is unstable, but not too bad. She’s got a really strong spirit to endure that spell. Now, I’m going to try to heal her soul.
ev20.lilith2: Will she be able to stand on her own again?
ev20.father3: It depends, but I’m pretty sure she will. Let’s keep it quiet now. I’m going to start.
ev20.father4: Yurika, Goddess of Nature, I beseech you to bless this mortal, to purify her soul and drive away the unholy force inside her mind...
ev20.morrigan1: Geez... Who’s calling me...? I’m... sleeping...
ev20.lilith4: \n[1]!!! It’s me, \n[2]!! Can you hear me???
ev20.morrigan2: Ugh... I can hear you, \n[2]... Stop screaming, or I’ll lose my hearing...
ev20.blanc1: \n[1]!! I was so worried about you!!
ev20.aiko2: I’m so glad to see you again, \n[1]!
ev20.father6: I think the spell worked well. Goddess Yurika, thank you for your blessing!
ev20.lydia2: \n[1]!! It’s me, \n[11]!! I missed you so much!!!
ev20.morrigan3: Oh, \n[11], and everyone... You’re all here?
ev20.lilith5: O-Old man...? Watch your fucking mouth, \n[1]!!! Father Zephaniah just saved your ass from being Queen Hel's pet!! Apologize to him!!
ev20.morrigan5: Oh... I’m... really sorry, Father Zephaniah... I didn’t mean to...
ev20.father7: Hahaha! It’s all good! It’s great to see you safe and sound again.
ev20.morrigan6: Thank you for what you’ve done, Father... I owe you my second life...
ev20.father8: Don’t mention it. It’s my duty as a Great Bishop. You should thank your friends, too. They did a lot for you.
ev20.morrigan7: Yeah... Thank you so much, everyone...
ev20.morrigan8: But I can’t move a muscle yet...
ev20.father9: For now, you can’t move. It’ll take some time to recover. Just rest until tomorrow, and you’ll feel better.
ev20.morrigan9: Ugh... I guess I don’t have a choice... This is gonna be a boring night though...
ev20.lydia3: Don’t worry, \n[1]! I’ll stay here with you tonight and tell you some awesome bedtime stories I learned from Sister Cristiona!
ev20.morrigan10: Haha! Thanks, \n[11]. I’m really looking forward to it.
ev20.morrigan11: Father Zephaniah, it’s already dark outside, so if you don’t mind, please use the spare room to rest. Make yourself at home.
ev20.lilith7: I’ll stay here with you tonight, too, \n[1]. I just want to make sure you’re alright.
ev20.lilith8: And \n[4], thanks for looking after \n[1] while I was gone. I’ll take care of things from now on, so you should get some rest.
ev20.leonardo2: Well, it was my duty as a bodyguard after all.
ev20.lydia4: And then the bandit got executed. His body was hung up brutally in the town square...
ev20.morrigan12: Geez... Stop it, \n[11]. What kind of bedtime story is that...?
ev20.lydia5: But don’t you think it’s awesome?
ev20.morrigan13: *Geez... What the hell did Sister Cristiona teach you...?*
ev20.morrigan14:
Hey, 
[2]! Where are 
[5] and 
[6]? They’re not here?
ev20.lilith9: They’ll rest at my place. I gave them the key. It’s better for them.
ev20.morrigan15: \n[2], what do you think of them?
ev20.lilith10: They’re good people, \n[1]. Even though we just met, they’ve been helping us nonstop, especially this one. Thanks to them, we can see each other again, \n[1].
ev20.lilith11: Fighting alongside \n[5], I know she wasn’t lying to us. I can feel the power of a Goddess in her. She’s kind, careful, and really tolerant.
ev20.lilith12: And \n[6] might be harsh sometimes, but he never abandons his friends, especially in dangerous situations. He’s truly responsible and reliable.
ev20.lydia6: That’s right, \n[1]! They’re so cool! One day, I want to be like that, too!!
ev20.morrigan16: Yeah, I agree. It’s great to be friends with them.
ev20.lilith13: Now get some rest, \n[1]. You’ll be fine by tomorrow.

ev28.father1: So, how are you feeling today, \n[1]?
ev28.morrigan1: It feels damn good to be alive again, Father.
ev28.father2: Wow, your recovery is faster than usual. Normally, it takes at least a week for people, but you bounced back overnight. I'm impressed.
ev28.lilith1: She’s tough, both physically and mentally. I’ve never seen her get sick before.
ev28.blanc1: Thank the Goddess you’re okay, \n[1]. Honestly, all I have left is Plati, you, and \n[2].
ev28.morrigan2: Yeah, we’ve lost everything too... The Eclipse, Harley, our friends, our crew... it’s all gone.
ev28.morrigan3: I’m gonna kill that fucker! Him and all his minions! I’m going to wipe them out!
ev28.father3: I’ve heard everything from \n[5]. I get that Ryan deserves to die, but let’s make this the end of it.
ev28.morrigan4: Not enough, Father! It’s not just about ending it.
ev28.father4: Even if you kill them all, you can’t bring your friends back. All you’re doing is dirtying your own soul. Think about it, \n[1]!
ev28.morrigan5: It’s not about bringing them back, Father. And it’s not about justice either. I want that cocksucker to feel the pain of losing everything before his fucking eyes!
ev28.morrigan6: Thanks for caring, but this is my fight, and I’ll handle it my way, no matter the cost.
ev28.lucas1: She’s right, Father. We can’t show mercy to these kinds of demons.
ev28.blanc2: I need to avenge my people, \n[1]!
ev28.leonardo1: Your enemies are my enemies, Lady \n[1]!
ev28.morrigan8: \n[5] and \n[6], I know we just met, but can we team up to take down Ryan together?
ev28.aiko2: How could we not trust you? I know you’re good people. Together, we’ll make a strong team.
ev28.morrigan9: Of course! Thanks for having our backs.
ev28.father6: I won’t stop you from what you believe is right, but Ryan seems pretty powerful. You need some serious training to get stronger, both physically and mentally.
ev28.lucas3: You’re right, Father. Have you got any ideas?
ev28.father7: I can introduce you to another Bishop. She’s a good friend and might be able to help you.
ev28.aiko3: That’s awesome, Father Zephaniah! Thank you! But how do we meet her?
ev28.father8: Hang on a second. Let me write an introduction letter.
ev28.father9: Alright, it’s done. Here you go.
ev28.father10: Take this to Mother Einhart Sylvian at the Cathedral in #{mapnames.valenkacity} and tell her I sent you.
ev28.father11: I hope you know what you’re getting into, my children.
ev28.lucas4: We know, Father. And soon Ryan and his goons will find us because we’ve got one of the #{lorewords.dimensionalshards}.
ev28.father12: You have a #{lorewords.dimensionalshards}? Where did you find it?
ev28.aiko4: We got it after we took down the Shadow Fiend.
ev28.father13: So that was the Shadow Fiend...
ev28.aiko5: What’s wrong, Father? You look a bit off.
ev28.father14: You probably saw a glowing ritual circle in the #{mapnames.voicelessjungle}. Two things were born from it in the past, and the first was the Shadow Fiend, representing the dark side.
ev28.aiko6: So the second one stands for the good side? What is it?
ev28.father15: That’s what’s been on my mind. I had a theory, but I’m not sure... and I hope it’s not true.
ev28.aiko7: Can you at least tell us, Father?
ev28.father16: Sorry, I can’t share that right now. It is uncertain anyway... I hope you understand.
ev28.morrigan10: It’s alright, Father. We all have our secrets.
ev28.father17: I’m going to take \n[11] back to our city now. You all should find Mother Einhart Sylvian as soon as possible because you’re in danger. May Goddess Yurika be with you.
ev28.morrigan11: Thanks for everything you’ve done for us, Father.
ev28.lydia1: Goodbye, \n[1], everyone! I hope we meet again soon! It was so great to hang out with you!
ev28.morrigan12: Bye, \n[11]. Take care of yourself. Next time we meet, I’ll share my own 'bedtime stories', okay?
ev28.leonardo2: She’s such a sweet girl. Who would abandon a daughter like that, I wonder?
ev28.morrigan13: Yeah... I can’t help but wonder about her parents too.
ev28.lilith4: Guys! Focus! This isn’t the time to get sidetracked! Remember our battle with that... uh... Subject M? I’m still worried about one thing.
ev28.lilith5: You and \n[6] might not realize this since you haven’t fought much alongside \n[1], but does anyone have a clue about his fighting style?
ev28.morrigan14: I know him, but I didn’t get a chance to fight him...
ev28.lilith6: What about you, \n[3] and \n[4]? Did you pick up on anything?
ev28.leonardo3: Now that you mention it! His fighting style is so similar to \n[1]!
ev28.blanc3: I was just thinking that too...
ev28.morrigan15: Wait, same as mine? How the hell is that possible?
ev28.lilith7: That’s exactly what I’m wondering... I’ve never seen anyone with your style until now...
ev28.morrigan16: Who the fuck is that guy? I’m gonna beat the shit out of him for copying my unique style!
ev28.leonardo4: But they’re strong too. I doubt it’ll be easy to take them down. We should definitely get some training from Mother Einhart Sylvian first.
ev28.lucas5: \n[4] is right. We need to head to #{mapnames.valenkacity} to meet Mother Einhart ASAP.
ev28.morrigan17: I don’t have good memories about that place, but whatever... We’ll get there through Valenka South Gate, right?
ev28.aiko9: Yep. Since East and West gates are restricted, South Gate is our only option. We’ll have to get through #{mapnames.valenkaoutpost} first.
ev28.morrigan18: Sounds like a plan. Now let’s move!
ev28.lilith8: Wait! Are you really feeling okay, \n[1]?
ev28.morrigan19: This isn’t the time for worrying, \n[2]. After what HE did to us, I can’t just sit around.
ev28.morrigan20: Don’t worry. We’ve got our loyal friends here to back us up. Now, let’s head to #{mapnames.valenkacity}!
ev28.notification1: You can get to #{mapnames.valenkaoutpost} by going \c[2]West\c[0] from #{mapnames.luviniacity}.

ev88.aiko1: #{mapnames.luviniacity}, a lively and religious city. It used to be a Kingdom, just like Merinberg, but after the Four-Kingdom War, they gave up that title.
ev88.aiko2: Even though Emi, the Goddess of Sun, watches over this world, people here actually worship Yurika, the Goddess of Nature.
ev88.aiko3: Thanks! I’ve worked with the Great Bishop Zephaniah a bunch of times, and he’s the one who taught me all this.
ev88.aiko4: It’s the biggest building in the city, right at the center.
ev88.lilith2: We should get moving then. Time's running out.

ev24.blanc1: Wow...! This church is massive too...!
ev24.sister1: Excuse me, travelers! How can I help you?
ev24.lilith1: We’re looking for Great Bishop Zephaniah Whisperoak.
ev24.sister2: Do you have an appointment with Father Zephaniah? If not, I’m afraid I can’t assist you. He’s really busy right now.
ev24.aiko2: Sister Cristiona, long time no see!
ev24.sister4: \n[5]? Oh wow! It’s really you! It’s so great to see you again! I bet the kids here have missed you like crazy!
ev24.aiko3: Yeah, I’ve missed them too! But first, I need to talk to Father Zephaniah. Can you help me out?
ev24.sister6: Right, miss \n[2]. Like I said, Father Zephaniah is pretty busy right now, but I’ll see what I can do. In the meantime, feel free to relax in our #{placenames.restingchamber}. I’ll let you know as soon as I can.
ev24.aiko5: I really hope she can help us. For now, let’s head to the #{placenames.restingchamber}.
ev24.aiko6: Don’t worry, \n[2]. Everything’s going to be fine, I promise.
ev24.notification1: You can get to the #{placenames.restingchamber} this way.

ev27.lilith1: Yeah, it's me, \n[11]. I promised I’d visit one day. Remember?
ev27.lydia2: Of course! I remember! I’m so happy to see you again!
ev27.aiko1: You’re still as cheerful as ever, \n[11].
ev27.lydia3: \n[5]!! \n[6]!! You’re here too? Wait, hold up!! You guys know each other?
ev27.lilith2: Yeah, we had some stuff happen, and now we’re working together...
ev27.lydia4: Wow! That’s amazing! I wish I could join you someday! I want to see the world too!
ev27.lydia5: What’s wrong, \n[2]? You don’t look so good. And where’s \n[1]? I want to meet her too.
ev27.lilith4: \n[1]... is sick... She’s not doing well right now... We’re here to find some help.
ev27.lydia6: What...? I can’t believe it... How bad is it?
ev27.lydia7: Oh my Goddess... I’m so sorry, \n[2]...
ev27.aiko2: That’s why we’re here, \n[11]. We need help from Father Zephaniah. Sister Cristiona is going to let him know.
ev27.lydia8: I wish I could do something... I really miss \n[1]...
ev27.lydia9: But I’m sure she’ll be okay!! She’s a tough warrior!! She won’t give up easily!! I’ll pray to Goddess Yurika to bless her!
ev27.lilith6: Thank you, \n[11]. That means a lot.
ev27.sister2: Father Zephaniah wants you to come by his office. He’s waiting for you.
ev27.aiko4: Oh! Thank you so much, Sister Cristiona! We’re on our way!
ev27.sister3: Don’t mention it, \n[5]. You’ve helped us a lot before, and now it’s our turn to repay you.
ev27.sister4: I don’t think that’s a good idea. By the way, have you finished your studies, \n[11]?
ev27.lydia11:
I’m done, sister! I want to go with 
[2] and 
[5]. This is about 
[1], their friend, and my friend too! I’m really worried about her!
ev27.aiko5: Could you please make an exception and let her come with us? She’s our friend after all.
ev27.sister7: But \n[11], remember to be a good girl and don’t interfere with our guests here, okay?
ev27.sister8: Make sure to get to his office in the tower as soon as you can. You’ll find the way up in our #{placenames.conferencehall}.
ev27.aiko7: It’s on the opposite side of this chamber.

ev23.father1: Ah! You made it. Have a seat. Sorry about the mess. I haven’t had time to tidy up.
ev23.aiko1: No problem, Father. Let me introduce you to my new friends. This is \n[2] Harventon and \n[3] Silverhawk.
ev23.father2: It's an honor to meet you both. I'm Zephaniah Whisperoak.
ev23.father3: So, how’s everything going? You’re still after that ‘demon’?
ev23.lucas1: Not great, Father. He recently showed up at #{placenames.verdurousleaftemple}, but we couldn’t stop him...
ev23.father4: If only I could turn back the clock forty years... but I’m too old for that now. *Cough* I wish I could do more to help...
ev23.lucas2: You don’t need to push yourself. What you’ve done for us is invaluable. Without your research, we wouldn’t even know about the Relics and #{lorewords.dimensionalshards}.
ev23.aiko2: Exactly, Father. We can handle the rest.
ev23.father5: I understand... *Cough* But Sister Cristiona mentioned you had something urgent that needed my help. Is that right?
ev23.aiko3: Yes, Father. It’s about one of my friends. Her soul and mind were damaged by Ryan's #{termwords.blackmagic}.
ev23.father6: What? How is she doing now?
ev23.aiko4: I managed to save her life, but she’s... kinda unstable right now.
ev23.father7: This is serious! If she doesn’t get treatment soon, she could end up in a fate worse than death!
ev23.lilith2: Father, please! I’m begging you! You have to save \n[1]!!! She’s all I have left!!
ev23.father8: Of course, I’ll help. That’s my responsibility, my daughter. But I need you to do me a favor first. It’s for your friend.
ev23.lilith3: I’ll do anything, Father! Just tell me what I need to do, and I’ll take care of it!
ev23.father9: I need some \c[1]Spirit Herbs\c[0]. Without them, I can’t purify your friend's soul, \n[2]. Can you go to the #{placenames.spiritwell} and get some for me?
ev23.aiko5: It’s located east of the city, near #{mapnames.seishinwood}.
ev23.father10: That’s right. Bring me six of them, and I can make a cure.
ev23.lilith5: You can count on us, Father! We’re heading out right now!
ev23.father11: Do it quickly before the Shadow Fiend shows up. You really don’t want to run into it.
ev23.aiko6: Shadow Fiend? I thought we sealed it in the well two years ago, Father? How is this happening?
ev23.father12: That was a mistake, \n[5]... I didn’t see this coming...
ev23.father13: We thought the holy spirits in the well would keep it under control, but that was a miscalculation, \n[5]... The Shadow Fiend consumed them all...
ev23.aiko8: My Goddess... What about the #{placenames.spiritwell} now, Father?
ev23.father14: The #{placenames.spiritwell} and #{mapnames.seishinwood} are crawling with ghosts and spooks... I had no choice but to set up barricades and a strong barrier to protect the city...
ev23.aiko9: So there’s nothing we can do now...?
ev23.father15: I’m afraid that’s the case... Talk to the guard there, and he’ll let you through. And remember, don’t go near the well \c[1]at night\c[0], or you might be in real trouble.
ev23.father16: Good luck, my children. Life is precious, so don’t act recklessly.

ev16p2.sfather1: I’ve heard everything from the guard. I can’t believe you actually managed to deal with the Shadow Fiend...
ev16p2.saiko1: It was thanks to these friends that we finally did something about it. You don’t have to worry about the Shadow Fiend anymore, Father.
ev16p2.sfather2: I can’t thank you enough, my children. You’re the real heroes of this city.
ev16p2.saiko2: Don’t mention it, Father. We did what we could. Now, can we get back to work?
ev16p2.sfather3: Of course. But first, take this as my thanks. It’s a very rare item, and you deserve it.
ev16p2.saiko3: Thank you so much, Father Zephaniah!
ev16p2.father1: Now it’s time to see your friend, \n[2]. Where is she?
ev16p2.lilith1: She’s at her house in #{mapnames.haravitown}, Father!
ev16p2.father2: \n[11], could you please gather my things?
ev16p2.lilith2: I’m sorry for bothering you, Father... You have to drop everything just to help me...
ev16p2.father3: What are you talking about? \n[5]'s friends are my friends! My work can wait. Saving a soul takes priority!
ev16p2.lilith3: Thank you, Father Zephaniah. I really owe you for this...
ev16p2.father4: You don’t owe me anything, \n[2]. This is my responsibility, and I’m more than happy to help.
ev16p2.father6: Now let’s go! Your friend can’t wait any longer!
ev16p2.lydia3: Father... Can I come with you?
ev16p2.father7: I’m not sure that’s a good idea, \n[11].
ev16p2.lydia4: But \n[1] is my friend too... I’m really worried about her... Please, Father! I promise I’ll be good! Just let me go with you!
ev16p2.father8: Okay, but stay close to me, alright?
ev16p2.father9: I’ll take \n[11] to #{mapnames.haravitown} first. We’ll meet up there.

ev26.zephaniah1: I still can’t believe such a thing is possible... resurrecting the dead...
ev26.einhart1: I didn’t want to believe it either, but we all witnessed the truth...
ev26.zephaniah2: Now I understand why \n[1] couldn’t hold back her anger back then. Poor child... *cough cough*
ev26.einhart2: You should get some rest, Father.
ev26.zephaniah3: I can’t, Mother Einhart. Every time I close my eyes, I see \n[11]’s face, her bright smile... and it haunts me...
ev26.zephaniah5: I’m fine... Don’t worry... *cough* Mother Einhart is waiting for you.
ev26.einhart3: You said there was something you wanted to discuss, right?
ev26.einhart4: That’s new to me, but it sounds like a place between realities. What about it?
ev26.lucas2: We suspect that Ryan is hiding there, preparing his plan, just like he did back in Cindrivia.
ev26.lucas3: Back then, we were able to enter Cindrivia’s #{lorewords.dimensionalcrack} with the help of three Chronomancers and their master. But now...
ev26.aiko1: We spoke with Mister #{npcnames.valenkaalchemist} and his former student. They told us to go to #{mapnames.sereneisland} and seek help from the elves, as they are masters of magic.
ev26.aiko2: However, Mister Albanus doesn’t know anyone there, so he suggested we ask if you might have an acquaintance who could assist us.
ev26.einhart5: I think I do. It’s been a long time, but I hope he still remembers me.
ev26.einhart6: Father Gadaric once took me to #{mapnames.sereneisland} to meet \c[4]Professor Balthazar\c[0], so I could study elven magic.
ev26.einhart7: I must admit, he can be quite intimidating, but he is trustworthy. His knowledge of magic is on an entirely different level, so he may know something about Time-Space magic.
ev26.lucas4: How do we find him? And how can we convince him that you sent us? Writing another letter?
ev26.einhart8: *sigh* He’s extremely cautious, so a letter alone wouldn’t be enough. I suppose it can’t be helped...
ev26.einhart10: What choice do I have? This is the most reliable way to let him know I sent you.
ev26.morrigan1: What’s so special about this bangle?
ev26.leonardo2: It’s her most precious possession. I remember the first time she showed it to me, she looked like she could fly and said, ‘Look, Leo! I was acknowledged by the Master of Magic! No one else has ever received this but me!’
ev26.leonardo3: Even three days later, she was still completely enchanted by it, staring at it and smiling day and night.
ev26.einhart12: \n[4], if you dare say one more word, I will kill you on the spot.
ev26.leonardo4: Haha! Sorry, Einhart. I was just reminiscing about our good old memories.
ev26.einhart13: Ahem...!! That bangle was a gift Professor Balthazar gave me after I completed his course with excellent results.
ev26.einhart14: Show it to him, and he’ll know that I sent you.
ev26.lilith3: #{mapnames.sereneisland} lies deep within the #{mapnames.sanguineocean}, but our ship has already been destroyed...
ev26.lilith4: It would take us months to build a new one...
ev26.morrigan2: Oh, shit!! I completely forgot about that...
ev26.zephaniah6: If you need a ship, you may borrow mine.
ev26.zephaniah7: I have one docked at the harbor in #{mapnames.shiroitown}. Give me your \ii[35], and I’ll sign it to authorize your use.
ev26.zephaniah8: Don’t worry about it. I’m also fulfilling \n[11]’s final wish... *cough cough* And here, take my \ii[66] too.
ev26.lilith6: Thank you, Father Zephaniah. We’ll take good care of it.
ev26.zephaniah9: That’s... *cough cough* the least I can do...
ev26.einhart15: By the way, how many Relics have already been destroyed?
ev26.einhart16: So instead of waiting for him to come to you, you plan to confront him directly in his hideout?
ev26.lucas5: Yeah. For years, we’ve only been chasing his trail. But this time will be different.
ev26.lucas6: Once we figure out a way to enter the #{lorewords.dimensionalcrack}, we’ll strike first.
ev26.lucas7: And if we fail to defeat him, we’ll find a way to trap him inside forever.
ev26.einhart17: I wish I could fight alongside you, but I cannot leave #{mapnames.valenkacity}.
ev26.einhart18: Still, I’ll support you in any way I can, for the sake of this world.
ev26.einhart19: For now, all I can do is wish you luck. Stay safe.
ev26.aiko4: Thank you. We won’t let you down.
ev26.zephaniah10: Mother Einhart, you should return to #{mapnames.valenkacity} as well. I’m sure much work awaits you.
ev26.einhart20: Will you be all right, Father Zephaniah?
ev26.zephaniah11: Don’t worry. I may be old, but this is nothing serious. Besides, the nuns will take care of me.
ev26.einhart21: I understand. Just don’t overdo it, Father.
ev26.morrigan3: We’ll be heading out now. If you’d like, we can escort you back to #{mapnames.valenkacity}, Einhart.
ev26.einhart22: It’s fine. It’s only a short walk from here. I don’t want to waste your time.
ev26.morrigan4: Alright then. See you later, Einhart, Father Zephaniah.

ev8.lilith1: Is that the well Father Zephaniah mentioned?
ev8.blanc1: So we really need to steer clear of it at night...
ev8.lilith2: But \n[5], what exactly is this 'Shadow Fiend'? You dealt with it before, right?
ev8.aiko1: Yeah... It’s that evil spirit from #{mapnames.voicelessjungle}. It attacked #{mapnames.luviniacity} two years ago. \n[6] and I were there, so we stepped in to help.
ev8.aiko2: But we couldn’t beat it, so we sealed it in the spirit well, hoping the holy spirits would keep it in check.
ev8.aiko3: But things turned out like Father Zephaniah warned... I really wish I could do something about it now...
ev8.lilith3: How will you know if you don’t at least try?
ev8.aiko4: The Shadow Fiend was strong enough to take on the city by itself two years ago. And now it’s even more dangerous after devouring all those holy spirits in the well. The risk is just too high, \n[2]!
ev8.lilith4: But you’ll never find out what you’re capable of unless you take a chance. That’s how \n[1] and I have rolled for years. You really want to do something about this, right \n[5]?
ev8.lucas2: If you want to give it a shot, go for it. But if things go south, you better run for your damn life. Don’t expect us to bail you out, okay?

ev6.lilith1: That came from the well out there!
ev6.aiko1: This... This is the well that sealed the Shadow Fiend!!
ev6.blanc2: L-Let's get the hell outta here... Something feels off... This cloud is making me dizzy...
ev6.lilith2: Yeah, I feel it too... We need to haul ass!
ev6.lucas1: This isn’t good! Get out of here! Now!
ev6.aiko5: I think you two got hit by its unholy cloud. But hey, we took it down, and you both did great!
ev6.lucas2: We just got lucky this time. Don’t count on Sora the Goddess of Fortune to help us out next time.
ev6.lilith5: Yeah... I know... Let's get back to---
ev6.lilith6: Hey! Wait a second! What the hell is this thing?
ev6.lucas3: Definitely a #{lorewords.dimensionalshards}, the #{lorewords.shardofdeath}. I can’t believe the Shadow Fiend was holding onto this.
ev6.lilith7: What are we gonna do with it?
ev6.lucas4: We’re taking it. Better it’s with us than letting Ryan get his hands on it.
ev6.lucas5: Now let’s get back to the city. We need to report to Father Zephaniah.

ev52.lucas1: #{mapnames.valenkaoutpost}, also known as the South Gate of Valenka. It’s the main entry for merchants and travelers to get into #{mapnames.valenkacity}. No surprise bandits love this spot.
ev52.lilith1: Yeah, we had to fight off some bandits here before when they tried to rob us. That’s why #{mapnames.valenkacity} set up a small camp to protect their shipments.
ev52.leonardo1: Don’t be fooled by that. Bandits only show up when they see an opportunity.
ev52.aiko1: Stay alert. Valenka City’s close, and we don’t need any trouble before we get there.
ev52.blanc2: \n[2] mentioned the soldiers set up camp here, so we should be fine... right?
ev52.morrigan1: They don’t give a damn about us, \n[3]. They only care about their goods and shipments.
ev52.blanc3: Seriously...? I thought soldiers were supposed to protect people...
ev52.morrigan2: We’re not their people, so don’t count on it. Let’s stop wasting time and get into the city.

ev52p3.lilith1: We need to meet someone inside the city.
ev52p3.lilith2: That's our own business, so I can’t say.
ev52p3.guard3: Hmm... Show me your merchant card then!
ev52p3.guard4: No merchant card, no entry. The city’s restricting travelers for now. So, get lost!
ev52p3.leonardo1: Wait! Don’t you recognize me? The greatest magus of all time, \n[4]!
ev52p3.guard5: Your dumb face could be anywhere. Now scram!
ev52p3.blanc1: Do you know who this lady is...? She’s \n[1] Bla---
ev52p3.morrigan2: It’s fine. We’ll come back with our merchant card.
ev52p3.guard6: Good. Don’t waste more time, get out of the way.
ev52p3.lucas1: You seem to have a history with this place, right, \n[1]?
ev52p3.leonardo2: Her father, Merrick Blackpearl, was Valenka’s Legendary Swordmaster, and her mother, Amelia Blackpearl, the Legendary Wizard. Lady \n[1] was born here too.
ev52p3.lucas2: Why didn’t you tell them, \n[1]? It’d make things easier.
ev52p3.aiko1: Don’t pressure her, \n[6]. I know you have an issue with this city, right?
ev52p3.lilith4: You guessed it. She can’t just---
ev52p3.morrigan3: I don’t want to. Besides, they wouldn’t believe it. Who remembers someone who left at two years old?
ev52p3.morrigan4: And this city... it’s the reason my mother’s gone. If it weren’t for business, I’d never come back.
ev52p3.morrigan5: Don’t worry about it. Business is business. Let’s just find a way in.
ev52p3.npc1: Hey... trying to get into the city? Come over here... I can help, but I need a favor.
ev52p3.morrigan6: Who are you? And why help us?
ev52p3.npc2: Just come over. Let’s talk first.
ev52p3.npc3: Like I said, I can get you into the city, but I need you to do something for me first.
ev52p3.npc4: My husband was taken by bandits. They dragged him to #{mapnames.chaoticswamp}. Without him, I can’t enter the city either, and we still have a cart of soil to deliver.
ev52p3.morrigan8: So you want us to rescue him, huh?
ev52p3.npc5: Yes. If you find him and bring him back safe, we’ll go into the city together as a group.
ev52p3.morrigan9: Deal. Wait here, we’ll find him.
ev52p3.npc6: Thank you so much. I heard they took him to an \c[4]abandoned mine\c[0] in the #{mapnames.chaoticswamp}. Head \c[4]west\c[0] from here, and you might find him. Please be careful.

ev63.bandit1: What’s that in your hands? Hand it over, or we’ll cut them off!
ev63.bandit2: Didn’t you hear me? Hand it over! Now!
ev63.morrigan1: That girl... always finding ways to get herself into trouble. Maybe I should just let them chop her hands off this time.
ev63.lilith1: Just wait a second, \n[5]. You’ll see what she’s about to do.
ev63.morrigan2: Oh, \n[14], should I let them chop your hands off this time? Huh?
ev63.kyungri3: If you do, you’ll never get your debt paid off!
ev63.morrigan3: Oh? Are you threatening me now?
ev63.bandit4: Hey! Are you all joking around?! We’re still here, you know!!
ev63.lucas1: Quit messing around, \n[1]. Let’s deal with them.
ev63.morrigan4: Alright, alright. Time for some action.
ev63.kyungri5: Thank you, guys!! You saved my life again!
ev63.morrigan5: Now hand over whatever it is you took from the #{npcnames.blacksmith}.
ev63.kyungri6: W-W-What are you talking about? I-I didn’t take anything...
ev63.morrigan6: Don’t even try to play dumb with me! You took something you shouldn’t have. Hand it over, or I swear, I’ll be the one chopping off hands!
ev63.kyungri8: Fine, fine! Here it is! And the #{termwords.gold} I promised, too...
ev63.morrigan7: I don’t need the #{termwords.gold}. Keep it.
ev63.kyungri9: Huh? That’s not like you at all, \n[1]. What’s going on?
ev63.morrigan8: Listen, \n[14]. Use it to start fresh. Stop stealing, stop getting into trouble. You’re my friend, and I’m tired of pulling you out of messes like this.
ev63.morrigan9: You’re better than this. Promise me you’ll change. This might be the last time we cross paths, anyway.
ev63.kyungri11: I’m sorry, \n[1]... I’ve done nothing but drag you and your friends into my problems...
ev63.kyungri12: But I’ll try. I really will.
ev63.kyungri13: Wait... why’d you say this might be the last time we see each other?
ev63.morrigan11: Don’t worry about it. Just keep your promise, okay?
ev63.kyungri14: I’ll try. Maybe I’ll start over at #{mapnames.seagullport}. Thanks for the advice, \n[1]. You’re a real friend.
ev63.kyungri15: Next time we meet, I’ll show you what I can do!
ev63.lilith3: You think she’ll really be okay?
ev63.morrigan12: She’ll be fine. After all this time stealing and getting into trouble, she’s still alive, isn’t she?
ev63.blanc1: So... we’re really not going to see her again?
ev63.morrigan13: We’ve got bigger things ahead. A real fight’s waiting for us, so...
ev63.lucas2: Hey! Don’t go jinxing it. We’re not losing to Ryan.
ev63.aiko3: Don’t worry, \n[1]. I believe in us. The Goddess of the Sun is on our side.
ev63.morrigan14: Let’s head back and give Han his hammer. He’s got work to do.

ev3.morrigan1: This has gotta be the abandoned mine that woman talked about. Damn, it reminds me of the #{placenames.coalmine}.
ev3.blanc1: She said her husband might be trapped here...
ev3.lilith1: This place is massive. It might take a while to find him.
ev3.morrigan2: Don't worry. Trust me, this is gonna be fun!
ev3.aiko1: Fun? What do you mean by that?
ev3.lucas1: Haha! I think I know what she means. Yeah, this’ll definitely be fun.
ev3.aiko2: I’m still not following. What are you two plotting?
ev3.morrigan3: You’ll see soon enough. Now come on, let’s go find the lucky guy.

ev4.lilith1: What are you doing? Those bandits already beat the hell outta him!
ev4.morrigan2: I just wanna wake him up. He looks fine to me.
ev4.lilith2: Hey, you good? Can you stand?
ev4.lilith3: Your wife’s been worried sick. She sent us to find you. What happened?
ev4.merchantmale2: I had a treasure map that pointed here, so the bandits dragged me in.
ev4.lilith4: Where are they? Not guarding you?
ev4.merchantfemale1: Surprised? Just a little trick to lure you dumbasses right into our trap.
ev4.merchantmale4: Haha! Now, if you wanna leave here in one piece, hand over all your cash!
ev4.morrigan3: This is the fun I was talking about. Saw it coming a mile away.
ev4.merchantmale5: Oh yeah, smart-ass? If you knew, why’d you still walk into it?
ev4.morrigan4: Because we’ve got business, and you’ve got a role to play.
ev4.morrigan5: After you. Just don’t kill them.
ev4.morrigan6: Thought you wanted our money. Now what?
ev4.blanc1: I’m dying to punch him in the face...
ev4.merchantmale7: W-Wait! No need for violence... we can work this out, right?
ev4.merchantfemale2: What are you doing, you monster?!
ev4.morrigan7: That’s right, we’re monsters. Now it’s your turn to give us what we want.
ev4.morrigan8: Didn’t you say we could enter #{mapnames.valenkacity} with you two as a group using your merchant card?
ev4.morrigan9: But your 'husband' seems out of commission right now, so we’ll head into #{mapnames.valenkacity} on our own.
ev4.morrigan10: Then how about you hand over that merchant card?
ev4.merchantfemale5: I-I get it... H-Here... just leave us alone...
ev4.morrigan11: Thanks. Have a great day, and take good care of your 'husband'.
ev4.morrigan12: Here we go, our very own merchant card. Now we can officially stroll into #{mapnames.valenkacity}.
