ev4.lilith5: So this was the 'fun' part you mentioned. You’re making me feel like we’re the bandits here, \n[1].
ev4.lilith6: And \n[3], maybe be a little gentler next time? That guy might not wake up for two days.
ev4.aiko2: Even with the card, this doesn’t sit right with me.
ev4.leonardo1: That card probably isn’t even theirs. They must’ve stolen it from some poor merchants.
ev4.lucas2: What’s done is done. We’re using it to get into #{mapnames.valenkacity}. Don’t feel sorry for bandits—they live by dirty work.

ev265.blanc1: Wow...! So this is the capital of Valkadia. What a massive city...
ev265.leonardo1: Welcome to #{mapnames.valenkacity}. Make yourself at home.
ev265.lucas1: You’re talking like it’s your own city, huh?
ev265.lilith1: Well, technically, it kinda is. His parents were part of the Royal Army here.
ev265.blanc2: \n[1], this is your hometown too, right...? You're the---
ev265.morrigan1: Let's not get into that, alright? I don’t wanna talk about the past. We’re here for a job, nothing else.
ev265.aiko1: Exactly. We need to find Mother Einhart Sylvian ASAP. You said you used to live here, so you know her, right, \n[4]?
ev265.leonardo2: Not really sure... Back when I left, Father Gadaric was still the Pope.
ev265.lilith2: We’ll figure it out soon enough. Gathering intel is what the Eclipse does best, right, \n[1]?
ev265.morrigan2: I’m guessing she’s at the Cathedral, but it’s already midnight. We shouldn’t bother her now. Let’s hit the #{placenames.inn} and rest up first.

ev307.lilith1: Looks like it. Let's head in.
ev307.kyungri1: Ow! Watch where you're going, you dumb---
ev307.morrigan2: Kyungri? What the hell are you doing here?
ev307.morrigan3: Oh, it’s good to see you’re still in one piece. Remember our little deal, dear Kyungri?
ev307.kyungri4: I-I'll pay you! Just not now, okay? Please, stay out of my way!!
ev307.morrigan5: Hey! Don’t let anyone take your hands just yet! You still owe me, remember?
ev307.aiko1: W-Who is she? Seems like she’s in \n[1]'s debt.
ev307.morrigan6: She’s an old friend of mine and \n[2]'s. Always causing trouble, but I gotta give it to her, she’s one hell of a thief.
ev307.morrigan7: Not that I encouraged it, but she went down that road anyway.
ev307.morrigan8: Lucky for her, she’s never stolen from me, or I’d be the one cutting her hands off.
ev307.lilith2: \n[1]'s just messing with you. We were really close, until she left to do her thing.
ev307.lilith3: We only ran into her again a few days ago and---
ev307.lucas1: Alright, that’s enough. We didn’t come here for a reunion.
ev307.morrigan9: Yeah, yeah. You're right. Let’s move.

kyungriclues.morrigan1: Excuse me! Do you happen to see a girl at my age, a bit shorter than me, brown hair with a goggles on her head passing by?
kyungriclues.oldman1: Hmm... I think I saw someone like you just described. She was running south in a hurry.
kyungriclues.morrigan3: Hi, ma'am! Do you happen to see a girl at my age, a bit shorter than me, brown hair with a goggles on her head passing by?
kyungriclues.oldwoman1: She has just passed by half an hour ago and heading south. I was so scared that she almost hit me...
kyungriclues.morrigan5: Hey kid! Have you seen a girl at my age, a bit shorter than me, brown hair with a goggles on her head passing by?
kyungriclues.kid1: Yes! I saw her running toward the south gate about fifteen minutes ago. She looked quite in a hurry and even dropped some gold. I tried to call her back but she did not hear.
kyungriclues.morrigan6: Well, thanks! Just keep the gold she dropped and buy something for yourself.
kyungriclues.morrigan7: Don't worry about that. It's not her gold anyway.
kyungriclues.lucas1: Seems like she has left the city to #{mapnames.valenkaoutpost}.
kyungriclues.morrigan8: Let's go. She must be somewhere in #{mapnames.valenkaoutpost}.

ev287.morrigan2: Mister #{npcnames.valenkaalchemist}!! We need to talk, right now!!
ev287.lilith1: You sound like a debt collector, \n[1]...
ev287.leonardo1: \n[1], there’s a note on the door.
ev287.morrigan4: Oh? What the hell is this...?
ev287.morrigan5: 'I'm out of the city for a trip to #{mapnames.shiroitown}. Will return in a week or two.'
ev287.morrigan6: You’ve got to be kidding me... We just came back from #{mapnames.shiroitown}!
ev287.lilith2: Guess we’re heading back there again now.
ev287.leonardo2: But how are we supposed to find him?
ev287.lilith3: Wait, you don’t know him, \n[4]? Didn’t you live here before?
ev287.leonardo3: I did, but that doesn’t mean I knew everyone.
ev287.leonardo4: I heard of him when I was a kid, but I never met him in person.
ev287.lucas1: We’ve gotta go back to #{mapnames.shiroitown}, right? Why not ask Ryland? He’s probably still around.
ev287.morrigan7: Same thought here. Ryland might know something about him, and we still need to talk to him about Plati, too.

ev35.blanc1: Nom nom... This food is amazing...!
ev35.leonardo1: Everything looks so different now... The whole city’s changed a lot since I was last here.
ev35.morrigan1: I don’t remember a damn thing about this place.
ev35.lucas1: Sitting here, drinking beer like this, reminds me of the time I was in Cindrivia. You probably won’t believe it, but back then, \n[5] was a total foodie.
ev35.aiko1: C-Come on, \n[6]... That was in the past... I-I had to eat that much to keep up the power of Goddess Aiko’s spirit...
ev35.aiko2: But, honestly, the food from Snow Halation town is still the best. I treasure it and the chefs, so I gotta enjoy every bite.
ev35.blanc2: I love food too...! You gotta introduce me to those dishes from your hometown someday...
ev35.morrigan2: Alright, let’s wrap this up and get some rest. It’s getting late.
ev35.einhart1: One more round! This time, I’m winning for sure!
ev35.dealer1: Uh... It’s your choice to play, but... Maybe you should stop here... It’s been ten rounds in a row already...
ev35.einhart2: Then this one’s gonna be my big win! Flip the cards!
ev35.npc1: Oh! Ace of Spades! You’ve got a shot!
ev35.dealer2: Do you want to swap with my card?
ev35.einhart5: No!!! Not again!!! Why do I always lose?!
ev35.dealer3: I’m sorry, Sylvi, but maybe it’s time to call it a night...
ev35.npc3: Well, looks like the fun’s over. Let’s get out of here.
ev35.leonardo2: Wait, did they just call her 'Sylvi'?
ev35.leonardo3: Sort of. Give me a sec.
ev35.einhart8: Whoa! You startled me! What’s up?
ev35.leonardo5: Sorry if I’m mistaken, but... you’re Sylvi, right?
ev35.einhart9: Haha! That’s my childhood nickname. Folks around here still call me that.
ev35.leonardo6: So it’s really you! Do you remember me? It’s Leo!
ev35.einhart10: L-Leo? No way! Is that really you?
ev35.einhart11: Wow! It’s been forever! I can’t believe it! So good to see you again, Leo!
ev35.leonardo8: Yeah, same here! But, uh... are you gambling, Sylvi?
ev35.einhart12: I-It’s just... a new hobby... something to unwind after work...
ev35.leonardo9: Hey, no judgment here. Just make sure you know when to quit. Seems like today wasn’t your lucky day, huh?
ev35.einhart14: So, Leo, what brings you back to #{mapnames.valenkacity}?
ev35.leonardo10: My friends and I are looking for someone, but we don’t have much to go on.
ev35.einhart15: Looking for someone? Leave that to me! Just tell me their name.
ev35.leonardo11: We’re trying to find Mother Einhart Sylvian. Do you know her?
ev35.einhart16: Mother Einhart Sylvian? Don’t you know you’ve already talked to her?
ev35.einhart18: Yep, standing right in front of you.
ev35.leonardo14: W-What...? Y-You’re... Mother Einhart Sylvian?! But I thought your name was Sylvi?
ev35.einhart19: Well, I never told you my full name. We just used our childhood nicknames. My real name is Einhart Sylvian, and, yeah, I’ve been the Pope here for a while now.
ev35.leonardo15: Forgive me, Mother... I should’ve realized sooner...
ev35.einhart20: Oh, come on, Leo! Who taught you to be so formal? Everyone here calls me Sylvi, so you can just do the same. Or call me Einhart, whichever.
ev35.leonardo16: I think I’ll stick with Einhart from now on. We’re not kids anymore, right? You can call me \n[4].
ev35.einhart21: Haha! Alright, \n[4]! You’re still as cute as ever. So, where are your friends?
ev35.leonardo17: They’re right here. Let me introduce you.
ev35.lilith2: I’m \n[2] Harventon. Nice to meet you.
ev35.aiko4: Glad to meet you. I’m \n[5] Kusuda.
ev35.einhart22: Thanks for the warm welcome. Looks like you were looking for me? I’m Einhart Sylvian, current Pope of this city.
ev35.morrigan5: You’re... not exactly what I imagined...
ev35.blanc4: Who’d have thought the Pope would be a gambler?
ev35.einhart23: It’s just... a hobby! And just call me Einhart!
ev35.einhart24: Anyway, I heard from \n[4] that you wanted to meet me?
ev35.morrigan6: Yeah, Father Zephaniah Whisperoak from #{mapnames.luviniacity} sent us with a letter of introduction for you.
ev35.einhart25: Old man Zephaniah, huh? Let me see.
ev35.einhart26: I see... So he wants me to train you?
ev35.morrigan8: Yep, we could really use your help.
ev35.einhart27: No problem! \n[4]’s friends are my friends! I’m happy to help.
ev35.aiko5: Whew...! You made it sound like we were about to get rejected...
ev35.einhart28: Haha! I was just thinking about how best to train you. You’ve all got potential, but I need to see it for myself. Come to the Cathedral tomorrow. You’ve got permission.
ev35.leonardo18: She’s my childhood friend and Father Gadaric’s star disciple. No wonder she’s the Pope. But that means Father Gadaric has passed away...
ev35.morrigan9: What a fascinating person. I’ve never met a Pope who gambles. Now I’m curious what she can do for us.
ev35.aiko6: Even though she’s young, I can feel her magic power. With her on our side, we might finally make some real progress.
ev35.lucas4: You grew up here, so you know where the Cathedral is, right \n[4]?
ev35.leonardo19: Yeah, we can get there by crossing the north bridge. The Cathedral’s inside #{placenames.valenkaroyalpalace}.
ev35.morrigan10: Alright, let’s rest up. Tomorrow’s going to be busy.

ev78.morrigan1: This necklace... Mother always wanted to give this to me herself when I grew up...??
ev78.morrigan2: Are King Cedric’s words true? Did he really value Mother’s life more than his own, even as a king?
ev78.morrigan3: Then why did Father tell me something different? Why did he say Mother was forced into it? Wasn’t he there, witnessing everything when he arrived?
ev78.morrigan4: Ugh... Why is this all so complicated...
ev78.leonardo1: It’s me, \n[4]. Are you alright in there, \n[1]?
ev78.morrigan6: Yeah, I’m fine. Don’t worry about me.
ev78.leonardo2: Mind if I come in for a moment?
ev78.leonardo3: Everyone’s waiting downstairs. I think it’s time for us to collect the \ii[55] from Han.
ev78.leonardo4: You’re still thinking about it, aren’t you? If you want to talk, don’t hold it in. Commander Amelia was like a mother to me too.
ev78.morrigan9: I-I just don’t know what to do, \n[4]... It feels like I’m losing my way...
ev78.morrigan10: The King’s words and what Father told me... They’re completely different...
ev78.morrigan11: I don’t even know who to believe anymore...
ev78.leonardo5: I don’t claim to have the answers, but I knew King Cedric Wisebrook for a while before I left #{mapnames.valenkacity}.
ev78.leonardo6: He’s a kind, steady, and compassionate man...
ev78.leonardo7: I don’t know what exactly Sir Merrick told you, but maybe he saw things from a different perspective.
ev78.leonardo8: So \n[1], take your time and trust your heart. I believe you’ll make the right decision.
ev78.morrigan12: Thanks, \n[4]. I guess you are right. Let’s go! We’ve got work to do!

ev125.blanc1: W-Wait... You used to live in that huge castle, \n[4]?
ev125.leonardo1: Yep. That’s why I went to the Cathedral a lot, to hang out with Einhart when we were kids. Crazy to think she’s the Pope now.
ev125.aiko1: \n[6] and I have never been here before. Look, \n[6]! This place is even more impressive than Cindalia Royal Castle!
ev125.lucas1: Yeah, it’s bringing back memories of when we fought against Julia’s army.
ev125.morrigan1: I have no idea what you two are on about, but we’re heading to the Cathedral, not taking a trip down memory lane. \n[4]?
ev125.leonardo2: Just keep going down this road. The Cathedral’s on the right.

ev128.einhart1: Oh, perfect timing! I was just about to look for you.
ev128.morrigan1: Yeah, same here. Han asked us to let you know he needs a whole day to forge the \ii[55].
ev128.einhart2: Figured as much. Well, nothing we can do about that. In the meantime, I need to introduce you all to someone. Especially you, \n[1].
ev128.morrigan2: Someone? Why do you sound so serious all of a sudden?
ev128.einhart3: Because I know what's weighing on you, \n[1].
ev128.morrigan3: What are you going on about?
ev128.einhart4: You’ve had this heavy burden on you ever since you stepped foot in this city.
ev128.morrigan4: Tch. If it weren’t for the mission, I wouldn’t have come here at all.
ev128.einhart5: And that’s exactly why I want to help you face it.
ev128.morrigan5: What are you trying to say?
ev128.einhart6: King Cedric Wisebrook wants to meet all of you, especially you, \n[1]. He’s sincerely requested your presence at the palace.
ev128.morrigan6: Requested? Ha! He’s just sitting on his throne, barking orders. What could he possibly want with us?
ev128.einhart7: I’m no fortune teller, but I think he has something for you. Something he’s held onto all these years.
ev128.morrigan7: I still don’t see a reason to meet him.
ev128.einhart8: You’re a stubborn one, aren’t you? Look, I’m not forcing you, but he might hold the answers you’ve been avoiding for so long.
ev128.leonardo1: \n[1], I think we should hear him out. I want to know what really happened back then, too.
ev128.morrigan8: Isn’t it obvious? If it weren’t for him, my mother wouldn’t have died, and my father wouldn’t be carrying all this pain.
ev128.einhart9: You need to look at things from both sides, \n[1]. Give yourself a chance, and you might see things differently.
ev128.lilith1: She’s right, \n[1]. You’ve been running from this for so long. Now’s your chance to face it head-on.
ev128.aiko1: I agree with \n[2], \n[1]. You might even uncover something about your mother you didn’t know before.
ev128.morrigan9: Fine! We’ll go. But if he says one thing I don’t want to hear, I’m out of there.
ev128.einhart10: Thank you. I’ll let His Majesty know. Just follow this path to the palace. For being his honored guests, you’re all cleared to enter.
ev128.morrigan10: Don’t worry about me. Let’s just see what he’s got to say.

ev10.crowd1: Where’s Mother Einhart, sister? Is she late for the prayer again? We've been waiting over an hour!
ev10.npc1: I’m really sorry. Please stay calm. I think she’s tied up with her duties. I’ll go find her right away.
ev10.crowd2: Tell her to hurry up. We’ve got things to do, too.
ev10.leonardo1: Busy? Yeah, right. She’s probably just sleeping.
ev10.lilith1: Haha, \n[4], you’re hilarious. There’s no way the Pope would do that, right?
ev10.leonardo2: Wanna bet? Let’s go check. Her office is on the second floor. Just follow that nun.

ev1.einhart1: What... can’t you see I'm sleeping...?
ev1.npc2: Mother Einhart! Now’s not the time for sleeping! People are waiting for the prayer!
ev1.einhart2: Tell them to do it themselves... they know the routine...
ev1.npc3: Y-You can’t say that, Mother! It’s your duty as Pope!
ev1.einhart3: I never asked to be Pope...!!
ev1.leonardo2: Ahem!! Einhart, are you still asleep?
ev1.einhart4: L-\n[4]...? W-Why are you all here...?
ev1.morrigan1: Looks like she’s completely forgotten why we’re here.
ev1.aiko1: Mother Einhart! You told us to meet you this morning, remember?
ev1.einhart5: Oh... Hahaha!! No, no, I didn’t forget! Just didn’t sleep well last night! Wait for me in my office. I’ll take care of the prayer real quick! And stop calling me Mother Einhart, just Einhart!
ev1.leonardo3: No idea... but let's wait in her office.

ev43.lilith1: \n[1]!! That’s not the right spot for you to sit!!!
ev43.morrigan1: Oh, come on! She’s not here, and I’ve got nowhere else to sit.
ev43.lilith2: Mind your manners! What if she sees you sitting there?
ev43.morrigan2: Then I’ll just give it back to her.
ev43.leonardo1: Don’t sweat it, \n[2]. It’s fine to sit there while Einhart’s away.
ev43.aiko1: Hey, can I ask you something, \n[4]?
ev43.aiko2: This is my first time meeting the Valenka Pope. I didn’t expect her to be so young! What’s the story behind that?
ev43.leonardo3: I left #{mapnames.valenkacity} ages ago, so I’m not really in the loop. But she and I were in the same magic class with Father Gadaric until my parents became bodyguards for the Blackpearls. Then I moved to the Royal Castle and became Commander Amelia’s disciple.
ev43.leonardo4: We kept in touch, but not as much after that. After the Four-Kingdom War, I heard that Einhart was the best student of Father Gadaric and the perfect choice for Pope.
ev43.leonardo5: But she didn’t seem happy about it. Being Pope comes with a lot of responsibilities, but she’s such a free spirit.
ev43.lucas1: Yeah, but she’s still the Pope now, right?
ev43.leonardo6: Yeah. I’m not sure what made her change her mind. Maybe it was Father Gadaric’s last wish before he died. Still, she’s not happy, and it shows.
ev43.morrigan3: Free spirit, huh? Maybe she’d fit better in our group than just sitting here praying all the time.
ev43.aiko3: Uh... \n[1]. Can I ask you something? You might not like it, but I’m curious. It’s about---
ev43.morrigan4: The connection between this city and my family, right?
ev43.aiko4: I-I’m sorry! I got too curious. If you don’t want to talk about it, just forget I asked.
ev43.morrigan5: It’s not a big deal. I didn’t mean to hide it; I just don’t really want to get into it.
ev43.morrigan6: I lost my mother when I was two. I don’t remember much about her, but I still feel the love she gave me.
ev43.morrigan7: I just hate this regime, where orders from superiors are absolute.
ev43.morrigan8: Sometimes I wish I could see her again and tell her how much I miss her...
ev43.aiko5: I’m sorry for bringing up bad memories...
ev43.morrigan9: What’s done is done. Dwelling on it won’t help. Bringing the dead back to life is impossible, right?
ev43.lucas2: You might not believe this, but \n[5] and I were dead once. We came back to life thanks to Goddess Aina, the Goddess of the Night Sky.
ev43.lilith4: R-Really...? Is it possible to bring the dead back?
ev43.morrigan10: What’s the point if you need the Goddess’s help? I get that you were revived because you’re the reincarnation of Goddess Aiko.
ev43.morrigan11: No ordinary person gets that kind of honor, right?
ev43.morrigan12: Just forget it. I’m tired now. I think I’ll grab a book and relax.
ev43.lilith5: Hey! Those aren’t yours to touch!
ev43.morrigan13: Oh, come on! Why so serious? I’m just borrowing her book. I promise I’ll return it.
ev43.morrigan14: Let’s see what this is. A spell book with just an... 'incantation'? Weird.
ev43.morrigan15: 'Oh, the divine northern wind. Hear my prayer and come to my side, lending me your power and guiding me to the other world!!'
ev43.morrigan17: Okay, okay! You’re such a chicken shit...
ev43.blanc1: You see...? Their relationship is more than just friends... \n[2] is definitely the mother, while \n[1] is the daughter...
ev43.lilith8: I don’t hear anything! Now put it back!
ev43.lucas3: It looked like a magic circle.
ev43.lilith10: \n[4]!!! Where’s \n[1]???!!! Answer me!!! You know something, right?! Tell me!!!
ev43.leonardo8:
Calm down, 
[2]!! She’s fine!! 
[1] is fine!! It might just be one of Einhart’s teleportation spells, which probably moved 
[1] to another place without hurting her.
ev43.lilith11: S-Sorry... I didn’t mean to... I nearly lost her once. I don’t want it to happen again...
ev43.leonardo9: The problem is... we don’t know where she went, and it might not be safe for her.
ev43.lilith12: Then we need to tell Einhart ASAP!
ev43.aiko9: No! NEVER interrupt the Pope while she’s praying.
ev43.lilith13: So what do we do? Wait three hours for her prayers to finish? By then, \n[1] could be dead!
ev43.leonardo10: The incantation she shouted was a one-time deal, but if it’s Einhart’s magic, I think I can figure it out and activate it again.
ev43.leonardo11: That way, we can go to wherever \n[1] was taken.
ev43.lilith14: For the Goddess’s sake, please do it, \n[4]!!!
ev43.leonardo12: Give me at least an hour. I’ll try to crack it as fast as I can.
ev43.lucas4: Have faith in her. She may be a bit ditzy, but she’s tough.
ev43.blanc3: We’ll go after her. Don’t worry, \n[2]...
ev43.lilith15: Thanks, guys... It’s so good to have friends like you...
ev43.leonardo13: Now, let’s keep it down. Give me some time.
ev43.morrigan21: I remember being in Einhart’s office with everyone... Maybe the spell from that book is some sort of teleportation magic...
ev43.morrigan22: What a joke... This is the second time I’ve ended up in a strange place, and alone again...
ev43.morrigan23: Well, sitting here and whining won’t help. I need to get up and find a way out myself.

ev43p3.einhart1: Sorry, \n[1]. My office is a bit tight, not enough chairs for everyone. Mind sitting there?
ev43p3.morrigan1: Why? Honestly, I’m good here. This couch is so soft, I could nap right now.
ev43p3.einhart2: Haha! You can nap after we finish talking.
ev43p3.einhart3: I know you're all wiped from the fight, but this is important. So, what do you know about the #{lorewords.paradisorelics} and the #{lorewords.dimensionalshards}?
ev43p3.morrigan2: Well, it all started with that old man Zephani---
ev43p3.morrigan4: No worries. I'm terrible at explaining things too.
ev43p3.aiko2: You might not believe this, but... we're all tied to those relics. And to a demon named Ryan.
ev43p3.aiko3:
As for 
[1], 
[2], 
[3], and 
[4], they’re victims of Ryan’s evil.
ev43p3.aiko4: And for me and \n[6], well, we have history with him. We're not even from this world. We come from Cindrivia.
ev43p3.einhart4: Cindrivia?? How did you cross between worlds? Mortals like us can't do that!
ev43p3.lucas1: But she's not just any mortal.
ev43p3.lucas2: Believe it or not, she used to be the Goddess of the Sun, \n[5].
ev43p3.einhart6: What?! I thought divine intervention was strictly forbidden?
ev43p3.lucas3: That’s why I said 'former' Goddess. She gave up her title ages ago, reincarnating as a mortal to save her twin sister, Aina, the Goddess of Night.
ev43p3.einhart7: I mean no offense, but that’s... hard to believe.
ev43p3.leonardo1: They’re telling the truth, Einhart. I didn’t believe it either at first, but now, I can't deny it.
ev43p3.einhart8: Well... if \n[4] trusts your words, I won’t doubt anymore.
ev43p3.einhart9: Not many know of you these days, Goddess Aiko. But I have to ask... why would a ‘former’ Goddess need the help of mortals?
ev43p3.einhart10: If you can intervene in our world, why not just fix it yourself?
ev43p3.aiko5: I’m no longer a Goddess. I was only a vessel for the power of \n[5].
ev43p3.aiko6: After everything that happened in Cindrivia, her soul faded away. There’s nothing left of her inside me.
ev43p3.aiko7: So, I’m just like all of you—mortal, seeking help.
ev43p3.aiko8: Please, hear me out, Einhart. This is about the life and death of the nine worlds.
ev43p3.einhart11: Hearing that from you... I guess there’s nothing more to doubt, \n[5].
ev43p3.einhart12: Now I’m curious... how did you and \n[6] end up in this world?
ev43p3.aiko10: It’s all because of that demon Ryan. He’s trying to start a ‘revolution’, remaking Yggdrasil and all nine worlds.
ev43p3.aiko11: We’ve been chasing him since Cindrivia, and now we’re here, carrying out the will of Goddesses \n[5] and Aina to finish their work, ending Ryan once and for all.
ev43p3.aiko12: But Ryan is a crafty demon. We’re barely keeping up in the race to find the #{lorewords.paradisorelics}.
ev43p3.aiko13: That’s why we’re protecting the #{lorewords.dimensionalshards}, so he can’t open the rift to Valkadia Core.
ev43p3.aiko14: Sadly, he beat us to the #{lorewords.shardofchaos} in #{mapnames.merinberg}.
ev43p3.aiko15: I know it’s not a fair fight, but I’ll fight till the end.
ev43p3.aiko16: He actually killed both me and \n[6] back in Cindrivia. If it weren’t for Goddesses \n[5] and Aina, we wouldn’t be here.
ev43p3.einhart14: I get why you’re all here. I’ll do what I can to help, but I can’t promise success...
ev43p3.einhart15: I don’t know how dangerous Ryan is, but I sense potential in you. Once you unlock it, you might be able to stand against him.
ev43p3.morrigan5: That sounds interesting. So, how do we unlock it?
ev43p3.einhart16: You’ve heard that every soul has a light and dark side, right?
ev43p3.morrigan6: Yeah... I’m not really into the whole ‘spiritual’ thing. Can you explain that?
ev43p3.aiko17: Think of it like this: you have two sides to your personality.
ev43p3.aiko18: One good, one bad. They’re constantly fighting to control your actions.
ev43p3.aiko19: Sometimes, you might act against your conscience. That’s your dark side taking over.
ev43p3.morrigan7: Okay, but why do we need to know this?
ev43p3.einhart17: Because you have to defeat your dark side to unlock your full potential.
ev43p3.morrigan8: Wait, what? How the hell do we fight our own souls?
ev43p3.einhart18: That’s where I come in. I can guide you to the deepest part of your soul, but you’ll have to find your way out.
ev43p3.einhart19: Once you purify your dark side and escape, your potential will awaken.
ev43p3.einhart20: But if you can’t... well, you might never wake up again.
ev43p3.aiko20: Believe in yourself, \n[3]. You can do this.
ev43p3.einhart21: I’ve sensed a bit of darkness in all of you since we met at the #{placenames.inn}, except for \n[5]. There’s no trace of it in you.
ev43p3.einhart23: Your trial will be different from the others, \n[5]. Are you all ready to face your challenges?
ev43p3.aiko21: We’ll do whatever it takes to stop Ryan. Lead us, Einhart.
ev43p3.einhart24: I knew you’d say that. But first, I need a favor.
ev43p3.morrigan9: Just say it. We’ve done favors a million times.
ev43p3.lilith3: Sorry, Einhart. She gets that from her dad.
ev43p3.einhart25: Haha! Straight to the point. I like that. Saves time.
ev43p3.einhart26: Could you grab the thing in that chest for me?
ev43p3.morrigan10: No, no, \n[2]. I’ll do it. I’m sick of sitting around.
ev43p3.einhart27: It’s for your rituals, of course.
ev43p3.einhart28: When you’re ready, stand in the light by the chest with the rood in hand, and focus your mind to reach your inner soul.
ev43p3.einhart29: Just don’t lose it. I don’t have another one for you.
ev43p3.einhart30: There’s something else. We need to secure the Shard, which means I have to craft a new ‘seal’.
ev43p3.lilith6: But I thought you said once the seal’s broken, it can’t be redone?
ev43p3.einhart31: We can’t. That’s why I called it a ‘seal’. It’s actually a purging spell created by Commander Amelia Blackpearl. We’ll place the shard in her #{lorewords.infinitychamber}.
ev43p3.einhart32: This time, no Guardian, but hopefully, the chamber will suppress its power.
ev43p3.aiko22: Sorry, we didn’t have a choice back there...
ev43p3.einhart33: No worries. If it had been Ryan, the Guardian wouldn’t have stood a chance.
ev43p3.aiko24: So what do we need to do? We’ll help however we can.
ev43p3.einhart37: It’s going to take some time, but first, let’s gather a few things.
ev43p3.einhart38: Head over to the city’s #{placenames.itemshop} and tell Han the Blacksmith I sent you. Ask him for the \c[3]Purging Cube\c[0].
ev43p3.einhart39: For now, yeah. I’ll let you know when the next step’s ready.
ev43p3.einhart40: The shop’s just down the bridge, on your left. And I will inform the guards to grant you access to all the gates around #{mapnames.valenkacity}.
ev43p3.noti1: You have got the \c[3]\ii[52]\c[0] #{itemnotification.keyitem} in your #{menu.inventory}. Step on the light there and use it to start your awakening rituals.
ev43p3.noti2: Now you have access to all the gates around #{mapnames.valenkacity}.

ev48.aiko1: Now that we have the \ii[55], what’s the plan, Lady Einhart?
ev48.einhart1: Please, no need for 'Lady.' Just call me Einhart.
ev48.einhart2: Like I said, we’ll use Lady Amelia’s #{lorewords.infinitychamber} to store both shards. The chamber should completely erase their existence, so Ryan won’t be able to sense them.
ev48.morrigan1: I don’t know much about this ‘magic’ stuff, so just tell us what to do next.
ev48.einhart3: I’ll handle the main work. The \ii[55] provides the energy we need, and with a bit of my magic, we’ll open the chamber.
ev48.einhart4: But before I finish channeling the spell, I need you all to make sure nothing interrupts me. Got it?
ev48.leonardo1: Alright, so are we starting now?
ev48.einhart5: Not here. The device to open the chamber is in Lady Amelia’s old room. We’ll perform the ritual there.
ev48.morrigan2: My mother’s room? Where is it?
ev48.einhart6: Of course, it’s inside the Royal Castle. Don’t you want to see it, \n[1]?
ev48.morrigan3: Part of me does, but another part of me really doesn’t... Either way, we don’t have a choice. The more time we waste, the closer Ryan gets to what he wants.
ev48.einhart7: Alright then, let’s head there. I’ll meet you at the chamber.
ev48.lilith2: She hasn’t even told us where Lady Amelia’s room is...
ev48.blanc1: So what do we do...? We can’t just wander around the castle looking for it, can we...?
ev48.leonardo2: If it hasn’t been moved, I think I know where Commander Amelia's room is.
ev48.morrigan4: Oh, right! I almost forgot you used to live in the castle for a bit.
ev48.leonardo3: Let’s head to the #{placenames.valenkamainhall} first. I’ll guide you from there.

ev48p6.blanc2: You look so pale, Plati... What happened?
ev48p6.lilith1: Take a breath first, White. What happened to \n[11]?
ev48p6.plati3: She was taken... by two cloaked people...
ev48p6.plati4: A couple of hours ago... We were playing in the cathedral courtyard, and then...
ev48p6.plati5: Yes... But only one was hooded. The other was a beautiful woman without a hood. She looked a lot like you, \n[1].
ev48p6.lilith3: Do you know where they went, White?
ev48p6.plati6: They appeared out of nowhere... and vanished just as suddenly. After that, I ran back here and brought Mother Einhart to the scene...
ev48p6.plati7: She followed their trail and went into the #{mapnames.voicelessjungle}...
ev48p6.plati8: I wanted to go with her, but she told me to come back here, for my own safety...
ev48p6.lilith4: You did the right thing, White. There was nothing more you could do. She was right to send you back.
ev48p6.blanc3: Don't worry, Plati. We’ll handle this.
ev48p6.morrigan6: Yeah. Even if she is my mother... I have to stop her.
ev48p6.leonardo2: Plati said there were two of them. Then the other one must be Subject M.
ev48p6.lilith5: If that’s the case, we need to hurry! Einhart could be in danger too!

ev151.morrigan1: Damn... Another dead end? I thought every maze had a way out in the center...
ev151.morrigan2: Spent hours getting here, and now... just another goddamn dead end...
ev151.morrigan6: Guys? How the hell did you find me here?
ev151.lilith2: Oh my goddess! You're okay!!! I was so damn worried!
ev151.morrigan7: W-Well... sorry about that... but \n[2], y-you’re... kinda close...
ev151.blanc1: See? They’re not just friends... They are definitely mother and daughter...!!
ev151.morrigan8: But wait... how did you actually find me? You still haven't answered that.
ev151.lilith3: All thanks to \n[4]. He figured out Mother Einhart’s spell and recast it, so we got here in no time.
ev151.morrigan9: So it was \n[4], huh? He never ceases to surprise me.
ev151.leonardo1: It’s my duty to protect you, my lad--- I mean, \n[1].
ev151.morrigan10: Wait... You said you got here in a second?
ev151.leonardo2: Yep. Same way you got in.
ev151.morrigan11: You know, I spent hours finding this place, and you just... show up in a second.
ev151.leonardo3: Haha! The spell recorded your location after you activated it, so we could move straight to you.
ev151.morrigan12: You’re the most talented magician I’ve ever known, \n[4]. Can you get us out of here now?
ev151.leonardo7: I was just focused on getting to you, so...
ev151.leonardo8: No one's left to reverse the spell.
ev151.lilith4: It’s... my fault. I panicked and rushed \n[4].
ev151.leonardo9: It’s not your fault, \n[2]. We all wanted to save \n[1].
ev151.lucas2: Pointing fingers isn’t going to help. We should figure out how to get out ourselves.
ev151.lucas3: You’ve been here for hours, right, \n[1]? Have you found anything?
ev151.morrigan14: Oh, right! Yeah, I found something strange!
ev151.morrigan15: Up there. Right in front of you.
ev151.morrigan16: I have no idea. I was trying to figure it out before you guys showed up.
ev151.morrigan17: Not sure if it's the key to getting us out, but it's all we’ve got right now.
ev151.morrigan20: What the...? I didn’t even touch it yet...
ev151.morrigan21: Really? If I could leave, I’d have gotten my ass out of here ages ago!
ev151.warning: Set up your party before the battle.
ev151.lucas7: Now let's see if that thing can help us out.
ev151.morrigan26: What the...? How did it end up in my hand already?
ev151.lucas8: Can you do something with it?
ev151.morrigan27: I don't know... I don’t even know how this thing works.
ev151.leonardo10: Let me take a look at it, \n[1].
ev151.morrigan28: Sure, you probably know more about this. Here.
ev151.leonardo11: Huh... I give up. It’s not a spell or anything that can help us escape.
ev151.aiko5: If only I had learned Time and Space magic from Master Lacie when we were in Cindrivia...
ev151.leonardo13: If Einhart realizes we were sent here, she’ll definitely find a way to bring us back.
ev151.lilith8: So... all we can do is wait?
ev151.lucas10: Then I guess we have no choice. Let’s wait.
ev151.aiko6: Don’t lose hope, \n[1]. I’m sure Einhart will find us.
ev151.einhart1: So, it was all of you, huh?
ev151.einhart2: If I hadn’t noticed the spell scroll, you’d still be stuck here.
ev151.lilith9: Thank you for coming, Mother Einhart... and sorry for acting on impulse...
ev151.einhart3: Haha! Don’t look so worried. It’s not a big deal.
ev151.einhart4: At least not yet... You didn’t run into the Void Knight, did you?
ev151.einhart5: Impossible! The Guardian of the #{lorewords.shardoftranquillity} isn't that easy to defeat!
ev151.leonardo15: He’s right. We took him down and got the shard.
ev151.aiko8: We know about them, and the #{lorewords.paradisorelics} too. We even have the #{lorewords.shardofdeath}.
ev151.einhart8: Y-You guys... really are full of surprises...
ev151.einhart9: But the #{lorewords.dimensionalshards} aren’t something you should mess with unless you know what you’re doing.
ev151.morrigan34: I didn’t mean to take it. It just... ended up in my hand after we beat the Void Knight.
ev151.morrigan35: I can put it back if you want.
ev151.einhart10: No, you can’t. Once a shard is removed, it can’t be placed back.
ev151.einhart11: I’ll handle it when we get back. We need to talk about this.
ev151.lilith10: *She looks serious... are we in trouble, \n[4]?*
ev151.einhart12: Haha! You’re worried about getting in trouble, aren’t you? Don’t worry. I’m just impressed.
ev151.einhart13: Actually, I wanted to ask you about what you know... and talk about pushing your limits. Come on!
ev151.einhart14: But no more 'Mother', okay? You make me feel old...

ev68.lilith1: And this is just the main hall.
ev68.aiko1: Indeed. Compared to Cindalia Castle back in our world, this feels more elegant... and a lot bigger.
ev68.lucas1: Yeah, looks like Valenka is way more advanced than Cindalia.
ev68.morrigan1: So this is it, huh? Honestly, it’s not as grand as I expected.
ev68.morrigan2: Don’t tell me you’re getting all nostalgic now.
ev68.leonardo2: Nostalgic? Not really. But... it’s hard to forget. As a kid, I thought this place was the center of the world.
ev68.aiko2: \n[1], maybe Valenka isn’t just about bad memories. Who knows? It might have something worthwhile for us to find.
ev68.morrigan3: Something worthwhile, huh? Not buying it. But if by 'worthwhile' you mean wrapping this up quick, then yeah, I’m all for it.
ev68.aiko3: Just give it a shot, \n[1]. Like Mother Einhart said.
ev68.einhart1: Didn’t I tell you to stop calling me 'Mother'? Don’t make me feel ancient...
ev68.einhart2: Still not feeling it, are you, \n[1]?
ev68.morrigan4: Not even close. I’m just here to get this over with, so can we move it along?
ev68.einhart4: Behind this gate is the #{placenames.valenkathrone}. I know you’re not thrilled, \n[1], but please... keep it civil. Let’s not turn this into a scene, alright?
ev68.morrigan5: Depends on what I hear from him. But sure, don’t lose sleep over it.

ev68p3.morrigan1: So where is my mother's office, \n[4]?
ev68p3.leonardo1: Keep going ahead and get to the second floor via the stairs on your left. Lady Amelia's office should be right in front of us once we get up there.
ev68p3.morrigan2: Thanks, \n[4]. We would never make it without you. Let's go, guys!

ev36.einhart1: Your Majesty! I have brought \n[1] Blackpearl and her companions.
ev36.king1: Amelia’s daughter... At last, we meet. You bear an unmistakable resemblance to your mother, \n[1] Blackpearl.
ev36.morrigan1: How ‘gracious’ of you to descend from your lofty throne to greet me. After all, I’m but a simple traveler.
ev36.morrigan2: But let’s not waste time with pleasantries. If you’ve brought me here, get straight to the point.
ev36.king2: You are far from simple, \n[1]. You are Amelia’s child, the daughter of a woman to whom I owe a debt beyond repayment.
ev36.king3: I summoned you here because I needed to see you with my own eyes, to confirm that you truly are the one I’ve long sought to speak with.
ev36.morrigan3: And what do you expect from me? Sympathy? Forgiveness? Spare me the pretense. If you’ve called me here to spout excuses for my mother’s death, you’ve wasted your time.
ev36.morrigan4: It was YOUR fault!! Because of YOU, my mother sacrificed herself! My father was shattered, and yet here you sit, untouched, ruling from your throne as if nothing ever happened!
ev36.king5: You are justified in your anger, \n[1]. I have no excuses to offer, nor do I seek your forgiveness. I merely wished to return this to you.
ev36.king6: A keepsake of your mother’s. She left it in her final moments. I have safeguarded it all these years as a token of her memory.
ev36.king7: She intended to give this to you herself when you were grown, but fate did not allow her that chance.
ev36.morrigan6: Then why didn’t you give it to my father after the war?
ev36.king8: Your father vanished after the war ended, taking you with him. I searched but could not find him to return this.
ev36.king9: I have waited all these years to place it into the hands of its rightful owner.
ev36.morrigan7: And what do you hope when giving this to me? Do you think a trinket can change anything?
ev36.king10: No, it cannot undo anything. But it is the last remnant of your mother’s legacy that I can return to you. I do not ask for forgiveness, only for you to understand.
ev36.king11: Your mother was a hero, and she acted out of faith that her sacrifice would secure a brighter future, especially for you, \n[1].
ev36.king12: I also feel compelled to tell you the truth about that fateful night.
ev36.morrigan7a: More of your supposed 'truth'? Do you expect me to believe it?
ev36.king12a: This truth has haunted me for years. Let me unburden my soul, \n[1].
ev36.king13: That night, your mother did not shield me because I was king.
ev36.king14: And I never commanded her to sacrifice herself for me. That choice was hers alone.
ev36.morrigan8: Then WHY did she make such a choice?!
ev36.king15: She acted because she believed the death of a king meant the fall of an entire kingdom. To her, #{mapnames.valenkacity} was more than a city; it was her home, her heart. She could not bear to see it fall.
ev36.king15a: When she was gravely wounded, I actually sought to shield her with my own life, to protect her as she had protected so many.
ev36.morrigan8a: You risked yourself... for her? Why would a king like you do such a thing?
ev36.king17: I acted without thought. Perhaps, in my heart, I deemed her life far more vital to this kingdom than my own insignificant one.
ev36.king17a: But before I could act, she thrust me aside, choosing to bear the strike herself and pulling the enemy into her final stand.
ev36.king18: I can’t forget that image, \n[1]. In her final moments, she smiled... A smile filled with faith and hope.
ev36.king20: In you, \n[1]. She believed in a world where you could live free of war and pain. Her sacrifice was made with that hope in her heart.
ev36.king21: Amelia wanted you to live without the weight of her choices, to forge your own path unburdened by the past.
ev36.aiko1: \n[1]... You don't need to decide anything at this moment. Just keep her keepsake and think about it.
ev36.king21a: I wish I could see your father too, \n[1]... to tell him I’m truly sorry for everything...
ev36.morrigan10: Enough! You have no right to speak of my father! Don’t think a single heirloom and a few words will make me believe in your fairy tale!
ev36.king22: I expect nothing, \n[1]. My only hope is that you uncover the truth in your own time and find the strength to live the life your mother wished for you.
ev36.morrigan11: Whatever! If there’s nothing else, I’m leaving. Come on, everyone!
ev36.lilith2: My apologies, Your Majesty. I bid you good day. Please excuse us.
ev36.king23: May she find peace and understanding in her heart...
ev36.einhart3: Do not worry, Your Majesty. I think \n[1] has begun to believe it, though she still showed a bit of stubbornness. It is her nature after all.
ev36.king24: I pray you are right, Mother Einhart. And thank you, as always, for your guidance.
ev36.einhart4: It is my duty, Your Majesty, and my honor.

ev26.morrigan1: Geez... If it were not for \n[4], we would never find this place...
ev26.einhart2: Sorry, my bad! I forgot you had no idea about this place.
ev26.lucas1: I think we are wasting our time here, Einhart. Shall we start?
ev26.lilith1: So what are we supposed to do? We have the \ii[55] already, so we will give it to you now?
ev26.einhart4: Well, not really... There should be a hidden device here in this room to put the \ii[55] inside. It is just... I haven't figured out where it is...
ev26.leonardo1: I thought you knew everything already...?
ev26.einhart5: How am I supposed to know everything? It was Lady Amelia's work, not mine. I only read it from her book.
ev26.blanc1: So you mean we gotta find the hidden device now...?
ev26.einhart6: Exactly! And put the \ii[55] inside and activate the system. That's all!
ev26.einhart7: Thanks. I will prepare my magic here, so please do not disturb me until the device is found.

ev26p3.einhart1: Great job, guys! Stay there and let me handle the rest!
ev26p3.aiko1: So this is the portal to the #{lorewords.infinitychamber}...
ev26p3.einhart3: Yes. And let's go. We should not waste more time.
ev26p3.morrigan1: Well, what are we waiting for? Let's go after her.

ev26p7.blanc1: Everyone...! I’ve been so worried! How did it go...?
ev26p7.lilith1: I'm sorry... It didn’t go well.
ev26p7.morrigan1: It was destroyed... We were too late.
ev26p7.einhart3: Don’t apologize. I’m just glad you all returned safely, and that’s what truly matters.
ev26p7.einhart4: At least we still have the two #{lorewords.dimensionalshards}. Even if all the Relics are gone, they can’t complete their plan yet.
ev26p7.lucas1: Yeah. But we need to figure out what to do with these shards soon. It’s only a matter of time before they make their next move to take them from us.
ev26p7.einhart5: I examined her... and found something unusual.
ev26p7.einhart6: The scar has nothing to do with her memory loss, but something else.
ev26p7.blanc3: You said the same earlier... So what is it, Einhart?
ev26p7.einhart7: I sensed traces of #{termwords.blackmagic} in her mind, as if parts of her memory were taken away by someone.
ev26p7.einhart8: Yes. It’s been lurking deep within her mind, feeding on her memories. I’m not sure whether we can remove it to restore what was lost, or...
ev26p7.einhart9: Or those memories may be gone forever. That #{termwords.blackmagic} has been inside her for far too long.
ev26p7.einhart10: I’ll do everything I can, but I can’t promise anything, \n[3].
ev26p7.aiko3: Where is she now? I think I might know something, and maybe I can help.
ev26p7.einhart11: She’s resting. I’ll call her out.
ev26p7.lilith2: Now that’s a surprise. You weren’t sneaking out of the orphanage again, were you, \n[11]?
ev26p7.einhart13: Father Zephaniah sent her here. He believes this little one shows potential, especially with healing magic.
ev26p7.lydia4: That’s right! Father Zephaniah said so. I’ll study hard with Mother Einhart so one day I can join your adventures, \n[1]!
ev26p7.morrigan4: Haha! I’ll hold you to that, \n[11]. One day, we’ll fight side by side.
ev26p7.lucas2: An adventurer never fears the dark, right?
ev26p7.lydia5: I’m still trying to be brave...
ev26p7.aiko5: Now, White, may I check on you for a moment?
ev26p7.aiko6: So that’s how Ryan and Lucia managed to travel to #{mapnames.whitehaven}, as we vaguely managed before...
ev26p7.lilith3: You mean... Ryan was behind it all?
ev26p7.aiko7: Yes. What happened to Plati, \n[3]? How did she encounter Ryan?
ev26p7.blanc7: I... I don’t know... All I remember is she was taken right in front of me...
ev26p7.aiko8: Ryan extracted her memories to learn about your homeland, and then make use of his time-space magic to get there.
ev26p7.aiko9: That’s why parts of her memories were erased... especially her childhood ones.
ev26p7.blanc8: Is there any way to bring them back?
ev26p7.aiko10: I’ve already tried reversing the magic and purifying her mind. It may take a long time, but I believe she’ll recover... someday.
ev26p7.aiko11: Still, she’ll need regular purification so my magic can slowly cleanse all the #{termwords.blackmagic}. Einhart, could you help with that?
ev26p7.einhart14: Leave that to me. I’ll ask the nuns to prepare a room for her in the Cathedral.
ev26p7.blanc9: Thank you, \n[5]... and you too, Einhart. And thank you, everyone, for always being here for us.
ev26p7.aiko12: Please, \n[3]. I only did what I had to do.
ev26p7.plati3: What are you all talking about? I don’t understand...
ev26p7.blanc10: You’ll understand soon, Plati. You’re safe now, thanks to our friends here.
ev26p7.einhart15: Don’t worry, White. From today, you’ll stay in the Cathedral with me and the sisters. Is that all right with you?
ev26p7.morrigan5: I’ll talk to him later. Don’t worry, he’ll understand.
ev26p7.lydia6: All that talk about magic and memories is making my head spin...
ev26p7.einhart16: \n[11], could you escort White back to the Cathedral? Tell the nuns to ready her room.
ev26p7.lydia8: Come on, White! I’ll show you the way!
ev26p7.einhart17: Everything’s settled here. I suppose it’s time for you to meet #{npcnames.valenkaalchemist}, the #{npcnames.alchemist}, isn’t it?
ev26p7.lucas3: Yeah. I hope he can help us. Keeping these shards in raw form is too risky, especially now that we know \n[1]’s mother is on their side.
ev26p7.morrigan7: That’s why we need to stay alert. Ryan has my mother’s memories, so who knows what he’s capable of or where he’ll go next using his time-space magic.
ev26p7.morrigan8: But still... why hasn’t he confronted us directly? He easily could, couldn’t he?
ev26p7.aiko14: That’s not how his magic works. He can only travel to static locations drawn from memory, not moving ones.
ev26p7.aiko15: And since we’re constantly on the move, tracking us is difficult. Besides, he wouldn’t waste energy chasing us like that.
ev26p7.aiko16: He’s saving his strength for something much bigger, while his subordinates, like \n[13], carry out smaller schemes.
ev26p7.aiko17: That’s exactly what he did back in Cindrivia.
ev26p7.lilith4: We’re so lucky to have you and \n[6] with us, \n[5]. Without you both, I don’t know how we’d survive all this.
ev26p7.aiko18: I’m not that special... This is the Goddess’s will, and I’m just following it.
ev26p7.aiko19: If anything, we’re the lucky ones, \n[2]. I don’t think \n[6] and I could’ve managed all this alone.
ev26p7.aiko20: Now, let’s go see what #{npcnames.valenkaalchemist} can do for us.
ev26p7.einhart18: Tell him I sent you. He’ll help however he can.
ev26p7.einhart19: I’ll return to my office. If you need me, come find me there.
ev26p7.noti1: #{npcnames.alchemist} #{npcnames.valenkaalchemist}’s house is in the northwest part of the inner city.

ev10.leonardo1: Whoa, so this is the #{lorewords.infinitychamber}... Lady Amelia was unreal to pull off a place like this.
ev10.einhart1: She was someone I really looked up to. That’s why I started digging into her magic in the first place.
ev10.aiko1: I can’t feel a trace of life essence from outside. It’s like this place is completely shut off from the world.
ev10.einhart2: That’s why I figured we should seal the #{lorewords.dimensionalshards} here, to keep them out of anyone’s hands.
ev10.lilith1: So, what’s our next move, Einhart?
ev10.einhart3: See those two chests over there?
ev10.morrigan1: Got it. We’re locking the #{lorewords.dimensionalshards} in there, right?
ev10.einhart4: Yeah, that’s the plan. Go ahead and do it.
ev10.einhart5: I’m gonna seal the chests with Lady Amelia’s magic so they stay locked for good.
ev10.einhart6: Give me a sec. I need to focus on this.
ev10.aiko2: Seems like it. At least this keeps the shards out of the living world, and Ryan’s reach.
ev10.einhart7: How’s this even possible? No one’s supposed to get in here without me knowing!
ev10.morrigan4: You’re not laying a finger on them, you rotten lapdog of Ryan’s!
ev10.einhart8: Keep her away from the chests! I’ll speed up the chant! Hold her back!
ev10.noti1: This battle will require \c[4]\n[1]\c[0] and \c[4]\n[4]\c[0] to participate. Please rearrange your party if necessary.
ev10.morrigan6: If I’m going down, you’re coming with me!
ev10.leonardo3: Now! Frozen embers, burning ice—unleash the twin elements’ wrath!
ev10.lucas2: She’s reeling! Let’s end this together!
ev10.leonardo4: N-No way...! Th-This can’t be real...!
ev10.einhart9: This isn’t adding up! Lady Amelia’s been gone for years!
ev10.npc9: HOW... HOW DO YOU POSSESS THAT NECKLACE...?
ev10.leonardo7: Lady Amelia! Don’t you see \n[1]? She’s your mirror image!!
ev10.leonardo8: You’ve got to remember, Lady Amelia!!
ev10.leonardo9: LADY AMELIA! THAT’S MORRIGAN, YOUR DAUGHTER!
ev10.npc12: NO... NOOO! THESE NAMES MEAN NOTHING TO ME!
ev10.morrigan12: That was... my mother...? Tell me it’s a lie, \n[4]...
ev10.leonardo10: I didn’t want to believe it either, but I’d know her anywhere...
ev10.leonardo11: First time we crossed paths in #{mapnames.merinberg}, I had this gut feeling. Kept telling myself it was nothing...
ev10.leonardo12: Now my worst fear’s coming true...
ev10.aiko4: That fiend Ryan... always weaving deceit and despair...
ev10.lilith3: \n[1]’s dreamed of meeting her mother forever... and now it’s a nightmare.
ev10.einhart11: I had little time with Commander Amelia myself. My knowledge of her comes solely from others’ accounts. She remains the most admirable soul I’ve ever known.
ev10.einhart12: To witness her reduced to this... it is a grievous wound.
ev10.morrigan14: Is my fate to face my mother in a fight to the death...?
ev10.morrigan15: There’s so much I wanted to say, questions I needed to ask her...
ev10.morrigan16: And now... I’ve got to take her life myself... again...
ev10.lucas4: Killing your own mother... I can’t even imagine that kind of hell..
ev10.lucas5: You don’t have to bear it alone, \n[1]. We’ll do it for you.
ev10.morrigan17: No, \n[6]. This is mine to carry. I don’t know how Ryan dragged her back, but she’s not herself anymore...
ev10.morrigan18: The dead don’t belong here. I’ll set her free. It will be my last gift to her.
ev10.lucas6: If that’s your call, I’ll stand by it. Just don’t let it break you, \n[1]. Stay sharp when it matters.
ev10.einhart13: Still, I don’t get it. How’d she slip into the #{lorewords.infinitychamber}?
ev10.einhart14: She built this place, sure, but getting in without setting off the castle’s alarms?
ev10.einhart15: Time-space magic? Such a power exists?
ev10.aiko6: Yeah... it’s his nastiest trick. He bends space to teleport anywhere.
ev10.aiko7: All he needs is a memory of the destination.
ev10.aiko8: That’s how Lady Amelia appeared here, I’m certain.
ev10.aiko9: If I’d stayed longer in Cindrivia, I might’ve gleaned more about it from Master Lacie...
ev10.einhart16: That’s some heavy magic... If he could mess with time too, we’d be in real trouble.
ev10.aiko10: He can’t, at least not for major events. Master Lacie told me they sealed that power from each other when they were allies, fearing it’d shatter the timeline.
ev10.aiko11: She held his key, he held hers, long before he turned into the monster he is now.
ev10.aiko12: He can still tweak time a little, just not enough to alter history or defy death.
ev10.morrigan20: But my mother was right there! Isn’t that him raising the dead?
ev10.aiko13: Not quite. It’s a vessel housing her soul, shaped like her. He’s puppeteering her spirit.
ev10.aiko14: Back at the #{lorewords.relicofvendurousleaf}, he tried the same with you, \n[1], after beating you down. I broke his spell just in time.
ev10.lilith4: Wait! You said he needs memories to travel?
ev10.aiko15: Yeah. Anything human tied to the place. Memories especially.
ev10.lilith5: That’s how he reached #{mapnames.whitehaven}! It’s gotta be \n[3] and her sister Plati!
ev10.lilith6: You and Plati were the only two Griffinians out of #{mapnames.whitehaven}, yeah?
ev10.blanc6: You’re saying Ryan, or his lackeys, took Plati...?
ev10.lilith8: Exactly! He ripped out her memories! That’s why she’s a blank slate now!
ev10.morrigan21: I thought Big Joe was the cause?
ev10.lilith9: Nah, after Ryan or his goons got her memories, they must have dumped her. Big Joe just found her later.
ev10.leonardo13: Hold up! How’d \n[5] and \n[6] get into #{mapnames.whitehaven} then?
ev10.aiko16: I sensed the #{lorewords.relicofviolentdust} when wandering around #{mapnames.sandstorm}. \n[6]’s instincts led us to a hidden door and a device that took us to \n[3]’s hometown.
ev10.blanc8: But it needs Griffinian blood. How’d you manage?
ev10.aiko17: I can unravel most spells. It's a gift from the Goddess of Night. I opened it, passed through, and reset it.
ev10.blanc9: So... can we bring Plati’s memories back?
ev10.aiko18: Hard to say. It’s been a while, hasn’t it? I’ll try, \n[3], but I can’t promise anything.
ev10.einhart17: I’ll help out, \n[5]. Where’s she at now, \n[3]?
ev10.blanc10: With the Slave Liberation Organization in #{mapnames.seagullport}...
ev10.einhart18: Bring her to me. \n[5] and I will investigate what can be done.
ev10.aiko19: It’s nothing, \n[3]. Least I can do.
ev10.lucas7: What about the shards? We finishing the seals or not?
ev10.einhart19: No. After what \n[5] said, this place isn’t safe anymore. Ryan could show up any time.
ev10.blanc12: Why not smash them? Keeps Ryan from getting them.
ev10.einhart20: These kinds of artifacts don’t break that easy. You could try, but it’s a long shot.
ev10.aiko20: She’s right. If it were that simple, \n[6] and I would’ve done it ages ago.
ev10.einhart21: You guys take them. We’ve got no other choice.
ev10.einhart22: If the #{lorewords.infinitychamber} isn’t secure, nowhere is.
ev10.einhart23: I’d rather you hold onto them. At least we’ll know when Ryan makes his move.
ev10.einhart24: Still, we need to beef up their protection. If Ryan grabs them, it’ll take him time to crack through.
ev10.einhart26: His shop’s in \c[4]North West #{mapnames.valenkacity}\c[0]. Look for the \c[2]red mailbox\c[0] out front. Tell him I sent you, and he’ll pitch in.
ev10.morrigan24: What can he do for the shards?
ev10.einhart27: Not sure exactly, but alchemists are pros at transmutation. I’m betting #{npcnames.valenkaalchemist} can figure out a way to shield them better.
ev10.einhart28: Maybe even turn them into something useful for you, if we’re lucky.
ev10.einhart29: Here! Take them and keep them safe. Sorry I can’t do more on this one.
ev10.morrigan25: No, Einhart. You’ve done more than enough already. We’ll handle it from here.
ev10.aiko21: First, we need to bring \n[3]’s sister to Einhart. The longer she stays like that, the less likely we can restore her memories.
ev10.aiko22: With some luck, maybe we can find out more about what happened to her after she regains her memories.
ev10.einhart30: \n[5]’s got a point. Bring her to me, and we’ll see what we can do.
ev10.einhart32: Go pick up \n[3]’s sister and bring her back. I’ll be waiting here.
ev10.noti2: \c[4]\n[1]\c[0] and \c[4]\n[4]\c[0] are no longer required to be in the active party. You can now freely arrange your party.

ev41.morrigan1: Hey, you’re Han the Blacksmith, right?
ev41.morrigan2: Mother Einhart Sylvian sent us. She said you can help forge the \c[3]Purging Cube\c[0]. This is pretty urgent.
ev41.han2: Oh, sure. But I’ll need a few more ingredients before I can start. Can you help me out?
ev41.morrigan3: Sure thing! Just tell us what you need, and we’ll grab it in no time.
ev41.han3: Thanks! I need \c[4]09\c[0] \c[3]Withered Bones\c[0] from the dead bodies of small animals in #{mapnames.chaoticswamp}.
ev41.hanchoice1: I have found what you need!
ev41.handeny1: Hmm... I see you only have \c[2]\evalText<<$gameParty.numItems($dataItems[53])>>\c[0] \c[9]\ii[53](s)\c[0]. Please find the rest so I can start my job.
ev41.han4: Well, thank you. I will start my work right away.
ev41.morrigan4: Hey! What's wrong? You've been pacing around for a while now.
ev41.morrigan5: What do you mean? You've got a whole crate of hammers right there.
ev41.han6: Yes, but to forge the \c[3]Purging Cube\c[0], those ordinary hammers are useless. I need my \c[4]\ii[54]\c[0]...
ev41.morrigan6: Can’t you remember where you last put it?
ev41.han7: It’s always on my crafting table. How could it just vanish like that?
ev41.lilith2: Do you remember who bumped into us right outside the door earlier?
ev41.lilith3: If my guess is right, then she’s already...
ev41.morrigan9: Damn it! That little thief is always causing trouble! I swear, this time I’ll skin her alive.
ev41.lucas1: Your friend has quite the temper, \n[1].
ev41.morrigan10: We’ve gotta find her fast, before she slips out of the city.
ev41.morrigan11: Han, I’m sorry. This is all on us. We’ll get your \c[4]\ii[54]\c[0] back, I promise.
ev41.han8: I don’t know what you’re talking about, but if you’re willing to help me recover it, I’d be deeply grateful.
ev41.morrigan12: Just wait here. We’ll bring it back!
ev41.leonardo1: I saw her running south. If we head that way, we might find some clues.
ev41.handeny2: I don’t think now’s the time for jokes, don’t you agree?
ev41.noti1: Try to talk to the people with a yellow \c[17]!\c[0] on their heads. They may have some useful information to find \n[14].

ev41p5.morrigan2: Doesn’t matter. You’ve got your hammer back, right? Can you get started?
ev41p5.han2: Yeah, I’ll get to work right away, but this \ii[55] might take a while to finish.
ev41p5.han3: Probably a full day, unless I get sidetracked.
ev41p5.han4: Yep, so... can you let Mother Einhart know? She probably already knows, but we should make sure she’s in the loop.
ev41p5.morrigan5: Got it. I’ll let her know. We’ll meet up again tomorrow.
ev41p5.han5: Thanks. Now, if you don’t mind...
ev41p5.han6: Not yet. I think you should come back later.

ev41p6.han1: Ah! Just in time! I have just finished it. Here you go!
ev41p6.morrigan1: Thank you. It should be a big help for us.
ev41p6.han2: Don't sweat it. And please send my regards to Mother Einhart.
ev41p6.morrigan2: Will do. See you around, Han!

ev67.blanc1: This place... it’s even scarier than the #{mapnames.voicelessjungle} or the #{placenames.spiritwell}...
ev67.aiko1: The #{placenames.spiritwell} is nothing compared to this forest. I know it’s unsettling, \n[3], but hang in there. We still have a long way to go.
ev67.lilith1: Even though this isn’t my first time here, it still sends shivers down my spine.
ev67.leonardo1: Yeah, same here. This is exactly why I hate walking through this place.
ev67.lucas1: Hey, \n[1]. We still have the \c[4]\ii[47]\c[0], right? Better keep it lit, it’ll help dispel the dark essence around us.
ev67.morrigan1: Yeah, I’ve got it right here. We need to push through this forest and the #{mapnames.seishincave} to reach #{mapnames.shiroitown}. Stay close!
ev67.noti1: The dark essence in this forest is dense, so keep the \c[4]\ii[47]\c[0] lit to dispel. If there's no white light around your party, you'll be affected by \c[2]Fear\c[0], reducing \c[4]EVA\c[0] and \c[4]MEV\c[0] by 100%, and giving a 25% chance to lose your current action.

ev12.lilith1: An earthquake...? Now of all times?
ev12.kaoru1: Tsk... this day just keeps getting worse...
ev12.lilith2: We can’t just stand here! Let’s help her!
ev12.morrigan1: Geez... Why is it always us getting involved in situations like this...? Now shall we, \n[3], \n[4]?
ev12.leonardo3: Worry not, fair maiden! The one and only 'Mister Handsome' \n[4] has arrived to save the day!!
ev12.kaoru5: Who are you people? What are you doing here? It’s dangerous!
ev12.leonardo4: Exactly why we’re here! Don’t worry, we’ll handle this. Please, stand back!
ev12.leonardo5: Vile creature! You dare threaten this lovely lady? You now face the greatest magus in history!!
ev12.leonardo8: The name’s \n[4]. But what’s a delicate flower like you doing alone in a death trap like this?
ev12.kaoru8: Some rare ingredients for my potion experiments can only be found here.
ev12.option1lilith1: So you’re kind of a Potion Master then? Those vials you gave us worked wonders out there.
ev12.option1kaoru1: Something like that. Thanks for trusting me enough to test them.
ev12.option1kaoru2: I still need to refine them a bit more. You can keep any leftover potions.
ev12.option2morrigan1: So you’re a Potion Master, huh? I... haven’t exactly dared to try those vials you gave me yet...
ev12.option2kaoru1: Well... forget it. Just hand them back.
ev12.kaoru9: So what brings all of you here?
ev12.kaoru10: That’s my hometown. What business do you have there?
ev12.morrigan2: We’re looking for someone we know. I heard he’s in that town.
ev12.kaoru11: What’s his name? Maybe I can help.
ev12.morrigan4: Yeah. He was my father's comrade before. You know him?
ev12.kaoru13: Quite well. We’re trading partners, actually.
ev12.kaoru14: Part of his supplies from town includes my handmade potions.
ev12.kaoru15: His ship docked just yesterday. He’s probably still in town gathering supplies for his organization.
ev12.morrigan5: That’s a huge help! Thank you... uh... miss...
ev12.kaoru16: Name’s Kaoru Tsukishiro. Just call me Kaoru. And... one more thing...
ev12.kaoru18: I said I’m a man... a real man!!
ev12.blanc2: You... look prettier than most women...
ev12.lilith5: Yeah... I almost don’t believe my own eyes...
ev12.kaoru19: C-Can we just... drop this topic already...?
ev12.morrigan7: *‘Mister Handsome’ \n[4], got anything else to add?*
ev12.kaoru20: It’s fine... So, I didn’t catch your names either...
ev12.morrigan8:
Well, you already know ‘Mister Handsome’ 
[4]. I’m 
[1], and these are 
[2], 
[3], 
[5], and 
[6].
ev12.kaoru21: It’s an honor to meet you all. And... thanks again for saving me. If you hadn’t shown up, I might’ve ended up wasting my ten-year masterpiece just to blast that monster to pieces.
ev12.morrigan9: I’m not sure I’d ever want to see it in action. Anyway, would you like to come with us back to your town?
ev12.kaoru22: I still need to gather more ingredients here and in #{mapnames.seishinwood}, so I’ll stay behind for now.
ev12.morrigan10: Alright. Stay safe, then. We’ll see you around!
ev12.lucas2: Come on, we’ve still got to track down Ryland in that town.

ev14.gabblanc1: This cave... feels even worse than #{mapnames.seishinwood}... Just breathing here makes me exhausted...
ev14.gabaiko1: Hang in there, \n[3]. We're almost through.
ev14.gablucas1: Keep that light burning. The dark essence is much thicker in here.
ev14.gabmorrigan1: Yeah, I know. Let's keep moving. #{mapnames.shiroitown} is right past this cave.

ev17.blanc1: We’re going to see Einhart now...!! I can’t wai—
ev17.aiko4: I can feel its energy leaking out!! \n[13] must be here!!!
ev17.lilith1: Are you sure!? Where’s the relic, \n[5]?
ev17.aiko5: Down below! The same place where we met Kaoru!
ev17.lilith2: Damn it! We were just there! How did you not sense it before!?
ev17.aiko6: It must’ve been sealed tight... I couldn’t feel anything, until now! It's shattering!!!
ev17.lucas2: Then let’s move! We have to stop \n[13] before she destroys it entirely!!
ev17.morrigan2: \n[3]!! Take Plati back to Einhart! We’ll handle this!
ev17.blanc2: B-But... I can’t just leave you guys here...!!
ev17.morrigan3: No ‘but’!! Go!! For your own sake! It’s too dangerous for Plati to stay!!

ev17p3.morrigan2: But they still got another Relic... Damn it.
ev17p3.aiko1: This is on me. I should have sensed the Relic sooner.
ev17p3.lilith2: And... I'm sorry for snapping earlier. I lost my temper.
ev17p3.aiko2: You were only telling the truth. I just wish I’d done better and noticed it sooner.
ev17p3.lucas2: What’s done is done. It isn’t anyone’s personal fault. They’ve always been a step ahead.
ev17p3.lucas3: Don’t let this get you down, especially now. We still have two #{lorewords.dimensionalshards}. That matters.
ev17p3.leonardo1: \n[6]'s right. We shouldn’t linger here. We need to move before they make their next play.
ev17p3.morrigan4: Let’s return to #{mapnames.valenkacity} first to check on \n[3] and Plati, then follow Einhart’s plan for the #{lorewords.dimensionalshards}.
ev17p3.morrigan5: As long as these shards remain with us, their plan can’t succeed.
ev17p3.morrigan6: So let’s make ourselves their final target, and finish this once and for all.
ev17p3.aiko3: True. That still gives us some time to prepare.
ev17p3.lucas4: Now let’s go see what Einhart can do for \n[3] and her sister.
ev17p3.aiko4: Yeah. I need to help them too. Let’s move.
ev17p3.noti1: The \c[4]Waypoint System\c[0] has been enabled again.

ev8.lucia1: That’s not a very nice way to say hello, \n[6]. Still so impulsive, huh? But I’m afraid you’re too late.
ev8.lucas1: Shut the hell up, you damned devil!!
ev8.lucia2: You guessed it. That was the unstable energy from the shattered Relic spreading through the cave.
ev8.lucia3: And you already know what happens when a Relic is destroyed, don’t you?
ev8.lucas2: Don’t act all smug! After using that much power, this should be your weakest moment! Your life ends here, \n[13]!!
ev8.lucia4: Oh, such confidence. But I’m afraid that’s not how this story ends.
ev8.lucia5: I’ve already prepared a little gift, enough to bury you all beneath the earth.
ev8.lucia6: And once this whole place comes down, it’ll be your grave!!
ev8.morrigan1: What the hell is that thing...!?
ev8.lucia7: Looks like it is starting to collapse. I’ve got no reason to stick around.
ev8.lucas3: Don’t you dare run away, coward!!
ev8.leonardo1: I can feel a massive force coming this way!!
ev8.lilith2: We can’t escape without dealing with whatever that is...!!
ev8.aiko1: I’ll try to delay the collapse and unlink this temple from #{mapnames.seishincave}, so the cave stays intact! Please finish it quickly!!
ev8.morrigan2: Got it! We’ll give it everything we’ve got!! Ready, everyone!!
ev8.noti1: \c[4]\n[5]\c[0] will not be joining this battle. Please rearrange your party if needed.
ev8.aiko2: The unlink is complete!! Everyone, get out—now!!

ev55.morrigan1: Oh! This must be your first time seeing it, right?
ev55.blanc2: Yeah... I’ve heard of it before, but never got the chance to see it myself...
ev55.blanc3: It’s so beautiful...!! Plati must have seen it, too!! I already miss her...!!
ev55.lilith1: I’m so glad to see you smile. And don’t worry, we’ll see her soon, \n[3].
ev55.leonardo1: Any clue where we can find Ryland and Plati? This town isn’t exactly small...
ev55.morrigan2: If he’s here to resupply the organization, my guess is he’ll be at the \c[4]#{placenames.shiroitradinghall}\c[0].
ev55.noti1: \c[4]#{placenames.shiroitradinghall}\c[0] is located in the northern part of town.

ev62.thuga1: C’mon, girl! What’s a pretty flower like you doing hanging around that old man?
ev62.thugb1: Yeah, seriously. What’s your name, sweetheart? Come with us, we’ll show you a real good time.
ev62.plati1: P-Please... I-I don’t want any trouble...
ev62.thuga2: Guess we’ll have to do this the hard way then, huh?
ev62.thugb2: Yeah. Didn’t wanna rough you up, but you should’ve just listened. Now---
ev62.plati3: I told you... I didn’t want to do this... I’m sorry...
ev62.morrigan1: Whoa...!! Ryland really trained her well. I’m impressed!
ev62.blanc4: Yes, Plati!! It’s me, your sister, \n[3]!!
ev62.plati5: I told you... my name is White...
ev62.blanc5: I’m just so glad you’re safe, Plati...!! I was so worried about you...!!
ev62.plati7: \n[1] and \n[2] are here too...? And who are the others?
ev62.morrigan2:
Don’t worry. 
[4], 
[5], and 
[6] are our friends.
ev62.aiko1: It’s so nice to meet you, Plati. You really do look just like your sister.
ev62.aiko2: White...? But I thought her name was Plati?
ev62.morrigan3: Ah, long story. We’ll get to that later.
ev62.morrigan4: And, Pla— I mean, White. I’ve gotta say, I was really impressed with what you did back there. Looks like Ryland taught you well.
ev62.plati9: Yes. Master Ryland was so kind to me. He taught me everything about swordsmanship and hand-to-hand combat. He said I had potential... that it would be useful someday.
ev62.morrigan5: And he wasn’t wrong about that.
ev62.blanc6: Plati...! Come with us now! I found some people who might know how to help you!
ev62.aiko3: *\n[3] looks like a whole different person when she’s with her sister, doesn’t she?*
ev62.lucas1: *I’m not used to that kind of emotion... but I think I’d be the same if we ever reunited with our friends in Cindrivia.*
ev62.leonardo1: *It’s rare to see her this happy.*
ev62.lilith2: *Because now her sister might finally regain her memories. I’m so happy for them both.*
ev62.plati10: But... what about Master Ryland...? I can’t just leave without telling him. He’ll be worried...
ev62.morrigan6: We’ll talk to him first. After that, please come with us, White.
ev62.noti1: \c[3]\n[15]\c[0] has joined your party as a GUEST. The \c[4]Waypoint System\c[0] is temporarily disabled during this mission.

ev65.morrigan1: Father Zephaniah has authorized us to use his ship. Here is his signature on our \ii[35], along with his \ii[66].
ev65.npc2: Hmm... These are indeed Father Zephaniah’s signature and documents.
ev65.npc3: Alright. Everything is in order. You’re free to go. Stay safe out there.
ev65.noti1: Talk to the \c[4]#{npcnames.harbormaster}\c[0] again to set sail.

ev42.morrigan1: Oh great... the old man’s drunk again.
ev42.morrigan2: You can't wake him up. Once he’s drunk, he’s out cold.
ev42.morrigan3: You could say that. But it is so strange to see him getting drunk like thi---
ev42.blanc2: Did you see a girl with him?
ev42.npc3: Yeah, there was a girl who looked a lot like you sitting here earlier, but...
ev42.npc4: S-Some guys just took her outside... They didn’t look very friendly...
ev42.blanc4: No...!! I’m going to find her now...!! If they dare touch her, I swear I’ll kill them...!!
ev42.morrigan4: Yeah. We can’t let anything happen to Plati.
ev42.morrigan5: Hey, does he have a room here?
ev42.morrigan6: Please help take him up to his room. We’ll be back soon.
ev42.npc7: I’ll look after him... I just hope the girl’s alright...

ev39.morrigan1: Ryland! What the hell was that all about?
ev39.ryland1: Ah... I’m sorry, \n[1]... It was my fault...
ev39.morrigan2: Don’t apologize to me—say it to \n[3]! I can’t believe you got drunk and left Pla—White alone like that!
ev39.blanc1: \n[1]... Don’t be too harsh on him... At least Plati’s safe now...
ev39.lilith1: What happened, Ryland? You’re not the kind of man who’d let something like that happen.
ev39.ryland3: Actually, two young men came up and asked me to have a drink with them. I only meant to take one shot...
ev39.ryland4: But after that, everything went blurry. Next thing I knew, I was already back in my room.
ev39.ryland5: I’m truly sorry, \n[3]... I should’ve been more vigilant...
ev39.blanc2: It’s alright, Ryland... Don’t blame yourself too much.
ev39.lilith2: So they were after Pla—White from the start.
ev39.morrigan3: Well, luckily she knew how to defend herself. Credit goes to you for that, Ryland.
ev39.ryland6: She fought them off on her own?
ev39.plati1: Yes, Master Ryland. I only fought back when I had no choice... and I managed to defeat them.
ev39.ryland7: I knew you had potential, White. The blood of the Griffinians runs strong in you, and that’s a gift.
ev39.ryland8: You still have much to learn, but I’m proud you were able to protect yourself.
ev39.lucas1: Just stay on track, \n[1]. We don’t have time to chat.
ev39.morrigan5: Ryland, we need to take Pla—White with us. We’re close to finding a treatment for her condition.
ev39.morrigan6: Yeah. The longer we wait, the harder it’ll be to restore her memories. Mother Einhart in #{mapnames.valenkacity} said she could help.
ev39.ryland10: I hope she truly can... for White’s sake.
ev39.ryland11: White, you should go with your sister. It’s what’s best for you.
ev39.plati3: But Master Ryland, what about our work here? And the supplies?
ev39.ryland12: Don’t worry about that. I can handle it myself. I’m not that old yet, you know.
ev39.ryland13: Besides, I’ll be staying here for a few days to rest anyway.
ev39.ryland14: So go on, White. I’ll be fine.
ev39.plati4: Thank you, Master Ryland. I’ll see you again soon.
ev39.morrigan7: Alright, let’s head back to #{mapnames.valenkacity}. We shouldn’t keep Einhart waiting.
ev39.morrigan8: See you later, Ryland. I’ll bring back good news.

ev42.albanus1: Haha! That really brought back memories!
ev42.ryland1: Yeah! Hard to believe we're this old now. Still feels good to see you again after all these years, my friend!
ev42.albanus2: Same here. I just wish Merrick were here too... He completely fell apart after that incident. I haven't heard from him since.
ev42.ryland2: Merrick... Yeah, it's been a long time since I last saw him. But I recently met his daughter. She's grown into quite a warrior.
ev42.ryland3: Ah! Speak of the devil! Albanus, that's Merrick's daughter right there! Her name is \n[1].
ev42.albanus3: You're Merrick's daughter? You really take after your mother, \n[1]!
ev42.morrigan2: Do I know you from somewhere?
ev42.ryland4: You might not know him, but he knows you very well. This is #{npcnames.valenkaalchemist}, former Commander of the Valenka Royal Medical Force. He, your father, and I were comrades back in the day.
ev42.albanus4: Oh, I've retired long ago. I'm just an ordinary citizen of #{mapnames.valenkacity} now.
ev42.albanus5: Haha! You can erase the 'famous' part. And it's good to finally meet you, \n[1]. How's your father?
ev42.morrigan4: My old man? Haven’t seen him in a while, but I assume he’s still doing just fine.
ev42.albanus6: Haha! You sound just like him. Give him my regards when you see him, alright?
ev42.albanus7: No need for formalities. Just call me Albanus. So, how can I help you?
ev42.morrigan7: Alright, Albanus. Mother Einhart said you could help us with something.
ev42.albanus8: Mother Einhart sent you? Then this must be something serious.
ev42.morrigan8: Yeah. It’s a life-or-death situation. Can we talk somewhere else more private?
ev42.albanus9: Of course. Come to my room.
ev42.albanus10: Guess we'll continue our conversation another time, my friend.
ev42.ryland5: It’s fine, haha! We’ve got plenty of time ahead!
ev42.morrigan9: Oh, and Ryland, Einhart is taking care of Plati. She’ll stay at the Cathedral for a while. We're just here to let you know.
ev42.ryland6: That's wonderful news. I’ll gather my supplies and return to the organization alone then. Tell her I said goodbye and wish her the best.
ev42.morrigan10: We will. And thank you for everything you've done for her.
ev42.ryland7: It was nothing. Just what I could offer.
ev42.ryland8: Well then, my friend, it's time for me to head out. If you ever have time, come visit me, alright?
ev42.albanus11: Of course! Until we meet again, my friend. Safe travels!
ev42.albanus13: So then, what do you need from me?
ev42.morrigan12: Do you know anything about the #{lorewords.dimensionalshards}?
ev42.albanus14: I heard about them. The Popes of Valenka have guarded one for decades, maybe even centuries.
ev42.albanus15: I also heard myths surrounding them, though I'm unsure how true they are.
ev42.morrigan13: For reasons, Mother Einhart entrusted one to us. And we already held another. That makes two.
ev42.albanus17: You’re kidding! I've never seen one in my life! I thought they were nothing more than legends! How did you—?
ev42.morrigan14: Long story. But a demon is hunting them, and #{mapnames.valenkacity} is no longer safe to keep them sealed.
ev42.morrigan15: That’s why Einhart sent me to find your help.
ev42.albanus19: Incredible... These shards are extraordinary. They feel like they don’t belong to this world at all.
ev42.morrigan17: Since you're an #{npcnames.alchemist}, Einhart said you might be able to 'reinforce' them, so even if the demon gets his hands on them, he can't break them easily.
ev42.albanus20: ‘Reinforce,’ huh...? It might not be that simple.
ev42.albanus21: The issue is... I know almost nothing about them. Reinforcing them may carry risks.
ev42.albanus22: I can't say. Who knows how they’ll react... or what they might turn into.
ev42.albanus23: I’ll try to help, but I can’t do this alone.
ev42.lucas1: What do you mean you 'can't do this alone'?
ev42.albanus24: I’ll need help from my partner. One of my best students. Thankfully, he lives in this town. I came here partly to visit him.
ev42.lucas2: And how do we know he can be trusted? These shards are not something we should hand over lightly.
ev42.albanus25: I vouch for him with my life.
ev42.lucas3: This isn’t about YOUR life! We're talking about thousands of lives! You can't gamble with that!
ev42.albanus26: The choice is yours. I'm offering help, but if you can’t trust me or my partner, then I think we’re done here.
ev42.aiko2: Please forgive his harsh tone. He didn’t mean it that way.
ev42.aiko3: It’s just that if the demon gets these shards, our world is doomed. That’s why we must guard them with everything we have.
ev42.aiko4: So \n[6] doesn’t want to expose them to anyone we don’t know.
ev42.morrigan20: We accept your help, Albanus. What should we do?
ev42.lucas4: Are you serious!? You're trusting people that easily!?
ev42.morrigan21: Tell me, \n[6]! Do we even have a CHOICE? It’s only a matter of time before Ryan and his minions come for us!
ev42.morrigan22: We HAVE to take this chance, or we’ll have nothing left to fight with!
ev42.morrigan23: You’re the one who always tells us to stop wasting time, yet you're the one wasting it now!
ev42.morrigan24: I wish we had another option. But look at us...
ev42.morrigan25: We’ll have to face Ryan sooner or later. Every bit of help increases our chance of surviving this war, \n[6].
ev42.lucas7: I won't deny that... Maybe you're right.
ev42.lucas8: But if things go wrong, I won't hesitate to do whatever it takes to keep these shards safe, even if I need to kill him or his partner. Remember that.
