ev42.morrigan26: I know. We’ll do our best to make sure it doesn’t happen.
ev42.albanus27: Now that everyone’s calmer, we’ll examine the shards at my partner’s house.
ev42.albanus29: Come when you're ready. I’ll be waiting inside.

ev3.kaoru1: It's been a while, master. I'm really glad you came. I've been struggling with my new experiments...
ev3.albanus1: Haha! Think nothing of it. An old man like me has plenty of free time.
ev3.albanus2: But before anything else, I have a challenge for you—no, for both of us. A big one. Something I couldn't handle alone, which is why I need your help.
ev3.kaoru2: You look serious, master. What kind of ‘big challenge’ are we talking about? You know I never turn down one.
ev3.albanus3: This time is different. It's a request from Mother Einhart... and nothing like anything we've seen in our lifetime.
ev3.albanus4: That's why I need your alchemy expertise.
ev3.kaoru3: Please... I'm not that great, master. Everything I know today, I learned from you.
ev3.kaoru4: So what is it? Now I’m curious.
ev3.albanus5: I already asked them to come. They should be here soon. Once they're here, we'll begin.
ev3.leonardo1: So the student you mentioned is Kaoru?
ev3.albanus7: Wait, you all know each other?
ev3.kaoru6: Yeah. They saved my life when I was trapped in #{mapnames.seishincave}.
ev3.albanus8: Haha! So we're all acquainted! The world really is small!
ev3.lilith2: *Hey, Mister Handsome \n[4], you want to handle the talking?*
ev3.albanus9: So I guess we can skip the introductions, huh?
ev3.aiko1: I thought Kaoru was a Potion Master?
ev3.albanus10: You can call him either a Potion Master or an Alchemist. He just loves making potions, but his alchemy skills are the real deal.
ev3.lucas1: We already said we’d skip introductions, right? So what’s next?
ev3.kaoru8: Before that, can someone explain what's going on? I still have no idea what we're dealing with...
ev3.kaoru10: #{lorewords.dimensionalshards}? They don’t sound like they belong to this world...
ev3.morrigan3: They're not. They're some kind of celestial artifacts.
ev3.kaoru11: So this is the ‘challenge’ you were talking about, master?
ev3.albanus12: Yes. I wasn’t confident enough to handle this on my own, so I need your help.
ev3.albanus13: And like I said, this is a request from Mother Einhart. We can't take it lightly.
ev3.kaoru13: So what do you need from us, \n[1]? We'll do everything we can.
ev3.morrigan5: The problem is, a demon is hunting these shards. We need to make sure they never fall into his hands.
ev3.morrigan6: And even in the worst case, if he does get them, he must not be able to make use of them, not anytime soon.
ev3.morrigan7: That’s why Einhart sent us to Albanus, to find a way to 'reinforce' the shards and strengthen their protection.
ev3.kaoru15: This might be the hardest challenge of my life... but I think I can do it.
ev3.kaoru16: We can’t do this here. Follow me.
ev3.albanus14: The boy looks so serious about this...

ev8.kaoru1: Sorry this place is a bit cramped.
ev8.lilith1: This looks like a witch’s house. Are you doing some kind of dark alchemy here...?
ev8.kaoru2: Calling it dark alchemy is a little harsh... I just make potions and do alchemy with monster remnants...
ev8.aiko1: So... you just throw those monster bits into that pot and...
ev8.kaoru3: Yeah, sort of. I put their parts in the pot, add some special ingredients of mine, and then...
ev8.morrigan1: So what am I supposed to do now? Don’t tell me...
ev8.kaoru4: You guessed right. Just drop the shards into the boiling pot. Everything’s ready.
ev8.kaoru5: No, the smaller pot that’s boiling. Just put them in there.
ev8.lucas1: Do you even know what you're doing? You already look suspicious to me.
ev8.albanus1: He’s just excited. Alchemy is his life, after all.
ev8.kaoru6: Yeah, sorry... bad habit. I get carried away when I start doing alchemy.
ev8.lucas2: I’m warning you. If you try anything funny, you’re the one going into that pot.
ev8.leonardo1: *I agree, \n[3]... I regret rescuing him now.*
ev8.morrigan3: Alright, here goes... I really hope we’re not going to get blown up...
ev8.lucas3: Are you messing with us? You said this was some big challenge, and all you did was toss the shards into that dumb pot?
ev8.kaoru11: Calm down, will you? I said your part was done. Now it’s my turn.
ev8.kaoru12: Please don’t interrupt me once I start, or the results might be... unpredictable.
ev8.albanus5: They absorbed all the essence from the alchemical materials we fed them.
ev8.albanus6: I think we did it, Kaoru!
ev8.albanus7: Yes. They just need to rest in this distillation flask for a bit.
ev8.lucas5: Can someone explain what’s going on? Stop saying stuff only the two of you understand!
ev8.lucas6: How? All you did was stand there, chant some crap, and say it's done!
ev8.kaoru18: You said you didn’t understand alchemy, right? So I’ll explain it simply.
ev8.kaoru19: We coated the shards with a reinforced fluid made from monster remains, especially elite ones.
ev8.kaoru20: Then we forced the essence of those remains into each shard’s core, fusing them together.
ev8.kaoru21: And here we are! The results are beyond anything you imagined!
ev8.kaoru22: You'll understand when you see them. Master, please hand them the reinforced shards.
ev8.morrigan6: What the hell...? They turned into \c[4]#{termwords.reinforcementcrystals}\c[0]?
ev8.kaoru23: Exactly. That’s what we aimed for. Now they not only have a reinforced outer layer but also grant unique power for you to use.
ev8.kaoru24: I don’t know how strong that demon is, but I’m sure he’ll need time to break through this protective layer.
ev8.lucas7: Do their original functions still stay the same?
ev8.kaoru25: Absolutely. So can you trust people just a tiny bit now?
ev8.kaoru26: But be warned that the shards’ power is unstable and on an entirely different level. The equipment you attach them to might not survive.
ev8.kaoru27: Meaning when you remove the shard from your gear, the gear will shatter. So be careful.
ev8.kaoru28: Yeah, but still a small price to pay for power like this, right?
ev8.albanus9: Now that we’re done with Mother Einhart’s request and you've gained new power... are you planning to hunt down that demon?
ev8.morrigan9: I’m always ready to face him, but we have no idea where to find him...
ev8.morrigan10: All we’ve been doing is following his minions’ traces.
ev8.aiko2: Now that you say it... that explains why he’s always one step ahead of us...
ev8.lilith2: So neither you nor \n[6] knows where he is?
ev8.aiko3: Sorry, but with his Time-Space magic, he could be anywhere.
ev8.aiko4: Sometimes I think he’s hiding somewhere unreachable, just like in Cindrivia, working on his plans without interruption...
ev8.lilith3: And where exactly is this mystery place?
ev8.aiko5: I said it before. It’s the #{lorewords.dimensionalcrack}.
ev8.leonardo2: That... does not sound like a place we can reach.
ev8.aiko6: I wish I could help more... For now, all we can do is track his minions. Or, with some luck, find the last relic or shard before they do.
ev8.kaoru30: Not exactly. But I know a place where you might find someone who does, and maybe even a way to get inside.
ev8.morrigan12: The island far out in the #{mapnames.sanguineocean}? I’ve heard of it, but never had a reason to go.
ev8.kaoru32: That’s the one. It’s home to the elves. They’re masters of magic, so they might be able to help.
ev8.morrigan13: And who do we talk to there?
ev8.kaoru33: Well... I don’t know anyone there. How about you, master?
ev8.morrigan14: This is getting us nowhere... What about you two, \n[5], \n[6]?
ev8.aiko7: Sorry, we’ve never been there either...
ev8.albanus11: Mother Einhart might know something. I remember she once joined Father Gadaric on a trip to #{mapnames.sereneisland} to study elven magic.
ev8.morrigan15: Going back and forth like this is driving me insane... but I guess we don’t have a choice.
ev8.morrigan16: I don’t know how to repay you both, but thank you for everything, Kaoru, Albanus.
ev8.kaoru35: Don’t worry about it. If it's alchemy-related, I’m always happy to help. That’s my life.
ev8.kaoru36: But if you 'do' want to repay me, buying my potions would help a lot.
ev8.kaoru37: Visit me anytime. You’re always welcome here. I’ve got plenty of useful potions for you.
ev8.morrigan18: Are you heading back to #{mapnames.valenkacity} too, Albanus? We can escort you.
ev8.albanus12: Nah. I’ll stay here a bit longer. Kaoru still needs my help with his experiments.
ev8.kaoru38: And if you find more shards and want them reinforced, just bring them here. We’ll take care of it.
ev8.morrigan19: Hopefully we’ll find more. Thanks again, Kaoru, Albanus! Farewell!
ev8.noti1:
Your \c[4]\ii[49]\c[0] and \c[4]\ii[60]\c[0] have been reinforced and transformed into \c[4]#{termwords.reinforcementcrystals}\c[0]. You can now attach them to your equipment.
\c[2]WARNING:\c[0] As Kaoru said, equipment will shatter when the shard is removed.
ev8.noti2: Kaoru also sells many useful crafted potions. Visit his store anytime.

ev30.einhart2: Lady Amelia...!! Let her go...!! She’s just a child...!!
ev30.subjectm1: DO NOT INTERFERE WITH OUR WORK.
ev30.morrigan1: Mother!! Let her go!! She has nothing to do with this!!
ev30.lilith1: It’s a long story, Father. Please, leave this to us for now.
ev30.subjectm2: ONE MORE STEP, AND YOU DIE.
ev30.morrigan2: I will never forgive anyone who hurts my friends. One of us is gonna die here today, and it won’t be me!!
ev30.noti1: \n[1] is required for this battle. Please rearrange your party if needed.
ev30.morrigan3: How...?! *huff* He deflected it... like it was nothing...
ev30.lilith2: Even a Griffinian like \n[3] is getting worn out... He is a monster...
ev30.zephaniah3: My healing magic... it’s not working on her...
ev30.lydia1: \n[1]... Father Zephaniah... Mother Einhart... Everyone... You all came... for me...?
ev30.lydia2: \n[1]... I don’t think... I can keep... my promise... about going on an adventure with you someday...
ev30.morrigan11: No, don’t say that!! We’ll find a way! I swear!!
ev30.lydia4: It’s... okay, \n[1]... I’ve already... reached my limit...
ev30.lydia5: But I’m glad... I got to meet you... and everyone else...
ev30.lilith3: Why...? Why would they do this to her...? She had nothing to do with this...
ev30.morrigan13: Father!! You’re hiding something, aren’t you?!
ev30.zephaniah4: I... what I feared most... has come true...
ev30.zephaniah5: Yes... the #{lorewords.shardoflife}... She has returned to her original form...
ev30.aiko4: That’s why I couldn’t sense a living soul inside her... She was the #{lorewords.shardoflife}.
ev30.lilith4: So that’s why they were after her... Damn it!!
ev30.leonardo1: But how? How could a shard become a living being...?
ev30.morrigan16: WHY, FATHER?! Why didn’t you tell us sooner?! If you had, we could’ve protected her!!
ev30.morrigan17: LOOK AT HER!! Is this what you wanted?!
ev30.zephaniah6: I... I’m sorry. I wasn’t certain. And I didn’t want to believe it...
ev30.zephaniah7: I once told you that two beings were born in this place long ago. One was the Shadow Fiend you defeated...
ev30.zephaniah8: That day, I heard crying in this #{mapnames.voicelessjungle}. When I arrived, \n[11] was lying right here.
ev30.zephaniah9: I thought it was a miracle, for a living sound echoing in a place meant to be silent...
ev30.zephaniah10: I took her to the Church and asked the nuns to raise her.
ev30.zephaniah11: Only after meeting \n[5] and \n[6], and studying the shards and relics, did the truth start to form in my mind.
ev30.zephaniah12: At first, I thought I was imagining things. But after you claimed the #{lorewords.shardofdeath} from the Shadow Fiend, I knew my fear was real.
ev30.zephaniah13: That’s why I sent her to Mother Einhart... hoping she’d be safe there...
ev30.morrigan18: YOU SHOULD HAVE TOLD US, FATHER!!
ev30.morrigan19: \n[5] asked you before, and you still stayed silent!!
ev30.morrigan20: Then you sent her to #{mapnames.valenkacity}?! That place isn’t safe anymore!!
ev30.morrigan21: Especially when my mother... is working for Ryan!!
ev30.morrigan23: Enough?! His silence led her straight into this tragedy!!
ev30.einhart7: What’s done is done. None of us knew about Lady Amelia being controlled before.
ev30.einhart8: Do you think you’re the only one in pain? Father Zephaniah raised her from infancy.
ev30.einhart9: She was his daughter in everything but blood, and he had to watch her die.
ev30.einhart10: And do you know why Lady Amelia forced that hooded man to leave without killing you?
ev30.einhart11: Because even under manipulation, her mother’s instinct remained. That’s why you’re still standing here, alive.
ev30.einhart12: Have you ever imagined watching your own child die, unable to do anything?!
ev30.einhart13: He only did what he thought was best. How could he have known this would happen?
ev30.einhart14: Listen, \n[1]. I know you’ve been suffering so much. Your friends, your mother... and now \n[11]...
ev30.einhart15: But this isn’t the time to fall apart. If we do, Ryan wins before the fight even begins.
ev30.einhart16: If one of you breaks now, everyone follows. And then who is gonna stop him?
ev30.morrigan25: I... I just can’t accept this...
ev30.lucas1b: Then don’t let her sacrifice mean nothing!
ev30.lucas2: In the end, \n[11] still chose to stay with us, one way or another. She always wanted to help.
ev30.lucas3: You wouldn’t betray that, would you, \n[1]?
ev30.morrigan27: No. She’ll fight with us, and she’ll see Ryan fall.
ev30.morrigan28: \n[11]... I promise. We’ll finish this together.
ev30.zephaniah14: I never thought this day would come so soon... Her death... was my failure...
ev30.morrigan29: Father... I’m sorry. I let my emotions get the better of me.
ev30.morrigan30: You did what you could. We dragged you, and \n[11], into this too.
ev30.morrigan31: But her sacrifice won’t be forgotten. She’ll fight with us, and live in our memories.
ev30.lucas4: \n[5] and I saw her as our little sister. But right now, we don’t have time to grief.
ev30.lucas5: The end is close, and we must continue.
ev30.lucas6: For now, let’s escort Father Zephaniah back to #{mapnames.luviniacity}. He needs to get some rest.
ev30.lucas7: And Einhart, there is something that we’ll need to discuss.
ev30.einhart17: I’ll take Father Zephaniah back to the Church. Meet me at his tower.
ev30.noti2: You have received \c[4]\ii[61]\c[0]. You can bring it to \c[4]Kaoru\c[0] in #{mapnames.shiroitown} to reinforce its power.
ev30.noti3: \c[4]\n[1]\c[0] is no longer required in the active party.

ev14.blanc1: Wow...! It feels so nice here...! The air is so fresh...!
ev14.lilith1: Indeed. Just breathing it in feels calming.
ev14.aiko1: This place is in perfect harmony with nature. I can feel the peace and tranquility all around us.
ev14.leonardo1: I truly admire the wisdom of their ancestors. By building their home far from the mainland, they spared themselves countless unnecessary conflicts.
ev14.lucas1: Still, this meadow is enormous. Finding the elves' home here might not be easy.
ev14.morrigan1: Then we search. Simple as that. We'll check every corner if we have to.
ev14.morrigan2: None of us has ever been here before, though. What worries me is whether they’ll see us as guests... or intruders.
ev14.aiko2: I doubt they’ll be hostile. If they were, they wouldn’t choose such a peaceful place as their homeland.
ev14.aiko3: And from what I know from my world, elves tend to be calm and reserved.
ev14.morrigan3: Let's hope your knowledge holds up. At least this place tells us a little about them. Now come on! Let's find their town.

ev10.morrigan1: Nothing yet... Maybe I'm using it wrong, or—
ev10.aiko1: Wait...! So this is what we couldn't see before! That's how she was able to walk through the air.
ev10.blanc1: B-But... the bridge looks so unreal... Can we really walk on it...?
ev10.leonardo1: Don't you remember what she said? 'Where sight may wander, touch may follow.' If we can see it, I'm certain we can walk on it.
ev10.lucas1: It's the only way forward. Whether it works or not, we have to try.
ev10.noti1: The \c[4]\ii[65]\c[0] has lost its effect and become one of the \c[4]#{msxinventory.keyitems}\c[0] in your \c[4]#{menu.inventory}\c[0].

ev29.aiko1: There's nothing connecting the two sides?
ev29.blanc1: Do the elves isolate themselves from the world too...? Or... can they fly?
ev29.leonardo1: I doubt that. Einhart said she had been here before, right? There must be a way across.
ev29.lilith1: Yes. I believe so as well. I doubt the people here can fly either.
ev29.blanc2: Maybe we could jump down there... and swim across?
ev29.lucas1: Don't be ridiculous. The moment you hit that river, the current will sweep you away.
ev29.npc2: You seem to be searching for our town.
ev29.morrigan6: Yeah. We mean no harm. There's someone we need to meet there.
ev29.npc3: Guests are always welcome... though it has been quite some time since anyone came looking for us.
ev29.morrigan7: Then how do we get to the other side?
ev29.npc4: I cannot take your hands and lead you there. But I can offer a small piece of guidance... Where sight may wander, touch may follow.
ev29.npc5: It is no riddle. The path is plain enough... perhaps something you carry could enlighten your sight.
ev29.npc6: Now, if you will excuse me.
ev29.aiko2: She just... walked through the air...
ev29.leonardo2: I knew the elves were masters of magic, but this is on a completely different level...
ev29.lilith2: 'Where sight may wander, touch may follow'... It sounded like she was referring to something invisible to the naked eye...
ev29.lucas3: So there must be something she could see that we can't. We need something to 'enlighten' our sight.
ev29.morrigan10: Do they always enjoy messing with people like this...? What, do we have to rub something in our eyes just to see what she saw?
ev29.aiko3: Wait. That might actually be a good idea, \n[1].
ev29.aiko4: No, \n[1]. I mean it. I think we might already have something that can help.
ev29.aiko5: Remember the \c[4]\ii[65]\c[0] Einhart gave us? That elf said something we possess could 'enlighten' our sight. Maybe we could use it like a lens to look through!
ev29.morrigan12: Oh! I didn't even think of that. It was originally made by the elves here, right? You might be onto something.
ev29.morrigan13: Yeah. Let's see what our eyes have been missing.
ev29.noti1: You can step over the tile with yellow \c[17]!\c[0] and use the tool.

ev1.blanc1: So this is the elves' home... It doesn't look that different from other towns...
ev1.robot3: YOU ARE CLEAR TO PROCEED. WELCOME TO SERENUS TOWN.
ev1.morrigan2: Is this... some kind of machine? They use machines to guard their town?
ev1.aiko1: It can even detect hostile intent. This is incredible... They've combined magic and technology into one system.
ev1.robot4: IF YOU REQUIRE ASSISTANCE, PLEASE STATE YOUR REQUEST. OTHERWISE, ENJOY YOUR STAY.
ev1.lilith1: Wait... so we can just ask it anything? I've never seen a machine like this before. It almost feels like it has a mind of its own.
ev1.morrigan3: Talking to a machine feels strange... but here goes...
ev1.morrigan4: Where can we find Professor Balthazar?
ev1.robot6: PROFESSOR BALTHAZAR'S \c[4]#{placenames.arcaneacademycap}\c[0] IS LOCATED NORTH OF THE TOWN. DO YOU REQUIRE FURTHER ASSISTANCE?
ev1.robot7: YOU ARE WELCOME. ENJOY YOUR STAY.
ev1.leonardo1: #{placenames.arcaneacademy}... That must be where Einhart studied.
ev1.morrigan6: Let's hope he listens when we show him Einhart's circle. Come on, let's go.

ev21.morrigan1: More of those machines... Are we supposed to ask them again? I’d really rather not talk to them.
ev21.blanc1: Looks like there’s a receptionist up ahead... Maybe we can ask her instead, if you’d prefer...
ev21.npc1: Hello there! It’s been quite some time since we last had guests. How may I assist you?
ev21.morrigan3: We’re looking for Professor Balthazar. Is he here?
ev21.npc2: Do you have an appointment with him?
ev21.morrigan4: This is our first time here, so... what do you think?
ev21.npc3: Ah, my apologies. Let me check if Professor Balthazar is available.
ev21.npc4: It seems he’s currently teaching an 'Art of Manipulating Elements' class. He should be available—
ev21.balthazar2: Doctor Niveus will take the next class. I’ll be returning to my office.
ev21.balthazar3: Yes. It seems we have visitors from beyond our shores.
ev21.npc7: They’ve come to see you, Professor.
ev21.balthazar4: Hmm... I see you’re carrying one of my creations. An artifact I entrusted to my student, Einhart Sylvian. Yet she is not with you. Tell me, what brings you here?
ev21.leonardo2: Y-You can tell just from that...?
ev21.balthazar5: Of course. I made it myself. Without it, you wouldn’t have been able to reach this place. Einhart must trust you greatly to have given it to you. So, what do you seek?
ev21.leonardo3: Einhart is our friend. She sent us to ask for your help. But... this might not be the best place to talk about it.
ev21.balthazar6: Ah! So it is Einhart's guidance. Come to my office then. We can speak there in private.
ev21.balthazar7: Fayen, inform the Animatas that they have my authorization.

ev4.balthazar3: Now then... what problem has Einhart encountered that she could not resolve herself?
ev4.leonardo1: We'll get straight to the point, then. Have you ever heard of #{lorewords.dimensionalcrack}?
ev4.balthazar4: I have. What is it you wish to know?
ev4.leonardo2: We need to get there, Professor.
ev4.balthazar5: And why would you seek such a place? Do you even understand what it truly is?
ev4.aiko1: \n[6] and I once entered one back in Cindrivia. We were pursuing an insidious demon after he fled into it.
ev4.aiko2: Based on what I know, it's like a crack in the shell of the world itself. Once you slip through it, you're no longer inside the house... but lost within the darkness between its walls.
ev4.aiko3: The demon we chased escaped from Cindrivia into this world, and we suspect he may be hiding there once again.
ev4.aiko4: That's why we need to reach it, to stop him once and for all.
ev4.balthazar6: So the two of you are not natives of this world. For a human, your understanding is impressive... but incomplete.
ev4.balthazar7: Tell me. In your world, how did you enter the #{lorewords.dimensionalcrack}?
ev4.aiko5: We received help from the Chronomancers and their master. They tracked the energy of one of the demon's servants whenever it traveled between reality and the crack with their Time-Space magic.
ev4.balthazar8: I see. By tracing that energy, they could identify the correct #{lorewords.dimensionalcrack} and open a portal to it through Time-Space magic.
ev4.balthazar9: And that distinction is crucial. There is not merely one #{lorewords.dimensionalcrack}. Countless fractures exist, each leading somewhere different.
ev4.balthazar10: With Illusory Magic, I too can open a path to a #{lorewords.dimensionalcrack}. However, without a precise source to guide me, I cannot guarantee it will lead to the one you seek.
ev4.balthazar11: And not every crack is stable... or survivable. Some are twisted beyond reason. Open the wrong path, and the consequences may prove fatal.
ev4.aiko6: So we would need to catch the moment they travel between this world and the crack before you can open the portal?
ev4.balthazar12: Precisely. Otherwise, the risk would be far too great, and not one I would advise taking.
ev4.lilith1: This is a serious problem... We have no way of knowing when \n[13] or the... um... Subjects... move between reality and the crack. And we can't ask Professor to follow us around constantly, either...
ev4.balthazar13: Are you certain your enemy is hiding there?
ev4.aiko7: Not entirely, Professor... It's only my intuition, based on what I know about him.
ev4.morrigan1: So there's no way for us to reach the correct #{lorewords.dimensionalcrack}...?
ev4.balthazar14: Even if your enemy is truly hiding there, there is no assurance the place itself would be safe for you. Still... if you insist on pursuing this path, I believe I may be able to help.
ev4.lucas1: We'll take any risk if it means stopping him. Just tell us what we need to do.
ev4.balthazar15: I can create a device capable of collecting the energy signature of someone crossing between reality and the crack. Once you obtain that energy, bring it to me. I will analyze it and determine the correct destination.
ev4.balthazar16: However, this task exceeds my expertise alone. We will require the assistance of my old friend, Doctor Niveus, to construct such a device.
ev4.niveus1: It's me!! You've got a minute, Balthazar?
ev4.balthazar18: Ah, perfect timing. Come in, Niveus.
ev4.niveus2: Today's lecture just wrapped up. And since I'm skipping tomorrow's classes anyway, I figured I'd—
ev4.balthazar19: Allow me to introduce them. These are guests from beyond our shores. It's been some time since we've had any, hm?
ev4.balthazar20: And this is my longtime colleague, Doctor Niveus. He is a brilliant expert in automation and technology. The Animatas outside are among his finest creations.
ev4.balthazar21: The machines guarding the town. Niveus designed their bodies and neural systems, while my magic serves as their power source.
ev4.balthazar22: By the way, Niveus, since you'll be free tomorrow, would you assist me in constructing the \c[4]Nexus Energiae\c[0]?
ev4.niveus5: \c[4]Nexus Energiae\c[0], huh? Heh... it's been ages since I built one of those. Sure, I can do it, but it won't be quick. Planning to track something down?
ev4.balthazar23: Something along those lines. And if you require assistance, I believe our guests here may be willing to help.
ev4.niveus6: Oh, absolutely. That'd save me a ton of trouble. I've got plenty of work piled up already.
ev4.niveus7: Anyway, come see me at my laboratory \c[4]west of town\c[0]. I've gotta run.
ev4.lilith2: He seems to be... rather extravagant with the way he dresses...
ev4.balthazar24: Haha! That is simply how Niveus has always been. But without him, this town would never have reached such heights.
ev4.balthazar25: He is not a magician in the traditional sense. His mind is far closer to that of a scientist.
ev4.balthazar26: Though forgive me, I have yet to ask your names.
ev4.morrigan2:
I'm 
[1] Blackpearl. This is 
[2] Harventon, 
[3] Silverhawk, 
[4] Hargreave, 
[5] Kusuda, and 
[6] Shadowrath.
ev4.balthazar27: Blackpearl... I once knew someone bearing that name long ago. Before marriage, she was a Rosenveil - my finest student, and the only one who mastered my Illusory Magic.
ev4.morrigan3: Amelia Rosenveil... later Amelia Blackpearl after she married. She was my mother.
ev4.balthazar28: I see... No wonder you resemble her so closely. Then tell me... how is your mother doing?
ev4.morrigan4: She died during the Four-Kingdom War. She gave her life protecting others... like a true hero.
ev4.balthazar29: My deepest condolences. War has a cruel habit of claiming the gifted and the devoted, while leaving tyrants behind to inherit the world...
ev4.lucas2: I think that's enough introductions for now. We'll head to Doctor Niveus's laboratory and help him build the device.
ev4.balthazar30: Very well. My apologies for keeping you here so long. You are welcome to return whenever you wish.
